Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(**********************************************************************

 Presheaves of enriched categories

 In this file, we define an enrichment for the category of presheaves.

 In the file `FunctorCategory.v`, we showed that the category of
 V-enriched functors between two V-enriched categories forms a V-enriched
 category as well. However, this does not capture all examples that
 one might want to have, such as the category of V-valued presheaves. If we were
 to use the category of V-enriched functors, then we only get V-valued presheaves
 on categories `C` enriched over `V`. As such, we do not naturally get
 all the examples that one might want to consider, such as presheaves
 over partial orders.

 If we assume that `V` is a complete symmetric monoidal closed category,
 then we can define an enrichment for the presheaves on `C` valued in
 `V` for all sufficiently small categories `C`. To define this
 enrichment, we need to define an object in `V` that represents the
 natural transformations between two functors `F, G : C ⟶ V`. This
 object is defined in two steps.
 1. We take the product of `F x ⊸ G x` for all `x : C`
    ([presheaf_enrichment_hom_prod]). This represents the data of the
    natural transformation.
 2. We take an equalizer ([presheaf_enrichment_hom]). The two maps of
    this equalizer represent the left hand side and the right hand side
    of the usual naturality condition. The natural condition is
    expressed in the language of `V`.
 The statement [presheaf_enrichment_naturality] shows how we can apply
 the naturality condition of natural transformations.

 We also need to define the identity and the composition for our
 enrichment. The approach is similar to how we define natural
 transformations. For example, for the identity, we first define the
 data of our transformation ([presheaf_enrichment_id_data]). In this
 definition, we express that the identity transformation is pointwise
 the identity morphism. Afterwards, we prove the naturality condition
 ([presheaf_enrichment_id_laws]), which, in this case, concretely means
 that our morphism actually maps to the equalizer. The idea is the same
 for the map that shows that global elements are the same as natural
 transformations ([presheaf_enrichment_from_arr]).

 To prove the laws for the enrichment, our argument is again similar to
 how we prove the laws for the presheaf category. To prove equations of
 natural transformations, we compare them pointwise. By using the
 universal property of the equalizer and the product, we can compare
 morphisms into the hom object 'pointwise' as well. The uniqueness for
 morphisms into an equalizer, allows us to compare the transformations
 as morphisms into a product, and by the uniqueness of morphisms into
 the product, we compare them for every projection. Since these
 projections represent the components of our natural transformation,
 the argument proceeds by considering the natural transformations
 pointwise.

 Content
 1. Hom objects of presheaves
 2. The identity for the enrichment
 3. Composition for the enrichment
 4. Global elements versus natural transformations
 5. Laws of the enrichment
 6. Enrichment for the presheaf category

 **********************************************************************)
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Prelude.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Total.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.FunctorCategory.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Enrichment.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.EnrichmentFunctor.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.EnrichmentTransformation.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Examples.HomFunctor.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Examples.OppositeEnriched.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Examples.SelfEnriched.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Structure.Symmetric.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Structure.Closed.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.OppositeCategory.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.PrecategoryBinProduct.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Equalizers.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Products.

Import MonoidalNotations.

Local Open Scope cat.
Local Open Scope moncat.

Section PresheafEnrichment.
  Context (V : sym_mon_closed_cat)
          (C : category)
          (EqV : Equalizers V)
          (PV : Products C V)
          (PV' : Products (∑ (x y : C), x --> y) V).

  (** * 1. Hom objects of presheaves *)
  Definition presheaf_enrichment_hom_prod
             (F G : C ⟶ V)
    : V
    := PV (λ x, F x ⊸ G x).

  Definition presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_type
             (F G : C ⟶ V)
    : V
    := PV' (λ xyf, F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf)).

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
V ⟦ presheaf_enrichment_hom_prod F G,
presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_type F G ⟧

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
V ⟦ presheaf_enrichment_hom_prod F G,
presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_type F G ⟧

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
∏ i : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
V ⟦ presheaf_enrichment_hom_prod F G,
(λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
 F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf)) i ⟧

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
xyf: ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧
V ⟦ presheaf_enrichment_hom_prod F G,
(λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
 F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf)) xyf ⟧

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
xyf: ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧
x:= pr1 xyf: C
V ⟦ presheaf_enrichment_hom_prod F G,
(λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
 F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf)) xyf ⟧

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
xyf: ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧
x:= pr1 xyf: C
f:= pr22 xyf: (λ y : C, C ⟦ pr1 xyf, y ⟧) (pr12 xyf)
V ⟦ presheaf_enrichment_hom_prod F G,
(λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
 F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf)) xyf ⟧

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
xyf: ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧
x:= pr1 xyf: C
f:= pr22 xyf: (λ y : C, C ⟦ pr1 xyf, y ⟧) (pr12 xyf)
V ⟦ PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x),
F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf) ⟧

    exact (ProductPr _ _ _ x
           · mon_linvunitor _
           · internal_from_arr (#G f) #⊗ identity _
           · internal_comp _ _ _).
  Defined.

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
V ⟦ presheaf_enrichment_hom_prod F G,
presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_type F G ⟧

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
V ⟦ presheaf_enrichment_hom_prod F G,
presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_type F G ⟧

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
∏ i : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
V ⟦ presheaf_enrichment_hom_prod F G,
(λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
 F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf)) i ⟧

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
xyf: ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧
V ⟦ presheaf_enrichment_hom_prod F G,
(λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
 F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf)) xyf ⟧

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
xyf: ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧
y:= pr12 xyf: C
V ⟦ presheaf_enrichment_hom_prod F G,
(λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
 F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf)) xyf ⟧

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
xyf: ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧
y:= pr12 xyf: C
f:= pr22 xyf: (λ y : C, C ⟦ pr1 xyf, y ⟧) (pr12 xyf)
V ⟦ presheaf_enrichment_hom_prod F G,
(λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
 F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf)) xyf ⟧

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
xyf: ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧
y:= pr12 xyf: C
f:= pr22 xyf: (λ y : C, C ⟦ pr1 xyf, y ⟧) (pr12 xyf)
V ⟦ PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x),
F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf) ⟧

    exact (ProductPr _ _ _ y
           · mon_rinvunitor _
           · identity _ #⊗ internal_from_arr (#F f)
           · internal_comp _ _ _).
  Defined.

  Definition presheaf_enrichment_hom
             (F G : C ⟶ V)
    : Equalizer _ _
    := EqV
         _ _
         (presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_left F G)
         (presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_right F G).

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
 · presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_left F G
 · ProductPr (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
     (PV'
        (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
         F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf))) (x,, y,, f))
#⊗ identity (F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)))
· internal_eval (F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)))
    (G (pr12 (x,, y,, f))) =
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
 · presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_right F G
 · ProductPr (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
     (PV'
        (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
         F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf))) (x,, y,, f))
#⊗ identity (F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)))
· internal_eval (F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)))
    (G (pr12 (x,, y,, f)))

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
 · presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_left F G
 · ProductPr (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
     (PV'
        (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
         F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf))) (x,, y,, f))
#⊗ identity (F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)))
· internal_eval (F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)))
    (G (pr12 (x,, y,, f))) =
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
 · presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_right F G
 · ProductPr (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
     (PV'
        (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
         F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf))) (x,, y,, f))
#⊗ identity (F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)))
· internal_eval (F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)))
    (G (pr12 (x,, y,, f)))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
· presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_left F G =
EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
· presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_right F G

    apply EqualizerEqAr.
  Qed.

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)
#⊗ identity (F x) · internal_eval (F x) (G x) · # G f =
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y)
#⊗ identity (F x) · identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ # F f
· internal_eval (F y) (G y)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)
#⊗ identity (F x) · internal_eval (F x) (G x) · # G f =
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y)
#⊗ identity (F x) · identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ # F f
· internal_eval (F y) (G y)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)
#⊗ identity (F x) · internal_eval (F x) (G x) · # G f =
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
 · presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_left F G
 · ProductPr (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
     (PV'
        (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
         F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf))) (x,, y,, f))
#⊗ identity (F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)))
· internal_eval (F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)))
    (G (pr12 (x,, y,, f)))
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
 · presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_right F G
 · ProductPr (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
     (PV'
        (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
         F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf))) (x,, y,, f))
#⊗ identity (F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)))
· internal_eval (F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)))
    (G (pr12 (x,, y,, f))) =
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y)
#⊗ identity (F x) · identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ # F f
· internal_eval (F y) (G y)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)
#⊗ identity (F x) · internal_eval (F x) (G x) · # G f =
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
 · presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_left F G
 · ProductPr (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
     (PV'
        (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
         F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf))) (x,, y,, f))
#⊗ identity (F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)))
· internal_eval (F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)))
    (G (pr12 (x,, y,, f)))

 · presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_left F G
 · ProductPr (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V

V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
 · presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_left F G
 · ProductPr (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
     (PV'
        (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
         F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf))) (x,, y,, f))
#⊗ identity (F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)))
· internal_eval (F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)))
    (G (pr12 (x,, y,, f))) = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
?b =
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)
#⊗ identity (F x) · internal_eval (F x) (G x) · # G f

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat

EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
 · presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_left F G
 · ProductPr (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
     (PV'
        (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
         F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf))) (x,, y,, f))
#⊗ identity (F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)))
· internal_eval (F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)))
    (G (pr12 (x,, y,, f))) = ?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
 · presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_left F G
 · ProductPr (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
     (PV'
        (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
         F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf))) (x,, y,, f))
#⊗ identity (F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)))
· internal_eval (F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)))
    (G (pr12 (x,, y,, f))) = ?b0
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
?b0 = ?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
 · presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_left F G
 · ProductPr (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
     (PV'
        (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
         F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf))) (x,, y,, f))
#⊗ identity (F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)))
· internal_eval (F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)))
    (G (pr12 (x,, y,, f))) = ?b0

          
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
· presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_left F G
· ProductPr (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
    (PV'
       (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
        F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf))) (x,, y,, f) = 
?y'

          
V: sym_mon_closed_cat

EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
· ProductArrow (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
    (PV'
       (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
        F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf)))
    (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
     ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) (pr1 xyf)
     · mon_linvunitor (F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr1 xyf))
     · internal_from_arr (# G (pr22 xyf))
       #⊗ identity (F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr1 xyf))
     · internal_comp (F (pr1 xyf)) (G (pr1 xyf))
         (G (pr12 xyf)))
· ProductPr (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
    (PV'
       (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
        F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf))) (x,, y,, f) = 
?y'

EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
· (ProductArrow (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
     (PV'
        (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
         F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf)))
     (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
      ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x))
        (pr1 xyf)
      · mon_linvunitor (F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr1 xyf))
      · internal_from_arr (# G (pr22 xyf))
        #⊗ identity (F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr1 xyf))
      · internal_comp (F (pr1 xyf)) (G (pr1 xyf))
          (G (pr12 xyf)))
   · ProductPr (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
       (PV'
          (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
           F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf))) (x,, y,, f)) =
?y'

          
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ProductArrow (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
  (PV'
     (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
      F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf)))
  (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
   ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) (pr1 xyf)
   · mon_linvunitor (F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr1 xyf))
   · internal_from_arr (# G (pr22 xyf))
     #⊗ identity (F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr1 xyf))
   · internal_comp (F (pr1 xyf)) (G (pr1 xyf))
       (G (pr12 xyf)))
· ProductPr (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
    (PV'
       (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
        F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf))) (x,, y,, f) = 
?t2

          exact (ProductPrCommutes (∑ (x y : C), x --> y) V _ _ _ _ (x ,, y ,, f)).
        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
 · (ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x))
      (pr1 (x,, y,, f))
    · mon_linvunitor
        (F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⊸ G (pr1 (x,, y,, f)))
    · internal_from_arr (# G (pr22 (x,, y,, f)))
      #⊗ identity
           (F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⊸ G (pr1 (x,, y,, f)))
    · internal_comp (F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)))
        (G (pr1 (x,, y,, f))) (G (pr12 (x,, y,, f)))))
#⊗ identity (F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)))
· internal_eval (F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)))
    (G (pr12 (x,, y,, f))) = ?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
 · (ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x
    · mon_linvunitor (F x ⊸ G x)
    · internal_from_arr (# G f)
      #⊗ identity (F x ⊸ G x)
    · internal_comp (F x) (G x) (G y)))
#⊗ identity (F x) · internal_eval (F x) (G y) = ?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
#⊗ identity (F x)
· (ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x
   #⊗ identity (F x)
   · mon_linvunitor (F x ⊸ G x) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · (internal_from_arr (# G f)
      #⊗ identity (F x ⊸ G x)) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · internal_comp (F x) (G x) (G y) #⊗ identity (F x))
· internal_eval (F x) (G y) = ?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
#⊗ identity (F x)
· (ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x
   #⊗ identity (F x)
   · (mon_linvunitor (F x ⊸ G x) #⊗ identity (F x)
      · ((internal_from_arr (# G f)
          #⊗ identity (F x ⊸ G x)) #⊗ identity (F x)
         · (internal_comp (F x) (G x) (G y)
            #⊗ identity (F x)
            · internal_eval (F x) (G y))))) = ?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
#⊗ identity (F x)
· (ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x
   #⊗ identity (F x)
   · (mon_linvunitor (F x ⊸ G x) #⊗ identity (F x)
      · ((internal_from_arr (# G f)
          #⊗ identity (F x ⊸ G x)) #⊗ identity (F x)
         · (internal_lam
              (mon_lassociator (G x ⊸ G y) (F x ⊸ G x)
                 (F x)
               · identity (G x ⊸ G y)
                 #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (G x)
               · internal_eval (G x) (G y))
            #⊗ identity (F x)
            · internal_eval (F x) (G y))))) = ?b

F, G: C ⟶ V

f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
#⊗ identity (F x)
· (ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x
   #⊗ identity (F x)
   · (mon_linvunitor (F x ⊸ G x) #⊗ identity (F x)
      · ((internal_from_arr (# G f)
          #⊗ identity (F x ⊸ G x)) #⊗ identity (F x)
         · (mon_lassociator (G x ⊸ G y) (F x ⊸ G x)
              (F x)
            · identity (G x ⊸ G y)
              #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (G x)
            · internal_eval (G x) (G y))))) = ?b

x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
#⊗ identity (F x)
· (ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x
   #⊗ identity (F x)
   · (mon_linvunitor (F x ⊸ G x) #⊗ identity (F x)
      · ((internal_from_arr (# G f)
          #⊗ identity (F x ⊸ G x)) #⊗ identity (F x)
         · (mon_lassociator (G x ⊸ G y) (F x ⊸ G x)
              (F x)
            · identity (G x ⊸ G y)
              #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (G x)
            · internal_eval (G x) (G y))))) = ?b0

PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧

V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
#⊗ identity (F x)
· (ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x
   #⊗ identity (F x)
   · (mon_linvunitor (F x ⊸ G x) #⊗ identity (F x)
      · ((internal_from_arr (# G f)
          #⊗ identity (F x ⊸ G x)) #⊗ identity (F x)
         · (mon_lassociator (G x ⊸ G y) (F x ⊸ G x)
              (F x)
            · identity (G x ⊸ G y)
              #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (G x)
            · internal_eval (G x) (G y))))) = ?b0

          
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
(internal_from_arr (# G f) #⊗ identity (F x ⊸ G x))
#⊗ identity (F x)
· (mon_lassociator (G x ⊸ G y) (F x ⊸ G x) (F x)
   · identity (G x ⊸ G y) #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (G x)
   · internal_eval (G x) (G y)) = ?t2

EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
(internal_from_arr (# G f) #⊗ identity (F x ⊸ G x))
#⊗ identity (F x)
· mon_lassociator (G x ⊸ G y) (F x ⊸ G x) (F x)
· identity (G x ⊸ G y) #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (G x)
· internal_eval (G x) (G y) = ?t2

PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
mon_lassociator I_{ V} (F x ⊸ G x) (F x)
· internal_from_arr (# G f)
  #⊗ (identity (F x ⊸ G x) #⊗ identity (F x))
· identity (G x ⊸ G y) #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (G x)
· internal_eval (G x) (G y) = ?t2

· (internal_from_arr (# G f)
   #⊗ (identity (F x ⊸ G x) #⊗ identity (F x))
   · (identity (G x ⊸ G y)
      #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (G x)
      · internal_eval (G x) (G y))) = ?t2

· (identity (G x ⊸ G y) #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (G x)
   · internal_eval (G x) (G y)) = ?t2

#⊗ identity ((F x ⊸ G x) ⊗ F x)
· (identity (G x ⊸ G y) #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (G x)
   · internal_eval (G x) (G y)) = ?t2

#⊗ identity ((F x ⊸ G x) ⊗ F x)

· internal_eval (G x) (G y) = ?t2

PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (G x)
· (internal_lam (mon_lunitor (G x) · # G f)
   #⊗ identity (G x) · internal_eval (G x) (G y)) =
?t2

          
V: sym_mon_closed_cat

EqV: Equalizers V

x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (G x)
· (mon_lunitor (G x) · # G f) = ?t2

          
V: sym_mon_closed_cat

· mon_lunitor (G x) · # G f = ?t2

          
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V

x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
mon_lunitor ((F x ⊸ G x) ⊗ F x)
· internal_eval (F x) (G x) · # G f = ?t2

          apply idpath.
        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
#⊗ identity (F x)
· (ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x
   #⊗ identity (F x)
   · (mon_linvunitor (F x ⊸ G x) #⊗ identity (F x)
      · (mon_lassociator I_{ V} (F x ⊸ G x) (F x)
         · (mon_lunitor ((F x ⊸ G x) ⊗ F x)
            · internal_eval (F x) (G x) · # G f)))) =
?b

      · internal_eval (F x) (G x) · # G f)) = ?t2

V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
identity (F x ⊸ G x) #⊗ identity (F x) = ?y'

        apply tensor_id_id.
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
#⊗ identity (F x)
· (ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x
   #⊗ identity (F x)
   · (identity ((F x ⊸ G x) ⊗ F x)
      · internal_eval (F x) (G x) · # G f)) =
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)
#⊗ identity (F x) · internal_eval (F x) (G x) · # G f

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
#⊗ identity (F x)
· (ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x
   #⊗ identity (F x)
   · (internal_eval (F x) (G x) · # G f)) =
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)
#⊗ identity (F x) · internal_eval (F x) (G x) · # G f

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
#⊗ identity (F x)
· ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x
  #⊗ identity (F x) · internal_eval (F x) (G x)
· # G f =
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)
#⊗ identity (F x) · internal_eval (F x) (G x) · # G f

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)
#⊗ identity (F x) · internal_eval (F x) (G x) · # G f =
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)
#⊗ identity (F x) · internal_eval (F x) (G x) · # G f

      apply idpath.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
 · presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_right F G
 · ProductPr (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
     (PV'
        (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
         F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf))) (x,, y,, f))
#⊗ identity (F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)))
· internal_eval (F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)))
    (G (pr12 (x,, y,, f))) =
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y)
#⊗ identity (F x) · identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ # F f
· internal_eval (F y) (G y)
 
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
 · presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_right F G
 · ProductPr (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
     (PV'
        (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
         F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf))) (x,, y,, f))
#⊗ identity (F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)))
· internal_eval (F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)))
    (G (pr12 (x,, y,, f))) = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
?b =
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y)
#⊗ identity (F x) · identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ # F f
· internal_eval (F y) (G y)

PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V

x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
 · presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_right F G
 · ProductPr (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
     (PV'
        (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
         F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf))) (x,, y,, f))
#⊗ identity (F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)))
· internal_eval (F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)))
    (G (pr12 (x,, y,, f))) = ?b

 · presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_right F G
 · ProductPr (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V

· internal_eval (F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)))
    (G (pr12 (x,, y,, f))) = ?b0

EqV: Equalizers V

PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V

C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
 · presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_right F G
 · ProductPr (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
     (PV'
        (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
         F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf))) (x,, y,, f))
#⊗ identity (F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)))
· internal_eval (F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)))
    (G (pr12 (x,, y,, f))) = ?b0

          
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
· presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_right F G
· ProductPr (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
    (PV'
       (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
        F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf))) (x,, y,, f) = 
?y'

          
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
· ProductArrow (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
    (PV'
       (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
        F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf)))
    (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
     ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x))
       (pr12 xyf)
     · mon_rinvunitor (F (pr12 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf))
     · identity (F (pr12 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf))
       #⊗ internal_from_arr (# F (pr22 xyf))
     · internal_comp (F (pr1 xyf)) (F (pr12 xyf))
         (G (pr12 xyf)))
· ProductPr (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
    (PV'
       (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
        F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf))) (x,, y,, f) = 
?y'

          
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
· (ProductArrow (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
     (PV'
        (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
         F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf)))
     (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
      ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x))
        (pr12 xyf)
      · mon_rinvunitor (F (pr12 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf))
      · identity (F (pr12 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf))
        #⊗ internal_from_arr (# F (pr22 xyf))
      · internal_comp (F (pr1 xyf)) (F (pr12 xyf))
          (G (pr12 xyf)))
   · ProductPr (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
       (PV'
          (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
           F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf))) (x,, y,, f)) =
?y'

          
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ProductArrow (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
  (PV'
     (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
      F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf)))
  (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
   ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) (pr12 xyf)
   · mon_rinvunitor (F (pr12 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf))
   · identity (F (pr12 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf))
     #⊗ internal_from_arr (# F (pr22 xyf))
   · internal_comp (F (pr1 xyf)) (F (pr12 xyf))
       (G (pr12 xyf)))
· ProductPr (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
    (PV'
       (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
        F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf))) (x,, y,, f) = 
?t2

          exact (ProductPrCommutes (∑ (x y : C), x --> y) V _ _ _ _ (x ,, y ,, f)).
        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
 · (ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x))
      (pr12 (x,, y,, f))
    · mon_rinvunitor
        (F (pr12 (x,, y,, f)) ⊸ G (pr12 (x,, y,, f)))
    · identity
        (F (pr12 (x,, y,, f)) ⊸ G (pr12 (x,, y,, f)))
      #⊗ internal_from_arr (# F (pr22 (x,, y,, f)))
    · internal_comp (F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)))
        (F (pr12 (x,, y,, f))) (G (pr12 (x,, y,, f)))))
#⊗ identity (F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)))
· internal_eval (F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)))
    (G (pr12 (x,, y,, f))) = ?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
 · (ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y
    · mon_rinvunitor (F y ⊸ G y)
    · identity (F y ⊸ G y)
      #⊗ internal_from_arr (# F f)
    · internal_comp (F x) (F y) (G y)))
#⊗ identity (F x) · internal_eval (F x) (G y) = ?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
#⊗ identity (F x)
· (ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y
   #⊗ identity (F x)
   · mon_rinvunitor (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · (identity (F y ⊸ G y)
      #⊗ internal_from_arr (# F f)) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · internal_comp (F x) (F y) (G y) #⊗ identity (F x))
· internal_eval (F x) (G y) = ?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
#⊗ identity (F x)
· (ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y
   #⊗ identity (F x)
   · (mon_rinvunitor (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ identity (F x)
      · ((identity (F y ⊸ G y)
          #⊗ internal_from_arr (# F f))
         #⊗ identity (F x)
         · (internal_comp (F x) (F y) (G y)
            #⊗ identity (F x)
            · internal_eval (F x) (G y))))) = ?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
#⊗ identity (F x)
· (ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y
   #⊗ identity (F x)
   · (mon_rinvunitor (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ identity (F x)
      · ((identity (F y ⊸ G y)
          #⊗ internal_from_arr (# F f))
         #⊗ identity (F x)
         · (internal_lam
              (mon_lassociator (F y ⊸ G y) (F x ⊸ F y)
                 (F x)
               · identity (F y ⊸ G y)
                 #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (F y)
               · internal_eval (F y) (G y))
            #⊗ identity (F x)
            · internal_eval (F x) (G y))))) = ?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
#⊗ identity (F x)
· (ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y
   #⊗ identity (F x)
   · (mon_rinvunitor (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ identity (F x)
      · ((identity (F y ⊸ G y)
          #⊗ internal_from_arr (# F f))
         #⊗ identity (F x)
         · (mon_lassociator (F y ⊸ G y) (F x ⊸ F y)
              (F x)
            · identity (F y ⊸ G y)
              #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (F y)
            · internal_eval (F y) (G y))))) = ?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat

EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
#⊗ identity (F x)
· (ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y
   #⊗ identity (F x)
   · (mon_rinvunitor (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ identity (F x)
      · ((identity (F y ⊸ G y)
          #⊗ internal_from_arr (# F f))
         #⊗ identity (F x)
         · (mon_lassociator (F y ⊸ G y) (F x ⊸ F y)
              (F x)
            · identity (F y ⊸ G y)
              #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (F y)
            · internal_eval (F y) (G y))))) = ?b0
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
?b0 = ?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
#⊗ identity (F x)
· (ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y
   #⊗ identity (F x)
   · (mon_rinvunitor (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ identity (F x)
      · ((identity (F y ⊸ G y)
          #⊗ internal_from_arr (# F f))
         #⊗ identity (F x)
         · (mon_lassociator (F y ⊸ G y) (F x ⊸ F y)
              (F x)
            · identity (F y ⊸ G y)
              #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (F y)
            · internal_eval (F y) (G y))))) = ?b0

          
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
(identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ internal_from_arr (# F f))
#⊗ identity (F x)
· (mon_lassociator (F y ⊸ G y) (F x ⊸ F y) (F x)
   · identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (F y)
   · internal_eval (F y) (G y)) = ?t2

          
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
(identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ internal_from_arr (# F f))
#⊗ identity (F x)
· mon_lassociator (F y ⊸ G y) (F x ⊸ F y) (F x)
· identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (F y)
· internal_eval (F y) (G y) = ?t2

          
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
mon_lassociator (F y ⊸ G y) I_{ V} (F x)
· identity (F y ⊸ G y)
  #⊗ (internal_from_arr (# F f) #⊗ identity (F x))
· identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (F y)
· internal_eval (F y) (G y) = ?t2

          
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
mon_lassociator (F y ⊸ G y) I_{ V} (F x)
· (identity (F y ⊸ G y)
   #⊗ (internal_from_arr (# F f) #⊗ identity (F x))
   · (identity (F y ⊸ G y)
      #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (F y)
      · internal_eval (F y) (G y))) = ?t2

          
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
identity (F y ⊸ G y)
#⊗ (internal_from_arr (# F f) #⊗ identity (F x))
· (identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (F y)
   · internal_eval (F y) (G y)) = ?t2

          
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
identity (F y ⊸ G y)
#⊗ (internal_from_arr (# F f) #⊗ identity (F x))
· identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (F y)
· internal_eval (F y) (G y) = ?t2

          
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
identity (F y ⊸ G y)
#⊗ (internal_from_arr (# F f) #⊗ identity (F x)
    · internal_eval (F x) (F y))
· internal_eval (F y) (G y) = ?t2

          
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
identity (F y ⊸ G y)
#⊗ (internal_lam (mon_lunitor (F x) · # F f)
    #⊗ identity (F x) · internal_eval (F x) (F y))
· internal_eval (F y) (G y) = ?t2

          
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ (mon_lunitor (F x) · # F f)
· internal_eval (F y) (G y) = ?t2

          
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ mon_lunitor (F x)
· identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ # F f
· internal_eval (F y) (G y) = ?t2

          apply idpath.
        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
#⊗ identity (F x)
· (ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y
   #⊗ identity (F x)
   · (mon_rinvunitor (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ identity (F x)
      · (mon_lassociator (F y ⊸ G y) I_{ V} (F x)
         · (identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ mon_lunitor (F x)
            · identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ # F f
            · internal_eval (F y) (G y))))) = ?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
mon_rinvunitor (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ identity (F x)
· (mon_lassociator (F y ⊸ G y) I_{ V} (F x)
   · (identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ mon_lunitor (F x)
      · identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ # F f
      · internal_eval (F y) (G y))) = ?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
mon_rinvunitor (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ identity (F x)
· mon_lassociator (F y ⊸ G y) I_{ V} (F x)
· identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ mon_lunitor (F x)
· identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ # F f
· internal_eval (F y) (G y) = ?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
mon_rinvunitor (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ identity (F x)
· mon_lassociator (F y ⊸ G y) I_{ V} (F x)
· identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ mon_lunitor (F x) = ?y'

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
mon_rinvunitor (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ identity (F x)
· (mon_lassociator (F y ⊸ G y) I_{ V} (F x)
   · identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ mon_lunitor (F x)) = 
?y'

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
mon_rinvunitor (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ identity (F x)
· mon_runitor (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ identity (F x) = ?y'

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
(mon_rinvunitor (F y ⊸ G y) · mon_runitor (F y ⊸ G y))
#⊗ identity (F x) = ?y'

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ identity (F x) = ?y'

        apply tensor_id_id.
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
#⊗ identity (F x)
· (ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y
   #⊗ identity (F x)
   · (identity ((F y ⊸ G y) ⊗ F x)
      · identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ # F f
      · internal_eval (F y) (G y))) =
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y)
#⊗ identity (F x) · identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ # F f
· internal_eval (F y) (G y)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
#⊗ identity (F x)
· (ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y
   #⊗ identity (F x)
   · (identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ # F f
      · internal_eval (F y) (G y))) =
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y)
#⊗ identity (F x) · identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ # F f
· internal_eval (F y) (G y)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
#⊗ identity (F x)
· ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y
  #⊗ identity (F x) · identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ # F f
· internal_eval (F y) (G y) =
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y)
#⊗ identity (F x) · identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ # F f
· internal_eval (F y) (G y)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y)
#⊗ identity (F x) · identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ # F f
· internal_eval (F y) (G y) =
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y)
#⊗ identity (F x) · identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ # F f
· internal_eval (F y) (G y)

      apply idpath.
  Qed.

  (** * 2. The identity for the enrichment *)
  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F: C ⟶ V
V ⟦ I_{ V}, presheaf_enrichment_hom_prod F F ⟧

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F: C ⟶ V
V ⟦ I_{ V}, presheaf_enrichment_hom_prod F F ⟧

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F: C ⟶ V
∏ i : C, V ⟦ I_{ V}, F i ⊸ F i ⟧

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F: C ⟶ V
i: C
V ⟦ I_{ V}, F i ⊸ F i ⟧

    apply internal_id.
  Defined.

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F: C ⟶ V
presheaf_enrichment_id_data F
· presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_left F F =
presheaf_enrichment_id_data F
· presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_right F F

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F: C ⟶ V
presheaf_enrichment_id_data F
· presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_left F F =
presheaf_enrichment_id_data F
· presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_right F F

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F: C ⟶ V
∏ i : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
presheaf_enrichment_id_data F
· presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_left F F
· ProductPr (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
    (PV'
       (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
        F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ F (pr12 xyf))) i =
presheaf_enrichment_id_data F
· presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_right F F
· ProductPr (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
    (PV'
       (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
        F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ F (pr12 xyf))) i

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F: C ⟶ V
xyf: ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧
presheaf_enrichment_id_data F
· presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_left F F
· ProductPr (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
    (PV'
       (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
        F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ F (pr12 xyf))) xyf =
presheaf_enrichment_id_data F
· presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_right F F
· ProductPr (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
    (PV'
       (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
        F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ F (pr12 xyf))) xyf

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
presheaf_enrichment_id_data F
· presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_left F F
· ProductPr (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
    (PV'
       (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
        F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ F (pr12 xyf))) (x,, y,, f) =
presheaf_enrichment_id_data F
· presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_right F F
· ProductPr (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
    (PV'
       (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
        F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ F (pr12 xyf))) (x,, y,, f)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
presheaf_enrichment_id_data F
· ProductArrow (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
    (PV'
       (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
        F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ F (pr12 xyf)))
    (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
     ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ F x)) (pr1 xyf)
     · mon_linvunitor (F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ F (pr1 xyf))
     · internal_from_arr (# F (pr22 xyf))
       #⊗ identity (F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ F (pr1 xyf))
     · internal_comp (F (pr1 xyf)) (F (pr1 xyf))
         (F (pr12 xyf)))
· ProductPr (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
    (PV'
       (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
        F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ F (pr12 xyf))) (x,, y,, f) =
presheaf_enrichment_id_data F
· ProductArrow (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
    (PV'
       (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
        F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ F (pr12 xyf)))
    (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
     ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ F x))
       (pr12 xyf)
     · mon_rinvunitor (F (pr12 xyf) ⊸ F (pr12 xyf))
     · identity (F (pr12 xyf) ⊸ F (pr12 xyf))
       #⊗ internal_from_arr (# F (pr22 xyf))
     · internal_comp (F (pr1 xyf)) (F (pr12 xyf))
         (F (pr12 xyf)))
· ProductPr (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
    (PV'
       (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
        F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ F (pr12 xyf))) (x,, y,, f)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
presheaf_enrichment_id_data F
· (ProductArrow (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
     (PV'
        (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
         F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ F (pr12 xyf)))
     (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
      ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ F x))
        (pr1 xyf)
      · mon_linvunitor (F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ F (pr1 xyf))
      · internal_from_arr (# F (pr22 xyf))
        #⊗ identity (F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ F (pr1 xyf))
      · internal_comp (F (pr1 xyf)) (F (pr1 xyf))
          (F (pr12 xyf)))
   · ProductPr (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
       (PV'
          (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
           F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ F (pr12 xyf))) (x,, y,, f)) =
presheaf_enrichment_id_data F
· (ProductArrow (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
     (PV'
        (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
         F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ F (pr12 xyf)))
     (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
      ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ F x))
        (pr12 xyf)
      · mon_rinvunitor (F (pr12 xyf) ⊸ F (pr12 xyf))
      · identity (F (pr12 xyf) ⊸ F (pr12 xyf))
        #⊗ internal_from_arr (# F (pr22 xyf))
      · internal_comp (F (pr1 xyf)) (F (pr12 xyf))
          (F (pr12 xyf)))
   · ProductPr (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
       (PV'
          (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
           F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ F (pr12 xyf))) (x,, y,, f))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
presheaf_enrichment_id_data F
· (ProductArrow (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
     (PV'
        (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
         F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ F (pr12 xyf)))
     (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
      ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ F x))
        (pr1 xyf)
      · mon_linvunitor (F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ F (pr1 xyf))
      · internal_from_arr (# F (pr22 xyf))
        #⊗ identity (F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ F (pr1 xyf))
      · internal_comp (F (pr1 xyf)) (F (pr1 xyf))
          (F (pr12 xyf)))
   · ProductPr (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
       (PV'
          (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
           F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ F (pr12 xyf))) (x,, y,, f)) =
?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
?b =
presheaf_enrichment_id_data F
· (ProductArrow (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
     (PV'
        (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
         F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ F (pr12 xyf)))
     (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
      ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ F x))
        (pr12 xyf)
      · mon_rinvunitor (F (pr12 xyf) ⊸ F (pr12 xyf))
      · identity (F (pr12 xyf) ⊸ F (pr12 xyf))
        #⊗ internal_from_arr (# F (pr22 xyf))
      · internal_comp (F (pr1 xyf)) (F (pr12 xyf))
          (F (pr12 xyf)))
   · ProductPr (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
       (PV'
          (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
           F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ F (pr12 xyf))) (x,, y,, f))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
presheaf_enrichment_id_data F
· (ProductArrow (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
     (PV'
        (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
         F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ F (pr12 xyf)))
     (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
      ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ F x))
        (pr1 xyf)
      · mon_linvunitor (F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ F (pr1 xyf))
      · internal_from_arr (# F (pr22 xyf))
        #⊗ identity (F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ F (pr1 xyf))
      · internal_comp (F (pr1 xyf)) (F (pr1 xyf))
          (F (pr12 xyf)))
   · ProductPr (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
       (PV'
          (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
           F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ F (pr12 xyf))) (x,, y,, f)) =
?b

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ProductArrow (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
  (PV'
     (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
      F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ F (pr12 xyf)))
  (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
   ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ F x)) (pr1 xyf)
   · mon_linvunitor (F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ F (pr1 xyf))
   · internal_from_arr (# F (pr22 xyf))
     #⊗ identity (F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ F (pr1 xyf))
   · internal_comp (F (pr1 xyf)) (F (pr1 xyf))
       (F (pr12 xyf)))
· ProductPr (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
    (PV'
       (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
        F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ F (pr12 xyf))) (x,, y,, f) = 
?t2

      exact (ProductPrCommutes (∑ (x y : C), x --> y) V _ _ _ _ _).
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
presheaf_enrichment_id_data F
· (ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ F x))
     (pr1 (x,, y,, f))
   · mon_linvunitor
       (F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⊸ F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)))
   · internal_from_arr (# F (pr22 (x,, y,, f)))
     #⊗ identity
          (F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⊸ F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)))
   · internal_comp (F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)))
       (F (pr1 (x,, y,, f))) (F (pr12 (x,, y,, f)))) =
presheaf_enrichment_id_data F
· (ProductArrow (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
     (PV'
        (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
         F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ F (pr12 xyf)))
     (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
      ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ F x))
        (pr12 xyf)
      · mon_rinvunitor (F (pr12 xyf) ⊸ F (pr12 xyf))
      · identity (F (pr12 xyf) ⊸ F (pr12 xyf))
        #⊗ internal_from_arr (# F (pr22 xyf))
      · internal_comp (F (pr1 xyf)) (F (pr12 xyf))
          (F (pr12 xyf)))
   · ProductPr (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
       (PV'
          (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
           F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ F (pr12 xyf))) (x,, y,, f))

   · identity

V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
internal_id (F (pr12 (x,, y,, f)))
· mon_rinvunitor
    (F (pr12 (x,, y,, f)) ⊸ F (pr12 (x,, y,, f)))
· identity
    (F (pr12 (x,, y,, f)) ⊸ F (pr12 (x,, y,, f)))
  #⊗ internal_from_arr (# F (pr22 (x,, y,, f)))
· internal_comp (F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)))
    (F (pr12 (x,, y,, f))) (F (pr12 (x,, y,, f))) =
internal_id (F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)))
· mon_linvunitor
    (F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⊸ F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)))
· internal_from_arr (# F (pr22 (x,, y,, f)))
  #⊗ identity

V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
internal_id (F y) · mon_rinvunitor (F y ⊸ F y)
· identity (F y ⊸ F y) #⊗ internal_from_arr (# F f)
· internal_comp (F x) (F y) (F y) =
internal_id (F x) · mon_linvunitor (F x ⊸ F x)
· internal_from_arr (# F f) #⊗ identity (F x ⊸ F x)
· internal_comp (F x) (F x) (F y)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
∏ (a : V) (h : V ⟦ a, F x ⟧),
(internal_id (F y) · mon_rinvunitor (F y ⊸ F y)
 · identity (F y ⊸ F y) #⊗ internal_from_arr (# F f)
 · internal_comp (F x) (F y) (F y)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (F x) (F y) =
(internal_id (F x) · mon_linvunitor (F x ⊸ F x)
 · internal_from_arr (# F f) #⊗ identity (F x ⊸ F x)
 · internal_comp (F x) (F x) (F y)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (F x) (F y)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
(internal_id (F y) · mon_rinvunitor (F y ⊸ F y)
 · identity (F y ⊸ F y) #⊗ internal_from_arr (# F f)
 · internal_comp (F x) (F y) (F y)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (F x) (F y) =
(internal_id (F x) · mon_linvunitor (F x ⊸ F x)
 · internal_from_arr (# F f) #⊗ identity (F x ⊸ F x)
 · internal_comp (F x) (F x) (F y)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (F x) (F y)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
internal_id (F y) #⊗ h
· mon_rinvunitor (F y ⊸ F y) #⊗ identity (F x)
· (identity (F y ⊸ F y) #⊗ internal_from_arr (# F f))
  #⊗ identity (F x)
· internal_comp (F x) (F y) (F y) #⊗ identity (F x)
· internal_eval (F x) (F y) =
internal_id (F x) #⊗ h
· mon_linvunitor (F x ⊸ F x) #⊗ identity (F x)
· (internal_from_arr (# F f) #⊗ identity (F x ⊸ F x))
  #⊗ identity (F x)
· internal_comp (F x) (F x) (F y) #⊗ identity (F x)
· internal_eval (F x) (F y)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
internal_id (F y) #⊗ h
· (mon_rinvunitor (F y ⊸ F y) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · ((identity (F y ⊸ F y)
       #⊗ internal_from_arr (# F f)) #⊗ identity (F x)
      · (internal_comp (F x) (F y) (F y)
         #⊗ identity (F x) · internal_eval (F x) (F y)))) =
internal_id (F x) #⊗ h
· (mon_linvunitor (F x ⊸ F x) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · ((internal_from_arr (# F f)
       #⊗ identity (F x ⊸ F x)) #⊗ identity (F x)
      · (internal_comp (F x) (F x) (F y)
         #⊗ identity (F x) · internal_eval (F x) (F y))))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
internal_id (F y) #⊗ h
· (mon_rinvunitor (F y ⊸ F y) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · ((identity (F y ⊸ F y)
       #⊗ internal_from_arr (# F f)) #⊗ identity (F x)
      · (internal_lam
           (mon_lassociator (F y ⊸ F y) (F x ⊸ F y)
              (F x)
            · identity (F y ⊸ F y)
              #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (F y)
            · internal_eval (F y) (F y))
         #⊗ identity (F x) · internal_eval (F x) (F y)))) =
internal_id (F x) #⊗ h
· (mon_linvunitor (F x ⊸ F x) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · ((internal_from_arr (# F f)
       #⊗ identity (F x ⊸ F x)) #⊗ identity (F x)
      · (internal_lam
           (mon_lassociator (F x ⊸ F y) (F x ⊸ F x)
              (F x)
            · identity (F x ⊸ F y)
              #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (F x)
            · internal_eval (F x) (F y))
         #⊗ identity (F x) · internal_eval (F x) (F y))))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat

EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
internal_id (F y) #⊗ h
· (mon_rinvunitor (F y ⊸ F y) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · ((identity (F y ⊸ F y)
       #⊗ internal_from_arr (# F f)) #⊗ identity (F x)
      · (mon_lassociator (F y ⊸ F y) (F x ⊸ F y) (F x)
         · identity (F y ⊸ F y)
           #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (F y)
         · internal_eval (F y) (F y)))) =
internal_id (F x) #⊗ h
· (mon_linvunitor (F x ⊸ F x) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · ((internal_from_arr (# F f)
       #⊗ identity (F x ⊸ F x)) #⊗ identity (F x)
      · (mon_lassociator (F x ⊸ F y) (F x ⊸ F x) (F x)
         · identity (F x ⊸ F y)
           #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (F x)
         · internal_eval (F x) (F y))))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
internal_id (F y) #⊗ h
· (mon_rinvunitor (F y ⊸ F y) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · ((identity (F y ⊸ F y)
       #⊗ internal_from_arr (# F f)) #⊗ identity (F x)
      · (mon_lassociator (F y ⊸ F y) (F x ⊸ F y) (F x)
         · identity (F y ⊸ F y)
           #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (F y)
         · internal_eval (F y) (F y)))) = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
?b =
internal_id (F x) #⊗ h
· (mon_linvunitor (F x ⊸ F x) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · ((internal_from_arr (# F f)
       #⊗ identity (F x ⊸ F x)) #⊗ identity (F x)
      · (mon_lassociator (F x ⊸ F y) (F x ⊸ F x) (F x)
         · identity (F x ⊸ F y)
           #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (F x)
         · internal_eval (F x) (F y))))

PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
internal_id (F y) #⊗ h
· (mon_rinvunitor (F y ⊸ F y) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · ((identity (F y ⊸ F y)
       #⊗ internal_from_arr (# F f)) #⊗ identity (F x)
      · (mon_lassociator (F y ⊸ F y) (F x ⊸ F y) (F x)
         · identity (F y ⊸ F y)
           #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (F y)
         · internal_eval (F y) (F y)))) = ?b

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
(identity (F y ⊸ F y) #⊗ internal_from_arr (# F f))
#⊗ identity (F x)
· (mon_lassociator (F y ⊸ F y) (F x ⊸ F y) (F x)
   · identity (F y ⊸ F y) #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (F y)
   · internal_eval (F y) (F y)) = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
(identity (F y ⊸ F y) #⊗ internal_from_arr (# F f))
#⊗ identity (F x)
· mon_lassociator (F y ⊸ F y) (F x ⊸ F y) (F x)
· identity (F y ⊸ F y) #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (F y)
· internal_eval (F y) (F y) = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
mon_lassociator (F y ⊸ F y) I_{ V} (F x)
· identity (F y ⊸ F y)
  #⊗ (internal_from_arr (# F f) #⊗ identity (F x))
· identity (F y ⊸ F y) #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (F y)
· internal_eval (F y) (F y) = ?t2

F: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
mon_lassociator (F y ⊸ F y) I_{ V} (F x)
· (identity (F y ⊸ F y)
   #⊗ (internal_from_arr (# F f) #⊗ identity (F x))
   · (identity (F y ⊸ F y)
      #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (F y)
      · internal_eval (F y) (F y))) = ?t2

identity (F y ⊸ F y)
#⊗ (internal_from_arr (# F f) #⊗ identity (F x))
· (identity (F y ⊸ F y) #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (F y)
   · internal_eval (F y) (F y)) = ?t2

#⊗ (internal_from_arr (# F f) #⊗ identity (F x))

?y'

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat

PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F: C ⟶ V

a: V

#⊗ (internal_from_arr (# F f) #⊗ identity (F x)
    · internal_eval (F x) (F y)) = ?y'

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat

EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V

x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
identity (F y ⊸ F y)
#⊗ (internal_lam (mon_lunitor (F x) · # F f)
    #⊗ identity (F x) · internal_eval (F x) (F y)) =
?y'

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat

EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V

identity (F y ⊸ F y) #⊗ (mon_lunitor (F x) · # F f) =
?y'

      apply idpath.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F: C ⟶ V
x, y: C

a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
internal_id (F y) #⊗ h
· (mon_rinvunitor (F y ⊸ F y) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · (mon_lassociator (F y ⊸ F y) I_{ V} (F x)
      · (identity (F y ⊸ F y)
         #⊗ (mon_lunitor (F x) · # F f)
         · internal_eval (F y) (F y)))) =
internal_id (F x) #⊗ h
· (mon_linvunitor (F x ⊸ F x) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · ((internal_from_arr (# F f)
       #⊗ identity (F x ⊸ F x)) #⊗ identity (F x)

         · identity (F x ⊸ F y)

         · internal_eval (F x) (F y))))

      apply tensor_id_id.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
internal_id (F y) #⊗ h
· (identity ((F y ⊸ F y) ⊗ F x)
   · identity (F y ⊸ F y) #⊗ # F f
   · internal_eval (F y) (F y)) =
internal_id (F x) #⊗ h
· (mon_linvunitor (F x ⊸ F x) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · ((internal_from_arr (# F f)
       #⊗ identity (F x ⊸ F x)) #⊗ identity (F x)
      · (mon_lassociator (F x ⊸ F y) (F x ⊸ F x) (F x)
         · identity (F x ⊸ F y)
           #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (F x)
         · internal_eval (F x) (F y))))

a: V

internal_id (F y) #⊗ h
· (identity (F y ⊸ F y) #⊗ # F f
   · internal_eval (F y) (F y)) =
internal_id (F x) #⊗ h
· (mon_linvunitor (F x ⊸ F x) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · ((internal_from_arr (# F f)
       #⊗ identity (F x ⊸ F x)) #⊗ identity (F x)
      · (mon_lassociator (F x ⊸ F y) (F x ⊸ F x) (F x)
         · identity (F x ⊸ F y)
           #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (F x)
         · internal_eval (F x) (F y))))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
internal_id (F y) #⊗ h
· (identity (F y ⊸ F y) #⊗ # F f
   · internal_eval (F y) (F y)) = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
?b =
internal_id (F x) #⊗ h
· (mon_linvunitor (F x ⊸ F x) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · ((internal_from_arr (# F f)
       #⊗ identity (F x ⊸ F x)) #⊗ identity (F x)
      · (mon_lassociator (F x ⊸ F y) (F x ⊸ F x) (F x)
         · identity (F x ⊸ F y)
           #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (F x)
         · internal_eval (F x) (F y))))

EqV: Equalizers V

F: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
internal_id (F y) #⊗ h
· (identity (F y ⊸ F y) #⊗ # F f
   · internal_eval (F y) (F y)) = ?b

internal_id (F y) #⊗ h · identity (F y ⊸ F y) #⊗ # F f
· internal_eval (F y) (F y) = ?b

h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
(internal_id (F y) · identity (F y ⊸ F y))
#⊗ (h · # F f) · internal_eval (F y) (F y) = ?b

   · identity (F x ⊸ F y) #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (F x)
   · internal_eval (F x) (F y)) = ?t2

V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧

· (identity ((F x ⊸ F x) ⊗ F x)
   · internal_eval (F x) (F x) · # F f) =
identity I_{ V} #⊗ (h · # F f) · mon_lunitor (F y)
