C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h
· internal_id (F x) #⊗ identity (F x)
· internal_eval (F x) (F x) · # F f =
identity I_{ V} #⊗ (h · # F f) · mon_lunitor (F y)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h
· internal_lam (mon_lunitor (F x)) #⊗ identity (F x)
· internal_eval (F x) (F x) · # F f =
identity I_{ V} #⊗ (h · # F f) · mon_lunitor (F y)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h
· (internal_lam (mon_lunitor (F x)) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · (internal_eval (F x) (F x) · # F f)) =
identity I_{ V} #⊗ (h · # F f) · mon_lunitor (F y)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h
· (internal_lam (mon_lunitor (F x)) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · (internal_eval (F x) (F x) · # F f)) = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
?b =
identity I_{ V} #⊗ (h · # F f) · mon_lunitor (F y)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h
· (internal_lam (mon_lunitor (F x)) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · (internal_eval (F x) (F x) · # F f)) = ?b

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
internal_lam (mon_lunitor (F x)) #⊗ identity (F x)
· (internal_eval (F x) (F x) · # F f) = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
internal_lam (mon_lunitor (F x)) #⊗ identity (F x)
· internal_eval (F x) (F x) · # F f = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
mon_lunitor (F x) · # F f = ?t2

      apply idpath.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h · (mon_lunitor (F x) · # F f) =
identity I_{ V} #⊗ (h · # F f) · mon_lunitor (F y)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h
· (identity I_{ V} #⊗ # F f · mon_lunitor (F y)) =
identity I_{ V} #⊗ (h · # F f) · mon_lunitor (F y)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h · identity I_{ V} #⊗ # F f
· mon_lunitor (F y) =
identity I_{ V} #⊗ (h · # F f) · mon_lunitor (F y)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ (h · # F f) · mon_lunitor (F y) =
identity I_{ V} #⊗ (h · # F f) · mon_lunitor (F y)

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F: C ⟶ V
V ⟦ I_{ V}, presheaf_enrichment_hom F F ⟧

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F: C ⟶ V
V ⟦ I_{ V}, presheaf_enrichment_hom F F ⟧

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F: C ⟶ V
V ⟦ I_{ V}, presheaf_enrichment_hom_prod F F ⟧
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F: C ⟶ V
?h · presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_left F F =
?h · presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_right F F

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F: C ⟶ V
V ⟦ I_{ V}, presheaf_enrichment_hom_prod F F ⟧
 exact (presheaf_enrichment_id_data F).
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F: C ⟶ V
presheaf_enrichment_id_data F
· presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_left F F =
presheaf_enrichment_id_data F
· presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_right F F
 exact (presheaf_enrichment_id_laws F).
  Defined.

  (** * 3. Composition for the enrichment *)
  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
V
⟦ presheaf_enrichment_hom G H
  ⊗ presheaf_enrichment_hom F G,
presheaf_enrichment_hom_prod F H ⟧

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
V
⟦ presheaf_enrichment_hom G H
  ⊗ presheaf_enrichment_hom F G,
presheaf_enrichment_hom_prod F H ⟧

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
∏ i : C,
V
⟦ presheaf_enrichment_hom G H
  ⊗ presheaf_enrichment_hom F G,
(λ x : C, F x ⊸ H x) i ⟧

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x: C
V
⟦ presheaf_enrichment_hom G H
  ⊗ presheaf_enrichment_hom F G, F x ⊸ H x ⟧

    exact ((EqualizerArrow _ · ProductPr _ _ _ x) #⊗ (EqualizerArrow _ · ProductPr _ _ _ x)
           · internal_comp _ _ _).
  Defined.

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F G H
· presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_left F H =
presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F G H
· presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_right F H

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F G H
· presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_left F H =
presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F G H
· presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_right F H

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
∏ i : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F G H
· presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_left F H
· ProductPr (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
    (PV'
       (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
        F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ H (pr12 xyf))) i =
presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F G H
· presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_right F H
· ProductPr (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
    (PV'
       (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
        F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ H (pr12 xyf))) i

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
xyf: ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧
presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F G H
· presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_left F H
· ProductPr (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
    (PV'
       (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
        F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ H (pr12 xyf))) xyf =
presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F G H
· presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_right F H
· ProductPr (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
    (PV'
       (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
        F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ H (pr12 xyf))) xyf

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
xyf: ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧
presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F G H
· presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_left F H
· ProductPr (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
    (PV'
       (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
        F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ H (pr12 xyf))) xyf = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
xyf: ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧
?b =
presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F G H
· presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_right F H
· ProductPr (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
    (PV'
       (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
        F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ H (pr12 xyf))) xyf

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
xyf: ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧
presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F G H
· presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_left F H
· ProductPr (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
    (PV'
       (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
        F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ H (pr12 xyf))) xyf = ?b

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
xyf: ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧
presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F G H
· (presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_left F H
   · ProductPr (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
       (PV'
          (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
           F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ H (pr12 xyf))) xyf) = ?b

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
xyf: ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧
presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_left F H
· ProductPr (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
    (PV'
       (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
        F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ H (pr12 xyf))) xyf = ?t2

      exact (ProductPrCommutes (∑ (x y : C), x --> y) V _ _ _ _ _).
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
xyf: ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧
presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F G H
· (let x := pr1 xyf in
   let f := pr22 xyf in
   (ProductPr C V (PV (λ x0 : C, F x0 ⊸ H x0)) x
    · mon_linvunitor ((λ x0 : C, F x0 ⊸ H x0) x)
    · internal_from_arr (# H f)
      #⊗ identity ((λ x0 : C, F x0 ⊸ H x0) x)
    · internal_comp (F x) (H (pr1 xyf)) (H (pr12 xyf))
    :
    V ⟦ PV (λ x0 : C, F x0 ⊸ H x0),
    F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ H (pr12 xyf) ⟧)
   :
   V ⟦ presheaf_enrichment_hom_prod F H,
   (λ xyf : ∑ x0 y : C, C ⟦ x0, y ⟧,
    F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ H (pr12 xyf)) xyf ⟧) =
presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F G H
· presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_right F H
· ProductPr (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
    (PV'
       (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
        F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ H (pr12 xyf))) xyf

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
xyf: ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧
presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F G H
· (ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ H x)) (pr1 xyf)
   · mon_linvunitor (F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ H (pr1 xyf))
   · internal_from_arr (# H (pr22 xyf))
     #⊗ identity (F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ H (pr1 xyf))
   · internal_comp (F (pr1 xyf)) (H (pr1 xyf))
       (H (pr12 xyf))) =
presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F G H
· presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_right F H
· ProductPr (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
    (PV'
       (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
        F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ H (pr12 xyf))) xyf

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
xyf: ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧
presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F G H
· (ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ H x)) (pr1 xyf)
   · mon_linvunitor (F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ H (pr1 xyf))
   · internal_from_arr (# H (pr22 xyf))
     #⊗ identity (F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ H (pr1 xyf))
   · internal_comp (F (pr1 xyf)) (H (pr1 xyf))
       (H (pr12 xyf))) = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
xyf: ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧
?b =
presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F G H
· presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_right F H
· ProductPr (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
    (PV'
       (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
        F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ H (pr12 xyf))) xyf

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
xyf: ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧
presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F G H
· (ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ H x)) (pr1 xyf)
   · mon_linvunitor (F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ H (pr1 xyf))
   · internal_from_arr (# H (pr22 xyf))
     #⊗ identity (F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ H (pr1 xyf))
   · internal_comp (F (pr1 xyf)) (H (pr1 xyf))
       (H (pr12 xyf))) = ?b

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
xyf: ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧
presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F G H
· ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ H x)) (pr1 xyf)
· mon_linvunitor (F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ H (pr1 xyf))
· internal_from_arr (# H (pr22 xyf))
  #⊗ identity (F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ H (pr1 xyf))
· internal_comp (F (pr1 xyf)) (H (pr1 xyf))
    (H (pr12 xyf)) = ?b

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
xyf: ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ProductArrow C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ H x))
  (λ x : C,
   (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
    · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x0 : C, G x0 ⊸ H x0)) x)
   #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
       · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x0 : C, F x0 ⊸ G x0)) x)
   · internal_comp (F x) (G x) (H x))
· ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ H x)) (pr1 xyf)
· mon_linvunitor (F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ H (pr1 xyf))
· internal_from_arr (# H (pr22 xyf))
  #⊗ identity (F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ H (pr1 xyf))
· internal_comp (F (pr1 xyf)) (H (pr1 xyf))
    (H (pr12 xyf)) = ?b

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
xyf: ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ProductArrow C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ H x))
  (λ x : C,
   (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
    · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x0 : C, G x0 ⊸ H x0)) x)
   #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
       · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x0 : C, F x0 ⊸ G x0)) x)
   · internal_comp (F x) (G x) (H x))
· ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ H x)) (pr1 xyf) =
?y'

      exact (ProductPrCommutes C V _ _ _ _ _).
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
xyf: ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) (pr1 xyf))
#⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
    · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x))
        (pr1 xyf))
· internal_comp (F (pr1 xyf)) (G (pr1 xyf))
    (H (pr1 xyf))
· mon_linvunitor (F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ H (pr1 xyf))
· internal_from_arr (# H (pr22 xyf))
  #⊗ identity (F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ H (pr1 xyf))
· internal_comp (F (pr1 xyf)) (H (pr1 xyf))
    (H (pr12 xyf)) =
presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F G H
· presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_right F H
· ProductPr (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
    (PV'
       (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
        F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ H (pr12 xyf))) xyf

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
xyf: ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧
presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F G H
· presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_right F H
· ProductPr (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
    (PV'
       (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
        F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ H (pr12 xyf))) xyf =
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) (pr1 xyf))
#⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
    · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x))
        (pr1 xyf))
· internal_comp (F (pr1 xyf)) (G (pr1 xyf))
    (H (pr1 xyf))
· mon_linvunitor (F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ H (pr1 xyf))
· internal_from_arr (# H (pr22 xyf))
  #⊗ identity (F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ H (pr1 xyf))
· internal_comp (F (pr1 xyf)) (H (pr1 xyf))
    (H (pr12 xyf))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
xyf: ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧
presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F G H
· presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_right F H
· ProductPr (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
    (PV'
       (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
        F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ H (pr12 xyf))) xyf = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
xyf: ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧
?b =
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) (pr1 xyf))
#⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
    · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x))
        (pr1 xyf))
· internal_comp (F (pr1 xyf)) (G (pr1 xyf))
    (H (pr1 xyf))
· mon_linvunitor (F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ H (pr1 xyf))
· internal_from_arr (# H (pr22 xyf))
  #⊗ identity (F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ H (pr1 xyf))
· internal_comp (F (pr1 xyf)) (H (pr1 xyf))
    (H (pr12 xyf))

xyf: ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧
presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F G H
· presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_right F H
· ProductPr (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
    (PV'
       (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
        F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ H (pr12 xyf))) xyf = ?b

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
xyf: ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧
presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F G H
· (presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_right F H
   · ProductPr (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
       (PV'
          (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
           F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ H (pr12 xyf))) xyf) = ?b

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
xyf: ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧
presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_right F H
· ProductPr (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
    (PV'
       (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
        F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ H (pr12 xyf))) xyf = ?t2

      exact (ProductPrCommutes (∑ (x y : C), x --> y) V _ _ _ _ _).
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
xyf: ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧
presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F G H
· (let y := pr12 xyf in
   let f := pr22 xyf in
   (ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ H x)) y
    · mon_rinvunitor ((λ x : C, F x ⊸ H x) y)
    · identity ((λ x : C, F x ⊸ H x) y)
      #⊗ internal_from_arr (# F f)
    · internal_comp (F (pr1 xyf)) (F (pr12 xyf)) (H y)
    :
    V ⟦ PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ H x),
    F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ H (pr12 xyf) ⟧)
   :
   V ⟦ presheaf_enrichment_hom_prod F H,
   (λ xyf : ∑ x y0 : C, C ⟦ x, y0 ⟧,
    F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ H (pr12 xyf)) xyf ⟧) =
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) (pr1 xyf))
#⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
    · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x))
        (pr1 xyf))
· internal_comp (F (pr1 xyf)) (G (pr1 xyf))
    (H (pr1 xyf))
· mon_linvunitor (F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ H (pr1 xyf))
· internal_from_arr (# H (pr22 xyf))
  #⊗ identity (F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ H (pr1 xyf))
· internal_comp (F (pr1 xyf)) (H (pr1 xyf))
    (H (pr12 xyf))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
xyf: ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧
presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F G H
· (ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ H x)) (pr12 xyf)
   · mon_rinvunitor (F (pr12 xyf) ⊸ H (pr12 xyf))
   · identity (F (pr12 xyf) ⊸ H (pr12 xyf))
     #⊗ internal_from_arr (# F (pr22 xyf))
   · internal_comp (F (pr1 xyf)) (F (pr12 xyf))
       (H (pr12 xyf))) =
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) (pr1 xyf))
#⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
    · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x))
        (pr1 xyf))
· internal_comp (F (pr1 xyf)) (G (pr1 xyf))
    (H (pr1 xyf))
· mon_linvunitor (F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ H (pr1 xyf))
· internal_from_arr (# H (pr22 xyf))
  #⊗ identity (F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ H (pr1 xyf))
· internal_comp (F (pr1 xyf)) (H (pr1 xyf))
    (H (pr12 xyf))

EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
xyf: ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧
presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F G H
· (ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ H x)) (pr12 xyf)
   · mon_rinvunitor (F (pr12 xyf) ⊸ H (pr12 xyf))
   · identity (F (pr12 xyf) ⊸ H (pr12 xyf))
     #⊗ internal_from_arr (# F (pr22 xyf))
   · internal_comp (F (pr1 xyf)) (F (pr12 xyf))
       (H (pr12 xyf))) = ?b

xyf: ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧
?b =
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) (pr1 xyf))
#⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
    · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x))

V: sym_mon_closed_cat

EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V

F, G, H: C ⟶ V
xyf: ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧
presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F G H
· ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ H x)) (pr12 xyf)
· mon_rinvunitor (F (pr12 xyf) ⊸ H (pr12 xyf))
· identity (F (pr12 xyf) ⊸ H (pr12 xyf))
  #⊗ internal_from_arr (# F (pr22 xyf))

V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
xyf: ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ProductArrow C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ H x))
  (λ x : C,
   (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
    · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x0 : C, G x0 ⊸ H x0)) x)
   #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
       · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x0 : C, F x0 ⊸ G x0)) x)
   · internal_comp (F x) (G x) (H x))
· ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ H x)) (pr12 xyf)
· mon_rinvunitor (F (pr12 xyf) ⊸ H (pr12 xyf))
· identity (F (pr12 xyf) ⊸ H (pr12 xyf))
  #⊗ internal_from_arr (# F (pr22 xyf))
· internal_comp (F (pr1 xyf)) (F (pr12 xyf))
    (H (pr12 xyf)) = ?b

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
xyf: ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ProductArrow C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ H x))
  (λ x : C,
   (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
    · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x0 : C, G x0 ⊸ H x0)) x)
   #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
       · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x0 : C, F x0 ⊸ G x0)) x)
   · internal_comp (F x) (G x) (H x))
· ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ H x)) (pr12 xyf) =
?y'

      exact (ProductPrCommutes C V _ _ _ _ _).
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
xyf: ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) (pr12 xyf))
#⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
    · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x))
        (pr12 xyf))
· internal_comp (F (pr12 xyf)) (G (pr12 xyf))
    (H (pr12 xyf))
· mon_rinvunitor (F (pr12 xyf) ⊸ H (pr12 xyf))
· identity (F (pr12 xyf) ⊸ H (pr12 xyf))
  #⊗ internal_from_arr (# F (pr22 xyf))
· internal_comp (F (pr1 xyf)) (F (pr12 xyf))
    (H (pr12 xyf)) =
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) (pr1 xyf))
#⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
    · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x))
        (pr1 xyf))
· internal_comp (F (pr1 xyf)) (G (pr1 xyf))
    (H (pr1 xyf))
· mon_linvunitor (F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ H (pr1 xyf))

  #⊗ identity (F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ H (pr1 xyf))

    (H (pr12 xyf))

 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) (pr1 xyf))
#⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
    · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x))

    (H (pr1 xyf))

V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
xyf: ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧
∏ (a : V) (h : V ⟦ a, F (pr1 xyf) ⟧),
((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
  · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) (pr1 xyf))
 #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x))
         (pr1 xyf))
 · internal_comp (F (pr1 xyf)) (G (pr1 xyf))
     (H (pr1 xyf))
 · mon_linvunitor (F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ H (pr1 xyf))
 · internal_from_arr (# H (pr22 xyf))
   #⊗ identity (F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ H (pr1 xyf))
 · internal_comp (F (pr1 xyf)) (H (pr1 xyf))
     (H (pr12 xyf))) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (F (pr1 xyf)) (H (pr12 xyf)) =
((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
  · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) (pr12 xyf))
 #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x))
         (pr12 xyf))
 · internal_comp (F (pr12 xyf)) (G (pr12 xyf))
     (H (pr12 xyf))
 · mon_rinvunitor (F (pr12 xyf) ⊸ H (pr12 xyf))
 · identity (F (pr12 xyf) ⊸ H (pr12 xyf))
   #⊗ internal_from_arr (# F (pr22 xyf))
 · internal_comp (F (pr1 xyf)) (F (pr12 xyf))
     (H (pr12 xyf))) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (F (pr1 xyf)) (H (pr12 xyf))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
xyf: ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 xyf) ⟧
((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
  · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) (pr1 xyf))
 #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x))
         (pr1 xyf))
 · internal_comp (F (pr1 xyf)) (G (pr1 xyf))
     (H (pr1 xyf))
 · mon_linvunitor (F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ H (pr1 xyf))
 · internal_from_arr (# H (pr22 xyf))
   #⊗ identity (F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ H (pr1 xyf))
 · internal_comp (F (pr1 xyf)) (H (pr1 xyf))
     (H (pr12 xyf))) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (F (pr1 xyf)) (H (pr12 xyf)) =
((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
  · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) (pr12 xyf))
 #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x))
         (pr12 xyf))
 · internal_comp (F (pr12 xyf)) (G (pr12 xyf))
     (H (pr12 xyf))
 · mon_rinvunitor (F (pr12 xyf) ⊸ H (pr12 xyf))
 · identity (F (pr12 xyf) ⊸ H (pr12 xyf))
   #⊗ internal_from_arr (# F (pr22 xyf))
 · internal_comp (F (pr1 xyf)) (F (pr12 xyf))
     (H (pr12 xyf))) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (F (pr1 xyf)) (H (pr12 xyf))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
  · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) x)
 #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)
 · internal_comp (F x) (G x) (H x)
 · mon_linvunitor (F x ⊸ H x)
 · internal_from_arr (# H f) #⊗ identity (F x ⊸ H x)
 · internal_comp (F x) (H x) (H y)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (F x) (H y) =
((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
  · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) y)
 #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y)
 · internal_comp (F y) (G y) (H y)
 · mon_rinvunitor (F y ⊸ H y)
 · identity (F y ⊸ H y) #⊗ internal_from_arr (# F f)
 · internal_comp (F x) (F y) (H y)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (F x) (H y)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
 #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x))
#⊗ h
· (ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) x
   #⊗ identity (F x ⊸ G x)) #⊗ identity (F x)
· internal_comp (F x) (G x) (H x) #⊗ identity (F x)
· mon_linvunitor (F x ⊸ H x) #⊗ identity (F x)
· (internal_from_arr (# H f) #⊗ identity (F x ⊸ H x))
  #⊗ identity (F x)
· internal_comp (F x) (H x) (H y) #⊗ identity (F x)
· internal_eval (F x) (H y) =
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
 #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y))
#⊗ h
· (ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) y
   #⊗ identity (F y ⊸ G y)) #⊗ identity (F x)
· internal_comp (F y) (G y) (H y) #⊗ identity (F x)
· mon_rinvunitor (F y ⊸ H y) #⊗ identity (F x)
· (identity (F y ⊸ H y) #⊗ internal_from_arr (# F f))
  #⊗ identity (F x)
· internal_comp (F x) (F y) (H y) #⊗ identity (F x)
· internal_eval (F x) (H y)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
 #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x))
#⊗ h
· ((ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) x
    #⊗ identity (F x ⊸ G x)) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · (internal_comp (F x) (G x) (H x)
      #⊗ identity (F x)
      · (mon_linvunitor (F x ⊸ H x) #⊗ identity (F x)
         · ((internal_from_arr (# H f)
             #⊗ identity (F x ⊸ H x))
            #⊗ identity (F x)
            · (internal_comp (F x) (H x) (H y)
               #⊗ identity (F x)
               · internal_eval (F x) (H y)))))) =
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
 #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y))
#⊗ h
· ((ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) y
    #⊗ identity (F y ⊸ G y)) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · (internal_comp (F y) (G y) (H y)
      #⊗ identity (F x)
      · (mon_rinvunitor (F y ⊸ H y) #⊗ identity (F x)
         · ((identity (F y ⊸ H y)
             #⊗ internal_from_arr (# F f))
            #⊗ identity (F x)
            · (internal_comp (F x) (F y) (H y)
               #⊗ identity (F x)
               · internal_eval (F x) (H y))))))

?b

· internal_eval (F x) (H y) = ?t2

      apply internal_beta.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
 #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x))
#⊗ h
· ((ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) x
    #⊗ identity (F x ⊸ G x)) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · (internal_comp (F x) (G x) (H x)
      #⊗ identity (F x)
      · (mon_linvunitor (F x ⊸ H x) #⊗ identity (F x)
         · ((internal_from_arr (# H f)
             #⊗ identity (F x ⊸ H x))
            #⊗ identity (F x)
            · (mon_lassociator (H x ⊸ H y) (F x ⊸ H x)
                 (F x)
               · identity (H x ⊸ H y)
                 #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (H x)
               · internal_eval (H x) (H y)))))) =
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
 #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y))
#⊗ h
· ((ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) y
    #⊗ identity (F y ⊸ G y)) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · (internal_comp (F y) (G y) (H y)
      #⊗ identity (F x)
      · (mon_rinvunitor (F y ⊸ H y) #⊗ identity (F x)
         · ((identity (F y ⊸ H y)
             #⊗ internal_from_arr (# F f))
            #⊗ identity (F x)
            · (internal_comp (F x) (F y) (H y)
               #⊗ identity (F x)
               · internal_eval (F x) (H y))))))

PV: Products C V

     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y))
#⊗ h
· ((ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) y
    #⊗ identity (F y ⊸ G y)) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · (internal_comp (F y) (G y) (H y)
      #⊗ identity (F x)

             #⊗ internal_from_arr (# F f))
            #⊗ identity (F x)

 #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x))
#⊗ h
· ((ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) x
    #⊗ identity (F x ⊸ G x)) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · (internal_comp (F x) (G x) (H x)
      #⊗ identity (F x)
      · (mon_linvunitor (F x ⊸ H x) #⊗ identity (F x)
         · ((internal_from_arr (# H f)

V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
(internal_from_arr (# H f) #⊗ identity (F x ⊸ H x))
#⊗ identity (F x)
· (mon_lassociator (H x ⊸ H y) (F x ⊸ H x) (F x)
   · identity (H x ⊸ H y) #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (H x)
   · internal_eval (H x) (H y)) = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
(internal_from_arr (# H f) #⊗ identity (F x ⊸ H x))
#⊗ identity (F x)
· mon_lassociator (H x ⊸ H y) (F x ⊸ H x) (F x)
· identity (H x ⊸ H y) #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (H x)
· internal_eval (H x) (H y) = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
mon_lassociator I_{ V} (F x ⊸ H x) (F x)
· internal_from_arr (# H f)
  #⊗ (identity (F x ⊸ H x) #⊗ identity (F x))
· identity (H x ⊸ H y) #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (H x)
· internal_eval (H x) (H y) = ?t2

a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
mon_lassociator I_{ V} (F x ⊸ H x) (F x)
· (internal_from_arr (# H f)
   #⊗ (identity (F x ⊸ H x) #⊗ identity (F x))
   · (identity (H x ⊸ H y)
      #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (H x)
      · internal_eval (H x) (H y))) = ?t2

EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V

F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧

h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧

· internal_from_arr (# H f) #⊗ identity (H x)
· internal_eval (H x) (H y) = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V

· (internal_from_arr (# H f) #⊗ identity (H x)

V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (H x)
· (internal_lam (mon_lunitor (H x) · # H f)
   #⊗ identity (H x) · internal_eval (H x) (H y)) =
?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat

EqV: Equalizers V

a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (H x)
· (mon_lunitor (H x) · # H f) = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat

EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V

· mon_lunitor (H x) · # H f = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
mon_lunitor ((F x ⊸ H x) ⊗ F x)
· internal_eval (F x) (H x) · # H f = ?t2

      apply idpath.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
 #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x))
#⊗ h
· ((ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) x
    #⊗ identity (F x ⊸ G x)) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · (internal_comp (F x) (G x) (H x)
      #⊗ identity (F x)
      · (mon_linvunitor (F x ⊸ H x) #⊗ identity (F x)
         · (mon_lassociator I_{ V} (F x ⊸ H x) (F x)
            · (mon_lunitor ((F x ⊸ H x) ⊗ F x)
               · internal_eval (F x) (H x) · # H f))))) =
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
 #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y))
#⊗ h
· ((ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) y
    #⊗ identity (F y ⊸ G y)) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · (internal_comp (F y) (G y) (H y)
      #⊗ identity (F x)
      · (mon_rinvunitor (F y ⊸ H y) #⊗ identity (F x)
         · ((identity (F y ⊸ H y)
             #⊗ internal_from_arr (# F f))
            #⊗ identity (F x)
            · (internal_comp (F x) (F y) (H y)
               #⊗ identity (F x)
               · internal_eval (F x) (H y))))))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
 #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x))
#⊗ h
· ((ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) x
    #⊗ identity (F x ⊸ G x)) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · (internal_comp (F x) (G x) (H x)
      #⊗ identity (F x)
      · (mon_linvunitor (F x ⊸ H x) #⊗ identity (F x)
         · (mon_lassociator I_{ V} (F x ⊸ H x) (F x)
            · (mon_lunitor ((F x ⊸ H x) ⊗ F x)
               · internal_eval (F x) (H x) · # H f))))) =
?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
?b =
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
 #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y))
#⊗ h
· ((ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) y
    #⊗ identity (F y ⊸ G y)) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · (internal_comp (F y) (G y) (H y)
      #⊗ identity (F x)
      · (mon_rinvunitor (F y ⊸ H y) #⊗ identity (F x)
         · ((identity (F y ⊸ H y)
             #⊗ internal_from_arr (# F f))
            #⊗ identity (F x)
            · (internal_comp (F x) (F y) (H y)
               #⊗ identity (F x)
               · internal_eval (F x) (H y))))))

a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧

 #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x))
#⊗ h
· ((ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) x
    #⊗ identity (F x ⊸ G x)) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · (internal_comp (F x) (G x) (H x)
      #⊗ identity (F x)
      · (mon_linvunitor (F x ⊸ H x) #⊗ identity (F x)
         · (mon_lassociator I_{ V} (F x ⊸ H x) (F x)
            · (mon_lunitor ((F x ⊸ H x) ⊗ F x)
               · internal_eval (F x) (H x) · # H f))))) =
?b

EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
mon_linvunitor (F x ⊸ H x) #⊗ identity (F x)
· (mon_lassociator I_{ V} (F x ⊸ H x) (F x)
   · (mon_lunitor ((F x ⊸ H x) ⊗ F x)
      · internal_eval (F x) (H x) · # H f)) = ?t2

· internal_eval (F x) (H x) · # H f = ?t2

V: sym_mon_closed_cat

PV: Products C V

      apply tensor_id_id.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
 #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x))
#⊗ h
· ((ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) x
    #⊗ identity (F x ⊸ G x)) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · (internal_comp (F x) (G x) (H x)
      #⊗ identity (F x)
      · (identity ((F x ⊸ H x) ⊗ F x)
         · internal_eval (F x) (H x) · # H f))) =
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
 #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y))
#⊗ h
· ((ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) y
    #⊗ identity (F y ⊸ G y)) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · (internal_comp (F y) (G y) (H y)
      #⊗ identity (F x)
      · (mon_rinvunitor (F y ⊸ H y) #⊗ identity (F x)
         · ((identity (F y ⊸ H y)
             #⊗ internal_from_arr (# F f))
            #⊗ identity (F x)
            · (internal_comp (F x) (F y) (H y)
               #⊗ identity (F x)
               · internal_eval (F x) (H y))))))

     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x))
#⊗ h

    #⊗ identity (F x ⊸ G x)) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · (internal_comp (F x) (G x) (H x)
      #⊗ identity (F x)
      · (internal_eval (F x) (H x) · # H f))) =
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
 #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y))
#⊗ h
· ((ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) y
    #⊗ identity (F y ⊸ G y)) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · (internal_comp (F y) (G y) (H y)
      #⊗ identity (F x)

         · ((identity (F y ⊸ H y)
             #⊗ internal_from_arr (# F f))
            #⊗ identity (F x)
            · (internal_comp (F x) (F y) (H y)
               #⊗ identity (F x)
               · internal_eval (F x) (H y))))))

V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
 #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x))
#⊗ h
· ((ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) x
    #⊗ identity (F x ⊸ G x)) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · (mon_lassociator (G x ⊸ H x) (F x ⊸ G x) (F x)
      · identity (G x ⊸ H x)
        #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (G x)
      · internal_eval (G x) (H x) · # H f)) =
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
 #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y))
#⊗ h
· ((ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) y
    #⊗ identity (F y ⊸ G y)) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · (internal_comp (F y) (G y) (H y)
      #⊗ identity (F x)
      · (mon_rinvunitor (F y ⊸ H y) #⊗ identity (F x)
         · ((identity (F y ⊸ H y)
             #⊗ internal_from_arr (# F f))
            #⊗ identity (F x)
            · (internal_comp (F x) (F y) (H y)
               #⊗ identity (F x)
               · internal_eval (F x) (H y))))))

    #⊗ identity (F x ⊸ G x)) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · (mon_lassociator (G x ⊸ H x) (F x ⊸ G x) (F x)
      · identity (G x ⊸ H x)
        #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (G x)
      · internal_eval (G x) (H x) · # H f)) = ?b

EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧

 #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y))
#⊗ h
· ((ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) y
    #⊗ identity (F y ⊸ G y)) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · (internal_comp (F y) (G y) (H y)
      #⊗ identity (F x)
      · (mon_rinvunitor (F y ⊸ H y) #⊗ identity (F x)
         · ((identity (F y ⊸ H y)
             #⊗ internal_from_arr (# F f))
            #⊗ identity (F x)

               #⊗ identity (F x)
               · internal_eval (F x) (H y))))))

h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧

 #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x))
#⊗ h
· ((ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) x
    #⊗ identity (F x ⊸ G x)) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · (mon_lassociator (G x ⊸ H x) (F x ⊸ G x) (F x)
      · identity (G x ⊸ H x)
        #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (G x)
      · internal_eval (G x) (H x) · # H f)) = ?b

PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V

#⊗ h
· (ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) x
   #⊗ identity (F x ⊸ G x)) #⊗ identity (F x)
· mon_lassociator (G x ⊸ H x) (F x ⊸ G x) (F x)
· identity (G x ⊸ H x) #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (G x)
· internal_eval (G x) (H x) · # H f = ?b

#⊗ h
· (ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) x
   #⊗ identity (F x ⊸ G x)) #⊗ identity (F x)
· mon_lassociator (G x ⊸ H x) (F x ⊸ G x) (F x) =

 #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x))
#⊗ h
· mon_lassociator (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x))
    (F x ⊸ G x) (F x)
· ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) x
  #⊗ (identity (F x ⊸ G x) #⊗ identity (F x)) = ?y'

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
mon_lassociator (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
  (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G) a
· EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
  #⊗ ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
       · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)
      #⊗ h)
· ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) x
  #⊗ (identity (F x ⊸ G x) #⊗ identity (F x)) = ?y'

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat

EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
mon_lassociator (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
  (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G) a
· (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
   #⊗ ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
        · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)
       #⊗ h)
   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) x
     #⊗ (identity (F x ⊸ G x) #⊗ identity (F x))) =
?y'

EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
#⊗ ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x) #⊗ h)
· ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) x
  #⊗ (identity (F x ⊸ G x) #⊗ identity (F x)) = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
#⊗ ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x) #⊗ h)
· ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) x
  #⊗ identity ((F x ⊸ G x) ⊗ F x) = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) x)
#⊗ ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x) #⊗ h
    · identity ((F x ⊸ G x) ⊗ F x)) = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) x)
#⊗ ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x) #⊗ h) =
?t2

      apply idpath.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
mon_lassociator (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
  (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G) a
· (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) x)
  #⊗ ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
       · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)
      #⊗ h)
· identity (G x ⊸ H x) #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (G x)
· internal_eval (G x) (H x) · # H f =
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
 #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y))
#⊗ h
· ((ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) y
    #⊗ identity (F y ⊸ G y)) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · (internal_comp (F y) (G y) (H y)
      #⊗ identity (F x)
      · (mon_rinvunitor (F y ⊸ H y) #⊗ identity (F x)
         · ((identity (F y ⊸ H y)
             #⊗ internal_from_arr (# F f))
            #⊗ identity (F x)
            · (internal_comp (F x) (F y) (H y)
               #⊗ identity (F x)
               · internal_eval (F x) (H y))))))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
 #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y))
#⊗ h
· ((ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) y
    #⊗ identity (F y ⊸ G y)) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · (internal_comp (F y) (G y) (H y)
      #⊗ identity (F x)
      · (mon_rinvunitor (F y ⊸ H y) #⊗ identity (F x)
         · ((identity (F y ⊸ H y)
             #⊗ internal_from_arr (# F f))
            #⊗ identity (F x)
            · (internal_comp (F x) (F y) (H y)
               #⊗ identity (F x)
               · internal_eval (F x) (H y)))))) =
mon_lassociator (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
  (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G) a
· (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) x)
  #⊗ ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
       · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)
      #⊗ h)
· identity (G x ⊸ H x) #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (G x)
· internal_eval (G x) (H x) · # H f

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V

(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
 #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y))
#⊗ h
· ((ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) y
    #⊗ identity (F y ⊸ G y)) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · (internal_comp (F y) (G y) (H y)
      #⊗ identity (F x)
      · (mon_rinvunitor (F y ⊸ H y) #⊗ identity (F x)
         · ((identity (F y ⊸ H y)
             #⊗ internal_from_arr (# F f))
            #⊗ identity (F x)
            · (internal_comp (F x) (F y) (H y)
               #⊗ identity (F x)
               · internal_eval (F x) (H y)))))) = 
?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
?b =
mon_lassociator (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
  (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G) a
· (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) x)
  #⊗ ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
       · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)
      #⊗ h)
· identity (G x ⊸ H x) #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (G x)
· internal_eval (G x) (H x) · # H f

V: sym_mon_closed_cat

EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
internal_comp (F x) (F y) (H y) #⊗ identity (F x)
· internal_eval (F x) (H y) = ?t2

      apply internal_beta.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
 #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y))
#⊗ h
· ((ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) y
    #⊗ identity (F y ⊸ G y)) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · (internal_comp (F y) (G y) (H y)
      #⊗ identity (F x)
      · (mon_rinvunitor (F y ⊸ H y) #⊗ identity (F x)
         · ((identity (F y ⊸ H y)
             #⊗ internal_from_arr (# F f))
            #⊗ identity (F x)
            · (mon_lassociator (F y ⊸ H y) (F x ⊸ F y)
                 (F x)
               · identity (F y ⊸ H y)
                 #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (F y)
               · internal_eval (F y) (H y)))))) =
mon_lassociator (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
  (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G) a
· (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) x)
  #⊗ ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
       · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)
      #⊗ h)
· identity (G x ⊸ H x) #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (G x)
· internal_eval (G x) (H x) · # H f

PV: Products C V

F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
?b =

  (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G) a
· (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) x)
  #⊗ ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
       · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)
      #⊗ h)

EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
 #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y))
#⊗ h
· ((ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) y
    #⊗ identity (F y ⊸ G y)) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · (internal_comp (F y) (G y) (H y)
      #⊗ identity (F x)
      · (mon_rinvunitor (F y ⊸ H y) #⊗ identity (F x)
         · ((identity (F y ⊸ H y)

            #⊗ identity (F x)

                 (F x)

                 #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (F y)
               · internal_eval (F y) (H y)))))) =

V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
(identity (F y ⊸ H y) #⊗ internal_from_arr (# F f))
#⊗ identity (F x)
· (mon_lassociator (F y ⊸ H y) (F x ⊸ F y) (F x)
   · identity (F y ⊸ H y) #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (F y)
   · internal_eval (F y) (H y)) = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
(identity (F y ⊸ H y) #⊗ internal_from_arr (# F f))
#⊗ identity (F x)
· mon_lassociator (F y ⊸ H y) (F x ⊸ F y) (F x)
· identity (F y ⊸ H y) #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (F y)
· internal_eval (F y) (H y) = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
mon_lassociator (F y ⊸ H y) I_{ V} (F x)
· identity (F y ⊸ H y)
  #⊗ (internal_from_arr (# F f) #⊗ identity (F x))
· identity (F y ⊸ H y) #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (F y)
· internal_eval (F y) (H y) = ?t2

· (identity (F y ⊸ H y)
   #⊗ (internal_from_arr (# F f) #⊗ identity (F x))
   · (identity (F y ⊸ H y)
      #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (F y)
      · internal_eval (F y) (H y))) = ?t2

?y'

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
identity (F y ⊸ H y) #⊗ mon_lunitor (F x)
· identity (F y ⊸ H y) #⊗ # F f = ?y'

      apply idpath.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
 #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y))
#⊗ h
· ((ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) y
    #⊗ identity (F y ⊸ G y)) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · (internal_comp (F y) (G y) (H y)
      #⊗ identity (F x)
      · (mon_rinvunitor (F y ⊸ H y) #⊗ identity (F x)
         · (mon_lassociator (F y ⊸ H y) I_{ V} (F x)
            · (identity (F y ⊸ H y)
               #⊗ mon_lunitor (F x)
               · identity (F y ⊸ H y) #⊗ # F f
               · internal_eval (F y) (H y)))))) =
mon_lassociator (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
  (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G) a
· (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) x)
  #⊗ ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
       · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)
      #⊗ h)
· identity (G x ⊸ H x) #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (G x)
· internal_eval (G x) (H x) · # H f

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
 #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y))
#⊗ h
· ((ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) y
    #⊗ identity (F y ⊸ G y)) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · (internal_comp (F y) (G y) (H y)
      #⊗ identity (F x)
      · (mon_rinvunitor (F y ⊸ H y) #⊗ identity (F x)
         · (mon_lassociator (F y ⊸ H y) I_{ V} (F x)
            · (identity (F y ⊸ H y)
               #⊗ mon_lunitor (F x)
               · identity (F y ⊸ H y) #⊗ # F f
               · internal_eval (F y) (H y)))))) = 
?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
?b =
mon_lassociator (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
  (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G) a
· (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) x)
  #⊗ ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
       · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)
      #⊗ h)
· identity (G x ⊸ H x) #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (G x)
· internal_eval (G x) (H x) · # H f

EqV: Equalizers V

PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
 #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y))
#⊗ h
· ((ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) y
    #⊗ identity (F y ⊸ G y)) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · (internal_comp (F y) (G y) (H y)
      #⊗ identity (F x)
      · (mon_rinvunitor (F y ⊸ H y) #⊗ identity (F x)
         · (mon_lassociator (F y ⊸ H y) I_{ V} (F x)
            · (identity (F y ⊸ H y)
               #⊗ mon_lunitor (F x)
               · identity (F y ⊸ H y) #⊗ # F f
               · internal_eval (F y) (H y)))))) = 
?b

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
mon_rinvunitor (F y ⊸ H y) #⊗ identity (F x)
· (mon_lassociator (F y ⊸ H y) I_{ V} (F x)
   · (identity (F y ⊸ H y) #⊗ mon_lunitor (F x)
      · identity (F y ⊸ H y) #⊗ # F f
      · internal_eval (F y) (H y))) = ?t2

h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
mon_rinvunitor (F y ⊸ H y) #⊗ identity (F x)
· mon_lassociator (F y ⊸ H y) I_{ V} (F x)
· identity (F y ⊸ H y) #⊗ mon_lunitor (F x)
· identity (F y ⊸ H y) #⊗ # F f
· internal_eval (F y) (H y) = ?t2

· mon_lassociator (F y ⊸ H y) I_{ V} (F x)
· identity (F y ⊸ H y) #⊗ mon_lunitor (F x) = ?y'

   · identity (F y ⊸ H y) #⊗ mon_lunitor (F x)) =

V: sym_mon_closed_cat

EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V

V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V

identity (F y ⊸ H y) #⊗ identity (F x) = ?y'

      apply tensor_id_id.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
 #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y))
#⊗ h
· ((ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) y
    #⊗ identity (F y ⊸ G y)) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · (internal_comp (F y) (G y) (H y)
      #⊗ identity (F x)
      · (identity ((F y ⊸ H y) ⊗ F x)
         · identity (F y ⊸ H y) #⊗ # F f
         · internal_eval (F y) (H y)))) =
mon_lassociator (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
  (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G) a
· (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) x)
  #⊗ ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
       · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)
      #⊗ h)
· identity (G x ⊸ H x) #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (G x)
· internal_eval (G x) (H x) · # H f

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
 #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y))
#⊗ h
· ((ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) y
    #⊗ identity (F y ⊸ G y)) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · (internal_comp (F y) (G y) (H y)
      #⊗ identity (F x)
      · (identity (F y ⊸ H y) #⊗ # F f
         · internal_eval (F y) (H y)))) =
mon_lassociator (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
  (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G) a
· (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) x)
  #⊗ ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
       · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)
      #⊗ h)
· identity (G x ⊸ H x) #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (G x)
· internal_eval (G x) (H x) · # H f

#⊗ h
· ((ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) y
    #⊗ identity (F y ⊸ G y)) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · (internal_comp (F y) (G y) (H y)
      #⊗ identity (F x)
      · (identity (F y ⊸ H y) #⊗ # F f
         · internal_eval (F y) (H y)))) = ?b

· internal_eval (F y) (H y) = ?t2

      apply internal_beta.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
 #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y))
#⊗ h
· ((ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) y
    #⊗ identity (F y ⊸ G y)) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · (identity ((G y ⊸ H y) ⊗ (F y ⊸ G y)) #⊗ # F f
      · (mon_lassociator (G y ⊸ H y) (F y ⊸ G y) (F y)
         · identity (G y ⊸ H y)
           #⊗ internal_eval (F y) (G y)
         · internal_eval (G y) (H y)))) =
mon_lassociator (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
  (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G) a
· (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) x)
  #⊗ ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
       · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)
      #⊗ h)
· identity (G x ⊸ H x) #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (G x)
· internal_eval (G x) (H x) · # H f

C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
 #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y))
#⊗ h
· ((ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) y
    #⊗ identity (F y ⊸ G y)) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · (identity ((G y ⊸ H y) ⊗ (F y ⊸ G y)) #⊗ # F f
      · (mon_lassociator (G y ⊸ H y) (F y ⊸ G y) (F y)
         · identity (G y ⊸ H y)
           #⊗ internal_eval (F y) (G y)
         · internal_eval (G y) (H y)))) = ?b

C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
?b =
mon_lassociator (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
  (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G) a
· (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) x)
  #⊗ ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
       · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)
      #⊗ h)
· identity (G x ⊸ H x) #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (G x)

C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
 #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y))
#⊗ h
· ((ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) y
    #⊗ identity (F y ⊸ G y)) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · (identity ((G y ⊸ H y) ⊗ (F y ⊸ G y)) #⊗ # F f
      · (mon_lassociator (G y ⊸ H y) (F y ⊸ G y) (F y)
         · identity (G y ⊸ H y)
           #⊗ internal_eval (F y) (G y)
         · internal_eval (G y) (H y)))) = ?b

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
 #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y))
#⊗ h
· (ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) y
   #⊗ identity (F y ⊸ G y)) #⊗ identity (F x)
· identity ((G y ⊸ H y) ⊗ (F y ⊸ G y)) #⊗ # F f
· mon_lassociator (G y ⊸ H y) (F y ⊸ G y) (F y)
· identity (G y ⊸ H y) #⊗ internal_eval (F y) (G y)
· internal_eval (G y) (H y) = ?b

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
 #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y))
#⊗ h
· (ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) y
   #⊗ identity (F y ⊸ G y)) #⊗ identity (F x)
· identity ((G y ⊸ H y) ⊗ (F y ⊸ G y)) #⊗ # F f
· mon_lassociator (G y ⊸ H y) (F y ⊸ G y) (F y) = 
?y'

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat

EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
 #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y))
#⊗ h
· ((ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) y
    #⊗ identity (F y ⊸ G y)) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · (identity ((G y ⊸ H y) ⊗ (F y ⊸ G y)) #⊗ # F f
      · mon_lassociator (G y ⊸ H y) (F y ⊸ G y) (F y))) =
?y'

 #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y))
#⊗ h
· ((ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) y
    #⊗ identity (F y ⊸ G y)) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · ((identity (G y ⊸ H y) #⊗ identity (F y ⊸ G y))
      #⊗ # F f
      · mon_lassociator (G y ⊸ H y) (F y ⊸ G y) (F y))) =

#⊗ h
· ((ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) y

   · (mon_lassociator (G y ⊸ H y) (F y ⊸ G y) (F x)
      · identity (G y ⊸ H y)
        #⊗ (identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ # F f))) = ?y'

· (ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) y
   #⊗ identity (F y ⊸ G y)) #⊗ identity (F x)
· mon_lassociator (G y ⊸ H y) (F y ⊸ G y) (F x)
· identity (G y ⊸ H y)
  #⊗ (identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ # F f) = ?y'

V: sym_mon_closed_cat

EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
 #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y))
#⊗ h
· mon_lassociator (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x))
    (F y ⊸ G y) (F x)
· ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) y
  #⊗ (identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ identity (F x)) = ?y'

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
mon_lassociator (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
  (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G) a
· EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
  #⊗ ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
       · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y)
      #⊗ h)
· ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) y
  #⊗ (identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ identity (F x)) = ?y'

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
mon_lassociator (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
  (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G) a
· (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
   #⊗ ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
        · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y)
       #⊗ h)
   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) y
     #⊗ (identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ identity (F x))) =
?y'

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
#⊗ ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y) #⊗ h)
· ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) y
  #⊗ (identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ identity (F x)) = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
#⊗ ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y) #⊗ h)
· ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) y
  #⊗ identity ((F y ⊸ G y) ⊗ F x) = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) y)
#⊗ ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y) #⊗ h
    · identity ((F y ⊸ G y) ⊗ F x)) = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) y)
#⊗ ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y) #⊗ h) =
?t2

      apply idpath.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
mon_lassociator (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
  (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G) a
· (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) y)
  #⊗ ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
       · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y)
      #⊗ h)
· identity (G y ⊸ H y)
  #⊗ (identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ # F f)
· identity (G y ⊸ H y) #⊗ internal_eval (F y) (G y)
· internal_eval (G y) (H y) =
mon_lassociator (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
  (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G) a
· (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) x)
  #⊗ ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
       · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)
      #⊗ h)
· identity (G x ⊸ H x) #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (G x)
· internal_eval (G x) (H x) · # H f

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
mon_lassociator (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
  (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G) a
· ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
    · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) y)
   #⊗ ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
        · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y)
       #⊗ h)
   · (identity (G y ⊸ H y)
      #⊗ (identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ # F f)
      · (identity (G y ⊸ H y)
         #⊗ internal_eval (F y) (G y)
         · internal_eval (G y) (H y)))) =
mon_lassociator (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
  (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G) a
· ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
    · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) x)
   #⊗ ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
        · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)
       #⊗ h)
   · (identity (G x ⊸ H x)
      #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (G x)
      · (internal_eval (G x) (H x) · # H f)))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) y)
#⊗ ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y) #⊗ h)
· (identity (G y ⊸ H y)
   #⊗ (identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ # F f)
   · (identity (G y ⊸ H y)
      #⊗ internal_eval (F y) (G y)
      · internal_eval (G y) (H y))) =
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) x)
#⊗ ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x) #⊗ h)
· (identity (G x ⊸ H x) #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (G x)
   · (internal_eval (G x) (H x) · # H f))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) x)
#⊗ ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x) #⊗ h)
· (identity (G x ⊸ H x) #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (G x)
   · (internal_eval (G x) (H x) · # H f)) =
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) y)
#⊗ ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y) #⊗ h)
· (identity (G y ⊸ H y)
   #⊗ (identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ # F f)
   · (identity (G y ⊸ H y)
      #⊗ internal_eval (F y) (G y)
      · internal_eval (G y) (H y)))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) x)
#⊗ ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x) #⊗ h)
· (identity (G x ⊸ H x) #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (G x)
   · (internal_eval (G x) (H x) · # H f)) = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
?b =
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) y)
#⊗ ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y) #⊗ h)
· (identity (G y ⊸ H y)
   #⊗ (identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ # F f)
   · (identity (G y ⊸ H y)
      #⊗ internal_eval (F y) (G y)
      · internal_eval (G y) (H y)))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) x)
#⊗ ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x) #⊗ h)
· (identity (G x ⊸ H x) #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (G x)
   · (internal_eval (G x) (H x) · # H f)) = ?b

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
#⊗ ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x) #⊗ h)
· (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) x)
  #⊗ identity ((F x ⊸ G x) ⊗ F x)
· (identity (G x ⊸ H x) #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (G x)
   · (internal_eval (G x) (H x) · # H f)) = ?b

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
#⊗ ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x) #⊗ h)
· ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
    · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) x)
   #⊗ identity ((F x ⊸ G x) ⊗ F x)
   · (identity (G x ⊸ H x)
      #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (G x)
      · (internal_eval (G x) (H x) · # H f))) = ?b

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) x)
#⊗ identity ((F x ⊸ G x) ⊗ F x)
· (identity (G x ⊸ H x) #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (G x)
   · (internal_eval (G x) (H x) · # H f)) = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) x)
#⊗ identity ((F x ⊸ G x) ⊗ F x)
· identity (G x ⊸ H x) #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (G x)
· internal_eval (G x) (H x) · # H f = ?t2

x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧

 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) x)
#⊗ internal_eval (F x) (G x)
· internal_eval (G x) (H x) · # H f = ?t2

x, y: C

#⊗ internal_eval (F x) (G x)
· (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) x)
  #⊗ identity (G x) · internal_eval (G x) (H x)
· # H f = ?t2

F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
#⊗ internal_eval (F x) (G x)
· ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
    · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) x)
   #⊗ identity (G x)
   · (internal_eval (G x) (H x) · # H f)) = ?t2

EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) x)
#⊗ identity (G x)
· (internal_eval (G x) (H x) · # H f) = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) x)
#⊗ identity (G x) · internal_eval (G x) (H x) · # H f =
?t2

      exact (presheaf_enrichment_naturality G H f).
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
#⊗ ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x) #⊗ h)
· (identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
   #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (G x)
   · ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
       · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) y)
      #⊗ identity (G x)
      · identity (G y ⊸ H y) #⊗ # G f
      · internal_eval (G y) (H y))) =
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) y)
#⊗ ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y) #⊗ h)
· (identity (G y ⊸ H y)
   #⊗ (identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ # F f)
   · (identity (G y ⊸ H y)
      #⊗ internal_eval (F y) (G y)
      · internal_eval (G y) (H y)))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
#⊗ ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x) #⊗ h)
· (identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
   #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (G x)
   · ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
       · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) y)
      #⊗ identity (G x)
      · identity (G y ⊸ H y) #⊗ # G f
      · internal_eval (G y) (H y))) = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
?b =
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) y)
#⊗ ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y) #⊗ h)
· (identity (G y ⊸ H y)
   #⊗ (identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ # F f)
   · (identity (G y ⊸ H y)
      #⊗ internal_eval (F y) (G y)
      · internal_eval (G y) (H y)))
