EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
#⊗ ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x) #⊗ h)
· (identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
   #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (G x)
   · ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
       · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) y)
      #⊗ identity (G x)
      · identity (G y ⊸ H y) #⊗ # G f
      · internal_eval (G y) (H y))) = ?b

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat

PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
#⊗ ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x) #⊗ h)
· identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
  #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (G x)
· (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) y)
  #⊗ identity (G x) · identity (G y ⊸ H y) #⊗ # G f
· internal_eval (G y) (H y) = ?b

F, G, H: C ⟶ V

     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x) #⊗ h
    · internal_eval (F x) (G x))

  #⊗ identity (G x) · identity (G y ⊸ H y) #⊗ # G f
· internal_eval (G y) (H y) = ?b

F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V

 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) y)
#⊗ ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x) #⊗ h
    · internal_eval (F x) (G x))
· identity (G y ⊸ H y) #⊗ # G f
· internal_eval (G y) (H y) = ?b

F, G, H: C ⟶ V

 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) y)

       · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)
      #⊗ h · internal_eval (F x) (G x))
· identity (G y ⊸ H y) #⊗ # G f

  #⊗ identity (F x) · internal_eval (F x) (G x)

· ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
    · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)
   #⊗ identity (F x)
   · (internal_eval (F x) (G x) · # G f)) = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat

EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)
#⊗ identity (F x)
· (internal_eval (F x) (G x) · # G f) = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)
#⊗ identity (F x) · internal_eval (F x) (G x) · # G f =
?t2

      exact (presheaf_enrichment_naturality F G f).
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) y)
#⊗ identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G ⊗ a)
· (identity (G y ⊸ H y)
   #⊗ (identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G) #⊗ h
       · ((EqualizerArrow
             (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
           · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y)
          #⊗ identity (F x)
          · identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ # F f
          · internal_eval (F y) (G y)))
   · internal_eval (G y) (H y)) =
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) y)
#⊗ ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y) #⊗ h)
· (identity (G y ⊸ H y)
   #⊗ (identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ # F f)
   · (identity (G y ⊸ H y)
      #⊗ internal_eval (F y) (G y)
      · internal_eval (G y) (H y)))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) y)
#⊗ identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G ⊗ a)
· identity (G y ⊸ H y)
  #⊗ (identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G) #⊗ h
      · (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
         · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y)
        #⊗ identity (F x)
      · identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ # F f
      · internal_eval (F y) (G y))
· internal_eval (G y) (H y) =
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) y)
#⊗ ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y) #⊗ h)
· identity (G y ⊸ H y)
  #⊗ (identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ # F f)
· identity (G y ⊸ H y) #⊗ internal_eval (F y) (G y)
· internal_eval (G y) (H y)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) y)
#⊗ identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G ⊗ a)
· identity (G y ⊸ H y)
  #⊗ (identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G) #⊗ h
      · (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
         · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y)
        #⊗ identity (F x)
      · identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ # F f
      · internal_eval (F y) (G y)) =
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) y)
#⊗ ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y) #⊗ h)
· identity (G y ⊸ H y)
  #⊗ (identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ # F f)
· identity (G y ⊸ H y) #⊗ internal_eval (F y) (G y)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) y)
#⊗ identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G ⊗ a)
· identity (G y ⊸ H y)
  #⊗ ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
       · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y)
      #⊗ h · identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ # F f
      · internal_eval (F y) (G y)) =
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) y)
#⊗ ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y) #⊗ h)
· identity (G y ⊸ H y)
  #⊗ (identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ # F f)
· identity (G y ⊸ H y) #⊗ internal_eval (F y) (G y)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) y)
#⊗ ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y) #⊗ h
    · identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ # F f
    · internal_eval (F y) (G y)) =
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) y)
#⊗ ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y) #⊗ h)
· identity (G y ⊸ H y)
  #⊗ (identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ # F f)
· identity (G y ⊸ H y) #⊗ internal_eval (F y) (G y)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) y)
#⊗ ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y
     · identity (F y ⊸ G y)) #⊗ (h · # F f)
    · internal_eval (F y) (G y)) =
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) y
 · identity (G y ⊸ H y) · identity (G y ⊸ H y))
#⊗ ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y
     · identity (F y ⊸ G y)) #⊗ (h · # F f)
    · internal_eval (F y) (G y))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⟧
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) y)
#⊗ ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y)
    #⊗ (h · # F f) · internal_eval (F y) (G y)) =
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) y)
#⊗ ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y)
    #⊗ (h · # F f) · internal_eval (F y) (G y))

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
V
⟦ presheaf_enrichment_hom G H
  ⊗ presheaf_enrichment_hom F G,
presheaf_enrichment_hom F H ⟧

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
V
⟦ presheaf_enrichment_hom G H
  ⊗ presheaf_enrichment_hom F G,
presheaf_enrichment_hom F H ⟧

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
V
⟦ presheaf_enrichment_hom G H
  ⊗ presheaf_enrichment_hom F G,
presheaf_enrichment_hom_prod F H ⟧
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
?h · presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_left F H =
?h · presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_right F H

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
V
⟦ presheaf_enrichment_hom G H
  ⊗ presheaf_enrichment_hom F G,
presheaf_enrichment_hom_prod F H ⟧
 exact (presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F G H).
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: C ⟶ V
presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F G H
· presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_left F H =
presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F G H
· presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_right F H
 exact (presheaf_enrichment_comp_laws F G H).
  Defined.

  (** * 4. Global elements versus natural transformations *)
  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: F ⟹ G
V ⟦ I_{ V}, presheaf_enrichment_hom_prod F G ⟧

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: F ⟹ G
V ⟦ I_{ V}, presheaf_enrichment_hom_prod F G ⟧

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: F ⟹ G
∏ i : C, V ⟦ I_{ V}, (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x) i ⟧

    exact (λ x, internal_from_arr (τ x)).
  Defined.

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: F ⟹ G
presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_data τ
· presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_left F G =
presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_data τ
· presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_right F G

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: F ⟹ G
presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_data τ
· presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_left F G =
presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_data τ
· presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_right F G

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: F ⟹ G
∏ i : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_data τ
· presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_left F G
· ProductPr (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
    (PV'
       (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
        F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf))) i =
presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_data τ
· presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_right F G
· ProductPr (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
    (PV'
       (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
        F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf))) i

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: F ⟹ G
xyf: ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧
presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_data τ
· presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_left F G
· ProductPr (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
    (PV'
       (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
        F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf))) xyf =
presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_data τ
· presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_right F G
· ProductPr (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
    (PV'
       (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
        F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf))) xyf

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat

EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: F ⟹ G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_data τ
· presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_left F G
· ProductPr (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
    (PV'
       (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
        F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf))) (x,, y,, f) =
presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_data τ
· presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_right F G
· ProductPr (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V

       (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
        F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf))) (x,, y,, f)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: F ⟹ G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_data τ
· ProductArrow (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
    (PV'
       (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
        F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf)))
    (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
     ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) (pr1 xyf)
     · mon_linvunitor (F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr1 xyf))
     · internal_from_arr (# G (pr22 xyf))
       #⊗ identity (F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr1 xyf))
     · internal_comp (F (pr1 xyf)) (G (pr1 xyf))
         (G (pr12 xyf)))
· ProductPr (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
    (PV'
       (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
        F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf))) (x,, y,, f) =
presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_data τ
· ProductArrow (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
    (PV'
       (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
        F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf)))
    (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
     ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x))
       (pr12 xyf)
     · mon_rinvunitor (F (pr12 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf))
     · identity (F (pr12 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf))
       #⊗ internal_from_arr (# F (pr22 xyf))
     · internal_comp (F (pr1 xyf)) (F (pr12 xyf))
         (G (pr12 xyf)))
· ProductPr (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
    (PV'
       (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
        F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf))) (x,, y,, f)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: F ⟹ G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_data τ
· (ProductArrow (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
     (PV'
        (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
         F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf)))
     (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
      ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x))
        (pr1 xyf)
      · mon_linvunitor (F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr1 xyf))
      · internal_from_arr (# G (pr22 xyf))
        #⊗ identity (F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr1 xyf))
      · internal_comp (F (pr1 xyf)) (G (pr1 xyf))
          (G (pr12 xyf)))
   · ProductPr (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
       (PV'
          (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
           F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf))) (x,, y,, f)) =
presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_data τ
· (ProductArrow (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
     (PV'
        (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
         F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf)))
     (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
      ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x))
        (pr12 xyf)
      · mon_rinvunitor (F (pr12 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf))
      · identity (F (pr12 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf))
        #⊗ internal_from_arr (# F (pr22 xyf))
      · internal_comp (F (pr1 xyf)) (F (pr12 xyf))
          (G (pr12 xyf)))
   · ProductPr (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
       (PV'
          (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
           F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf))) (x,, y,, f))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: F ⟹ G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_data τ
· (ProductArrow (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
     (PV'
        (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
         F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf)))
     (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
      ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x))
        (pr1 xyf)
      · mon_linvunitor (F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr1 xyf))
      · internal_from_arr (# G (pr22 xyf))
        #⊗ identity (F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr1 xyf))
      · internal_comp (F (pr1 xyf)) (G (pr1 xyf))
          (G (pr12 xyf)))
   · ProductPr (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
       (PV'
          (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
           F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf))) (x,, y,, f)) =
?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: F ⟹ G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
?b =
presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_data τ
· (ProductArrow (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
     (PV'
        (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
         F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf)))
     (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
      ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x))
        (pr12 xyf)
      · mon_rinvunitor (F (pr12 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf))
      · identity (F (pr12 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf))
        #⊗ internal_from_arr (# F (pr22 xyf))
      · internal_comp (F (pr1 xyf)) (F (pr12 xyf))
          (G (pr12 xyf)))
   · ProductPr (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
       (PV'
          (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
           F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf))) (x,, y,, f))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: F ⟹ G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_data τ
· (ProductArrow (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
     (PV'
        (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
         F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf)))
     (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
      ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x))
        (pr1 xyf)
      · mon_linvunitor (F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr1 xyf))
      · internal_from_arr (# G (pr22 xyf))
        #⊗ identity (F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr1 xyf))
      · internal_comp (F (pr1 xyf)) (G (pr1 xyf))
          (G (pr12 xyf)))
   · ProductPr (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
       (PV'
          (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
           F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf))) (x,, y,, f)) =
?b

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: F ⟹ G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ProductArrow (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
  (PV'
     (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
      F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf)))
  (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
   ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) (pr1 xyf)
   · mon_linvunitor (F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr1 xyf))
   · internal_from_arr (# G (pr22 xyf))
     #⊗ identity (F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr1 xyf))
   · internal_comp (F (pr1 xyf)) (G (pr1 xyf))
       (G (pr12 xyf)))
· ProductPr (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
    (PV'
       (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
        F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf))) (x,, y,, f) = 
?t2

      exact (ProductPrCommutes (∑ (x y : C), x --> y) V _ _ _ _ _).
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: F ⟹ G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_data τ
· (ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x))
     (pr1 (x,, y,, f))
   · mon_linvunitor
       (F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⊸ G (pr1 (x,, y,, f)))
   · internal_from_arr (# G (pr22 (x,, y,, f)))
     #⊗ identity
          (F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⊸ G (pr1 (x,, y,, f)))
   · internal_comp (F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)))
       (G (pr1 (x,, y,, f))) (G (pr12 (x,, y,, f)))) =
presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_data τ
· (ProductArrow (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
     (PV'
        (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
         F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf)))
     (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
      ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x))
        (pr12 xyf)
      · mon_rinvunitor (F (pr12 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf))
      · identity (F (pr12 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf))
        #⊗ internal_from_arr (# F (pr22 xyf))
      · internal_comp (F (pr1 xyf)) (F (pr12 xyf))
          (G (pr12 xyf)))
   · ProductPr (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
       (PV'
          (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
           F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf))) (x,, y,, f))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: F ⟹ G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_data τ
· ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x))
    (pr1 (x,, y,, f))
· mon_linvunitor
    (F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⊸ G (pr1 (x,, y,, f)))
· internal_from_arr (# G (pr22 (x,, y,, f)))
  #⊗ identity
       (F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⊸ G (pr1 (x,, y,, f)))
· internal_comp (F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)))
    (G (pr1 (x,, y,, f))) (G (pr12 (x,, y,, f))) =

    (PV'
       (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
        F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf)))
    (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
     ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x))
       (pr12 xyf)
     · mon_rinvunitor (F (pr12 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf))
     · identity (F (pr12 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf))
       #⊗ internal_from_arr (# F (pr22 xyf))
     · internal_comp (F (pr1 xyf)) (F (pr12 xyf))
         (G (pr12 xyf)))
· ProductPr (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
    (PV'
       (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
        F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf))) (x,, y,, f)

τ: F ⟹ G

f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧

  (PV'
     (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
      F (pr1 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf)))
  (λ xyf : ∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
   ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) (pr12 xyf)
   · mon_rinvunitor (F (pr12 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf))
   · identity (F (pr12 xyf) ⊸ G (pr12 xyf))

?t2

      exact (ProductPrCommutes (∑ (x y : C), x --> y) V _ _ _ _ _).

V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: F ⟹ G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_data τ

V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: F ⟹ G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
internal_from_arr (τ (pr12 (x,, y,, f)))
· mon_rinvunitor
    (F (pr12 (x,, y,, f)) ⊸ G (pr12 (x,, y,, f)))
· identity
    (F (pr12 (x,, y,, f)) ⊸ G (pr12 (x,, y,, f)))
  #⊗ internal_from_arr (# F (pr22 (x,, y,, f)))
· internal_comp (F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)))
    (F (pr12 (x,, y,, f))) (G (pr12 (x,, y,, f))) =
internal_from_arr (τ (pr1 (x,, y,, f)))
· mon_linvunitor
    (F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⊸ G (pr1 (x,, y,, f)))
· internal_from_arr (# G (pr22 (x,, y,, f)))
  #⊗ identity
       (F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)) ⊸ G (pr1 (x,, y,, f)))
· internal_comp (F (pr1 (x,, y,, f)))
    (G (pr1 (x,, y,, f))) (G (pr12 (x,, y,, f)))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: F ⟹ G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
internal_from_arr (τ y) · mon_rinvunitor (F y ⊸ G y)
· identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ internal_from_arr (# F f)
· internal_comp (F x) (F y) (G y) =
internal_from_arr (τ x) · mon_linvunitor (F x ⊸ G x)
· internal_from_arr (# G f) #⊗ identity (F x ⊸ G x)
· internal_comp (F x) (G x) (G y)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: F ⟹ G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
∏ (a : V) (h : V ⟦ a, F x ⟧),
(internal_from_arr (τ y) · mon_rinvunitor (F y ⊸ G y)
 · identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ internal_from_arr (# F f)
 · internal_comp (F x) (F y) (G y)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (F x) (G y) =
(internal_from_arr (τ x) · mon_linvunitor (F x ⊸ G x)
 · internal_from_arr (# G f) #⊗ identity (F x ⊸ G x)
 · internal_comp (F x) (G x) (G y)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (F x) (G y)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: F ⟹ G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
(internal_from_arr (τ y) · mon_rinvunitor (F y ⊸ G y)
 · identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ internal_from_arr (# F f)
 · internal_comp (F x) (F y) (G y)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (F x) (G y) =
(internal_from_arr (τ x) · mon_linvunitor (F x ⊸ G x)
 · internal_from_arr (# G f) #⊗ identity (F x ⊸ G x)
 · internal_comp (F x) (G x) (G y)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (F x) (G y)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: F ⟹ G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
internal_from_arr (τ y) #⊗ h
· mon_rinvunitor (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ identity (F x)
· (identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ internal_from_arr (# F f))
  #⊗ identity (F x)
· internal_comp (F x) (F y) (G y) #⊗ identity (F x)
· internal_eval (F x) (G y) =
internal_from_arr (τ x) #⊗ h
· mon_linvunitor (F x ⊸ G x) #⊗ identity (F x)
· (internal_from_arr (# G f) #⊗ identity (F x ⊸ G x))
  #⊗ identity (F x)
· internal_comp (F x) (G x) (G y) #⊗ identity (F x)
· internal_eval (F x) (G y)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: F ⟹ G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
internal_from_arr (τ y) #⊗ h
· (mon_rinvunitor (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · ((identity (F y ⊸ G y)
       #⊗ internal_from_arr (# F f)) #⊗ identity (F x)
      · (internal_comp (F x) (F y) (G y)
         #⊗ identity (F x) · internal_eval (F x) (G y)))) =
internal_from_arr (τ x) #⊗ h
· (mon_linvunitor (F x ⊸ G x) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · ((internal_from_arr (# G f)
       #⊗ identity (F x ⊸ G x)) #⊗ identity (F x)
      · (internal_comp (F x) (G x) (G y)
         #⊗ identity (F x) · internal_eval (F x) (G y))))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: F ⟹ G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
internal_from_arr (τ y) #⊗ h
· (mon_rinvunitor (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · ((identity (F y ⊸ G y)
       #⊗ internal_from_arr (# F f)) #⊗ identity (F x)
      · (internal_lam
           (mon_lassociator (F y ⊸ G y) (F x ⊸ F y)
              (F x)
            · identity (F y ⊸ G y)
              #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (F y)
            · internal_eval (F y) (G y))
         #⊗ identity (F x) · internal_eval (F x) (G y)))) =
internal_from_arr (τ x) #⊗ h
· (mon_linvunitor (F x ⊸ G x) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · ((internal_from_arr (# G f)
       #⊗ identity (F x ⊸ G x)) #⊗ identity (F x)
      · (internal_lam
           (mon_lassociator (G x ⊸ G y) (F x ⊸ G x)
              (F x)
            · identity (G x ⊸ G y)
              #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (G x)
            · internal_eval (G x) (G y))
         #⊗ identity (F x) · internal_eval (F x) (G y))))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: F ⟹ G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
internal_from_arr (τ y) #⊗ h
· (mon_rinvunitor (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · ((identity (F y ⊸ G y)
       #⊗ internal_from_arr (# F f)) #⊗ identity (F x)
      · (mon_lassociator (F y ⊸ G y) (F x ⊸ F y) (F x)
         · identity (F y ⊸ G y)
           #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (F y)
         · internal_eval (F y) (G y)))) =
internal_from_arr (τ x) #⊗ h
· (mon_linvunitor (F x ⊸ G x) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · ((internal_from_arr (# G f)
       #⊗ identity (F x ⊸ G x)) #⊗ identity (F x)
      · (mon_lassociator (G x ⊸ G y) (F x ⊸ G x) (F x)
         · identity (G x ⊸ G y)
           #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (G x)
         · internal_eval (G x) (G y))))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: F ⟹ G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
internal_from_arr (τ y) #⊗ h
· (mon_rinvunitor (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · ((identity (F y ⊸ G y)
       #⊗ internal_from_arr (# F f)) #⊗ identity (F x)
      · (mon_lassociator (F y ⊸ G y) (F x ⊸ F y) (F x)
         · identity (F y ⊸ G y)
           #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (F y)
         · internal_eval (F y) (G y)))) = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: F ⟹ G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
?b =
internal_from_arr (τ x) #⊗ h
· (mon_linvunitor (F x ⊸ G x) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · ((internal_from_arr (# G f)
       #⊗ identity (F x ⊸ G x)) #⊗ identity (F x)
      · (mon_lassociator (G x ⊸ G y) (F x ⊸ G x) (F x)
         · identity (G x ⊸ G y)
           #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (G x)
         · internal_eval (G x) (G y))))

PV: Products C V

F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: F ⟹ G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
internal_from_arr (τ y) #⊗ h
· (mon_rinvunitor (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · ((identity (F y ⊸ G y)
       #⊗ internal_from_arr (# F f)) #⊗ identity (F x)
      · (mon_lassociator (F y ⊸ G y) (F x ⊸ F y) (F x)
         · identity (F y ⊸ G y)
           #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (F y)
         · internal_eval (F y) (G y)))) = ?b

EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: F ⟹ G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
(identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ internal_from_arr (# F f))
#⊗ identity (F x)
· (mon_lassociator (F y ⊸ G y) (F x ⊸ F y) (F x)
   · identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (F y)
   · internal_eval (F y) (G y)) = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: F ⟹ G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
(identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ internal_from_arr (# F f))
#⊗ identity (F x)
· mon_lassociator (F y ⊸ G y) (F x ⊸ F y) (F x)
· identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (F y)
· internal_eval (F y) (G y) = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: F ⟹ G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
mon_lassociator (F y ⊸ G y) I_{ V} (F x)
· identity (F y ⊸ G y)
  #⊗ (internal_from_arr (# F f) #⊗ identity (F x))
· identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (F y)
· internal_eval (F y) (G y) = ?t2

x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
mon_lassociator (F y ⊸ G y) I_{ V} (F x)
· (identity (F y ⊸ G y)
   #⊗ (internal_from_arr (# F f) #⊗ identity (F x))
   · (identity (F y ⊸ G y)
      #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (F y)
      · internal_eval (F y) (G y))) = ?t2

identity (F y ⊸ G y)
#⊗ (internal_from_arr (# F f) #⊗ identity (F x))
· (identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (F y)
   · internal_eval (F y) (G y)) = ?t2

#⊗ (internal_from_arr (# F f) #⊗ identity (F x))

EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V

F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: F ⟹ G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
identity (F y ⊸ G y)
#⊗ (internal_lam (mon_lunitor (F x) · # F f)
    #⊗ identity (F x) · internal_eval (F x) (F y)) =
?y'

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat

EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V

τ: F ⟹ G
x, y: C

a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ (mon_lunitor (F x) · # F f) =
?y'

      apply idpath.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: F ⟹ G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
internal_from_arr (τ y) #⊗ h
· (mon_rinvunitor (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · (mon_lassociator (F y ⊸ G y) I_{ V} (F x)
      · (identity (F y ⊸ G y)
         #⊗ (mon_lunitor (F x) · # F f)
         · internal_eval (F y) (G y)))) =
internal_from_arr (τ x) #⊗ h
· (mon_linvunitor (F x ⊸ G x) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · ((internal_from_arr (# G f)
       #⊗ identity (F x ⊸ G x)) #⊗ identity (F x)
      · (mon_lassociator (G x ⊸ G y) (F x ⊸ G x) (F x)
         · identity (G x ⊸ G y)
           #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (G x)
         · internal_eval (G x) (G y))))

      · (identity (F y ⊸ G y)

· mon_lassociator (F y ⊸ G y) I_{ V} (F x)
· identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ mon_lunitor (F x) = ?y'

EqV: Equalizers V

a: V

V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V

τ: F ⟹ G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧

      apply tensor_id_id.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: F ⟹ G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
internal_from_arr (τ y) #⊗ h
· (identity ((F y ⊸ G y) ⊗ F x)
   · identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ # F f
   · internal_eval (F y) (G y)) =
internal_from_arr (τ x) #⊗ h
· (mon_linvunitor (F x ⊸ G x) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · ((internal_from_arr (# G f)
       #⊗ identity (F x ⊸ G x)) #⊗ identity (F x)
      · (mon_lassociator (G x ⊸ G y) (F x ⊸ G x) (F x)
         · identity (G x ⊸ G y)
           #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (G x)
         · internal_eval (G x) (G y))))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: F ⟹ G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
internal_from_arr (τ y) #⊗ h
· (identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ # F f
   · internal_eval (F y) (G y)) =
internal_from_arr (τ x) #⊗ h
· (mon_linvunitor (F x ⊸ G x) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · ((internal_from_arr (# G f)
       #⊗ identity (F x ⊸ G x)) #⊗ identity (F x)
      · (mon_lassociator (G x ⊸ G y) (F x ⊸ G x) (F x)
         · identity (G x ⊸ G y)
           #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (G x)
         · internal_eval (G x) (G y))))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: F ⟹ G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
internal_from_arr (τ y) #⊗ h
· (identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ # F f
   · internal_eval (F y) (G y)) = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat

EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: F ⟹ G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
?b =
internal_from_arr (τ x) #⊗ h
· (mon_linvunitor (F x ⊸ G x) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · ((internal_from_arr (# G f)
       #⊗ identity (F x ⊸ G x)) #⊗ identity (F x)
      · (mon_lassociator (G x ⊸ G y) (F x ⊸ G x) (F x)
         · identity (G x ⊸ G y)
           #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (G x)
         · internal_eval (G x) (G y))))

#⊗ (h · # F f) · internal_eval (F y) (G y) = ?b

F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: F ⟹ G
x, y: C

a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ (h · # F f)
· internal_from_arr (τ y) #⊗ identity (F y)
· internal_eval (F y) (G y) = ?b

EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: F ⟹ G

f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ (h · # F f)
· (internal_lam (mon_lunitor (F y) · τ y)
   #⊗ identity (F y) · internal_eval (F y) (G y)) = 
?b

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: F ⟹ G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ (h · # F f)
· (mon_lunitor (F y) · τ y) = ?b

      apply idpath.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: F ⟹ G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ (h · # F f)
· (mon_lunitor (F y) · τ y) =
internal_from_arr (τ x) #⊗ h
· (mon_linvunitor (F x ⊸ G x) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · ((internal_from_arr (# G f)
       #⊗ identity (F x ⊸ G x)) #⊗ identity (F x)
      · (mon_lassociator (G x ⊸ G y) (F x ⊸ G x) (F x)
         · identity (G x ⊸ G y)
           #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (G x)
         · internal_eval (G x) (G y))))

   · ((internal_from_arr (# G f)
       #⊗ identity (F x ⊸ G x)) #⊗ identity (F x)
      · (mon_lassociator (G x ⊸ G y) (F x ⊸ G x) (F x)
         · identity (G x ⊸ G y)

V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: F ⟹ G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
identity (F x ⊸ G x) #⊗ identity (F x) = ?y'

      apply tensor_id_id.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: F ⟹ G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
internal_from_arr (τ x) #⊗ h
· (identity ((F x ⊸ G x) ⊗ F x)
   · internal_eval (F x) (G x) · # G f) =
identity I_{ V} #⊗ (h · # F f)
· (mon_lunitor (F y) · τ y)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: F ⟹ G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
internal_from_arr (τ x) #⊗ h
· (internal_eval (F x) (G x) · # G f) =
identity I_{ V} #⊗ (h · # F f)
· (mon_lunitor (F y) · τ y)

C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: F ⟹ G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
internal_from_arr (τ x) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (F x) (G x) · # G f =
identity I_{ V} #⊗ (h · # F f) · mon_lunitor (F y)
· τ y

f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧

identity I_{ V} #⊗ h
· (internal_from_arr (τ x) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · (internal_eval (F x) (G x) · # G f)) = ?b

C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V

a: V

V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: F ⟹ G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
internal_lam (mon_lunitor (F x) · τ x)
#⊗ identity (F x) · internal_eval (F x) (G x) · # G f =
?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V

τ: F ⟹ G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
mon_lunitor (F x) · τ x · # G f = ?t2

      apply idpath.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: F ⟹ G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h
· (mon_lunitor (F x) · τ x · # G f) =
identity I_{ V} #⊗ (h · # F f)
· (mon_lunitor (F y) · τ y)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: F ⟹ G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧

identity I_{ V} #⊗ h
· (mon_lunitor (F x) · (τ x · # G f)) =

· (mon_lunitor (F y) · τ y)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: F ⟹ G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h
· (identity I_{ V} #⊗ (τ x · # G f)
   · mon_lunitor (G y)) =
identity I_{ V} #⊗ (h · # F f)
· (identity I_{ V} #⊗ τ y · mon_lunitor (G y))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V

τ: F ⟹ G

· identity I_{ V} #⊗ (τ x · # G f) · mon_lunitor (G y) =

· identity I_{ V} #⊗ τ y · mon_lunitor (G y)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: F ⟹ G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h
· identity I_{ V} #⊗ (τ x · # G f) =
identity I_{ V} #⊗ (h · # F f)
· identity I_{ V} #⊗ τ y

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: F ⟹ G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ (h · (τ x · # G f)) =
identity I_{ V} #⊗ (h · # F f · τ y)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: F ⟹ G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ (h · (τ x · # G f)) =
identity I_{ V} #⊗ (h · (# F f · τ y))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: F ⟹ G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
τ x · # G f = # F f · τ y

    exact (!(nat_trans_ax τ _ _ f)).
  Qed.

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: F ⟹ G
V ⟦ I_{ V}, presheaf_enrichment_hom F G ⟧

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V

V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: F ⟹ G
V ⟦ I_{ V}, presheaf_enrichment_hom_prod F G ⟧
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: F ⟹ G
?h · presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_left F G =
?h · presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_right F G

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: F ⟹ G
V ⟦ I_{ V}, presheaf_enrichment_hom_prod F G ⟧
 exact (presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_data τ).
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: F ⟹ G
presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_data τ
· presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_left F G =
presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_data τ
· presheaf_enrichment_hom_eq_right F G
 exact (presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_laws τ).
  Defined.

  Section ToArr.
    Context {F G : C ⟶ V}
            (τ : I_{ V} --> presheaf_enrichment_hom F G).

    Definition presheaf_enrichment_to_arr_data
      : nat_trans_data F G
      := λ x, internal_to_arr (τ · EqualizerArrow _ · ProductPr _ _ _ x).

    Arguments presheaf_enrichment_to_arr_data /.

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: V ⟦ I_{ V}, presheaf_enrichment_hom F G ⟧
is_nat_trans F G presheaf_enrichment_to_arr_data

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: V ⟦ I_{ V}, presheaf_enrichment_hom F G ⟧
is_nat_trans F G presheaf_enrichment_to_arr_data

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: V ⟦ I_{ V}, presheaf_enrichment_hom F G ⟧
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
# F f
· internal_to_arr
    (τ · EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y) =
internal_to_arr
  (τ · EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)
· # G f

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: V ⟦ I_{ V}, presheaf_enrichment_hom F G ⟧
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
# F f
· (mon_linvunitor (F y)
   · (τ · EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
      · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y)
     #⊗ identity (F y) · internal_eval (F y) (G y)) =
mon_linvunitor (F x)
· (τ · EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)
  #⊗ identity (F x) · internal_eval (F x) (G x)
· # G f

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: V ⟦ I_{ V}, presheaf_enrichment_hom F G ⟧
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
# F f · mon_linvunitor (F y)
· (τ · EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y)
  #⊗ identity (F y) · internal_eval (F y) (G y) =
mon_linvunitor (F x)
· (τ · EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)
  #⊗ identity (F x) · internal_eval (F x) (G x)
· # G f

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: V ⟦ I_{ V}, presheaf_enrichment_hom F G ⟧
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
mon_linvunitor (F x) · identity I_{ V} #⊗ # F f
· (τ · EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y)
  #⊗ identity (F y) · internal_eval (F y) (G y) =
mon_linvunitor (F x)
· (τ · EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)
  #⊗ identity (F x) · internal_eval (F x) (G x)
· # G f

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: V ⟦ I_{ V}, presheaf_enrichment_hom F G ⟧
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
mon_linvunitor (F x)
· (identity I_{ V} #⊗ # F f
   · ((τ
       · (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
          · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y))
      #⊗ identity (F y) · internal_eval (F y) (G y))) =
mon_linvunitor (F x)
· ((τ
    · (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
       · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x))
   #⊗ identity (F x)
   · (internal_eval (F x) (G x) · # G f))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: V ⟦ I_{ V}, presheaf_enrichment_hom F G ⟧
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ # F f
· ((τ
    · (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
       · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y))
   #⊗ identity (F y) · internal_eval (F y) (G y)) =
(τ
 · (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
    · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x))
#⊗ identity (F x)
· (internal_eval (F x) (G x) · # G f)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: V ⟦ I_{ V}, presheaf_enrichment_hom F G ⟧
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
(τ
 · (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
    · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x))
#⊗ identity (F x)
· (internal_eval (F x) (G x) · # G f) =
identity I_{ V} #⊗ # F f
· ((τ
    · (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
       · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y))
   #⊗ identity (F y) · internal_eval (F y) (G y))

F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: V ⟦ I_{ V}, presheaf_enrichment_hom F G ⟧
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
(τ
 · (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
    · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x))
#⊗ identity (F x)
· (internal_eval (F x) (G x) · # G f) = ?b

F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: V ⟦ I_{ V}, presheaf_enrichment_hom F G ⟧

V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: V ⟦ I_{ V}, presheaf_enrichment_hom F G ⟧
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)
#⊗ identity (F x)
· (internal_eval (F x) (G x) · # G f) = ?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: V ⟦ I_{ V}, presheaf_enrichment_hom F G ⟧
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)
#⊗ identity (F x) · internal_eval (F x) (G x) · # G f =
?t2

        exact (presheaf_enrichment_naturality F G f).
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: V ⟦ I_{ V}, presheaf_enrichment_hom F G ⟧
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
τ #⊗ identity (F x)
· ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
    · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y)
   #⊗ identity (F x) · identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ # F f
   · internal_eval (F y) (G y)) =
identity I_{ V} #⊗ # F f
· ((τ
    · (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
       · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y))
   #⊗ identity (F y) · internal_eval (F y) (G y))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: V ⟦ I_{ V}, presheaf_enrichment_hom F G ⟧
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
τ #⊗ identity (F x)
· (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y)
  #⊗ identity (F x) · identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ # F f
· internal_eval (F y) (G y) =
identity I_{ V} #⊗ # F f
· (τ · EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y)
  #⊗ identity (F y) · internal_eval (F y) (G y)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: V ⟦ I_{ V}, presheaf_enrichment_hom F G ⟧
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
τ #⊗ identity (F x)
· (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y)
  #⊗ identity (F x) · identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ # F f =
identity I_{ V} #⊗ # F f
· (τ · EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y)
  #⊗ identity (F y)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: V ⟦ I_{ V}, presheaf_enrichment_hom F G ⟧
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ # F f
· (τ · EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y)
  #⊗ identity (F y) =
τ #⊗ identity (F x)
· (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y)
  #⊗ identity (F x) · identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ # F f

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: V ⟦ I_{ V}, presheaf_enrichment_hom F G ⟧
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ # F f
· (τ · EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y)
  #⊗ identity (F y) = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: V ⟦ I_{ V}, presheaf_enrichment_hom F G ⟧
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
?b =
τ #⊗ identity (F x)
· (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y)
  #⊗ identity (F x) · identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ # F f

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: V ⟦ I_{ V}, presheaf_enrichment_hom F G ⟧
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ # F f
· (τ · EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y)
  #⊗ identity (F y) = ?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: V ⟦ I_{ V}, presheaf_enrichment_hom F G ⟧
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
(τ · EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y) #⊗ # F f =
?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: V ⟦ I_{ V}, presheaf_enrichment_hom F G ⟧
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
(τ · EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y)
#⊗ identity (F x) · identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ # F f = 
?b

        apply idpath.
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: V ⟦ I_{ V}, presheaf_enrichment_hom F G ⟧
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
(τ · EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y)
#⊗ identity (F x) · identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ # F f =
τ #⊗ identity (F x)
· (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y)
  #⊗ identity (F x) · identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ # F f

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: V ⟦ I_{ V}, presheaf_enrichment_hom F G ⟧
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
(τ · EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y)
#⊗ identity (F x) · identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ # F f =
(τ
 · (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
    · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y))
#⊗ identity (F x) · identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ # F f

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: V ⟦ I_{ V}, presheaf_enrichment_hom F G ⟧
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
(τ · EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y)
#⊗ identity (F x) · identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ # F f =
(τ · EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) y)
#⊗ identity (F x) · identity (F y ⊸ G y) #⊗ # F f

      apply idpath.
    Qed.

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: V ⟦ I_{ V}, presheaf_enrichment_hom F G ⟧
F ⟹ G

F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: V ⟦ I_{ V}, presheaf_enrichment_hom F G ⟧
F ⟹ G

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: V ⟦ I_{ V}, presheaf_enrichment_hom F G ⟧
nat_trans_data F G
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: V ⟦ I_{ V}, presheaf_enrichment_hom F G ⟧
is_nat_trans F G ?t

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: V ⟦ I_{ V}, presheaf_enrichment_hom F G ⟧
nat_trans_data F G
 exact presheaf_enrichment_to_arr_data.
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: C ⟶ V
τ: V ⟦ I_{ V}, presheaf_enrichment_hom F G ⟧
is_nat_trans F G presheaf_enrichment_to_arr_data
 exact presheaf_enrichment_to_arr_laws.
    Defined.
  End ToArr.

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
enrichment_data [C, V] V

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
enrichment_data [C, V] V

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
[C, V] → [C, V] → V
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
∏ x : [C, V], V ⟦ I_{ V}, ?pr1 x x ⟧
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
∏ x y z : [C, V], V ⟦ ?pr1 y z ⊗ ?pr1 x y, ?pr1 x z ⟧
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
∏ x y : [C, V],
[C, V] ⟦ x, y ⟧ → V ⟦ I_{ V}, ?pr1 x y ⟧
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
(λ _ : ∏ x y : [C, V],
       [C, V] ⟦ x, y ⟧ → V ⟦ I_{ V}, ?pr1 x y ⟧,
 ∏ x y : [C, V],
 V ⟦ I_{ V}, ?pr1 x y ⟧ → [C, V] ⟦ x, y ⟧) ?pr12

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
[C, V] → [C, V] → V
 exact presheaf_enrichment_hom.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
∏ x : [C, V],
V ⟦ I_{ V},
(λ F G : [C, V], presheaf_enrichment_hom F G) x x ⟧
 exact presheaf_enrichment_id.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
∏ x y z : [C, V],
V
⟦ (λ F G : [C, V], presheaf_enrichment_hom F G) y z
  ⊗ (λ F G : [C, V], presheaf_enrichment_hom F G) x y,
(λ F G : [C, V], presheaf_enrichment_hom F G) x z ⟧
 exact presheaf_enrichment_comp.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
∏ x y : [C, V],
[C, V] ⟦ x, y ⟧
→ V ⟦ I_{ V},
  (λ F G : [C, V], presheaf_enrichment_hom F G) x y ⟧
 exact (λ F G τ, presheaf_enrichment_from_arr τ).
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
(λ _ : ∏ x y : [C, V],
       [C, V] ⟦ x, y ⟧
       → V ⟦ I_{ V},
         (λ F G : [C, V], presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
           x y ⟧,
 ∏ x y : [C, V],
 V ⟦ I_{ V},
 (λ F G : [C, V], presheaf_enrichment_hom F G) x y ⟧
 → [C, V] ⟦ x, y ⟧)
  (λ (F G : [C, V]) (τ : [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧),
   presheaf_enrichment_from_arr τ)
 exact (λ F G τ, presheaf_enrichment_to_arr τ).
  Defined.

  (** * 5. Laws of the enrichment *)
  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
enrichment_laws presheaf_enrichment_data

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
enrichment_laws presheaf_enrichment_data

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
∏ x y : [C, V],
mon_lunitor (presheaf_enrichment_data ⦃ x, y ⦄) =
enriched_id presheaf_enrichment_data y
#⊗ identity (presheaf_enrichment_data ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp presheaf_enrichment_data x y y
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
∏ x y : [C, V],
mon_runitor (presheaf_enrichment_data ⦃ x, y ⦄) =
identity (presheaf_enrichment_data ⦃ x, y ⦄)
#⊗ enriched_id presheaf_enrichment_data x
· enriched_comp presheaf_enrichment_data x x y
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
∏ w x y z : [C, V],
enriched_comp presheaf_enrichment_data x y z
#⊗ identity (presheaf_enrichment_data ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· enriched_comp presheaf_enrichment_data w x z =
mon_lassociator (presheaf_enrichment_data ⦃ y, z ⦄)
  (presheaf_enrichment_data ⦃ x, y ⦄)
  (presheaf_enrichment_data ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· identity (presheaf_enrichment_data ⦃ y, z ⦄)
  #⊗ enriched_comp presheaf_enrichment_data w x y
· enriched_comp presheaf_enrichment_data w y z
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
∏ (x y : [C, V]) (f : [C, V] ⟦ x, y ⟧),
enriched_to_arr presheaf_enrichment_data
  (enriched_from_arr presheaf_enrichment_data f) = f
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
∏ (x y : [C, V])
(f : V ⟦ I_{ V}, presheaf_enrichment_data ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧),
enriched_from_arr presheaf_enrichment_data
  (enriched_to_arr presheaf_enrichment_data f) = f
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
∏ x : [C, V],
enriched_to_arr presheaf_enrichment_data
  (enriched_id presheaf_enrichment_data x) =
identity x
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
∏ (x y z : [C, V]) (f : [C, V] ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : [C, V] ⟦ y, z ⟧),
f · g =
enriched_to_arr presheaf_enrichment_data
  (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
   · enriched_from_arr presheaf_enrichment_data g
     #⊗ enriched_from_arr presheaf_enrichment_data f
   · enriched_comp presheaf_enrichment_data x y z)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
∏ x y : [C, V],
mon_lunitor (presheaf_enrichment_data ⦃ x, y ⦄) =
enriched_id presheaf_enrichment_data y
#⊗ identity (presheaf_enrichment_data ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp presheaf_enrichment_data x y y
 
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
mon_lunitor (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G) =
presheaf_enrichment_id G
#⊗ identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
· presheaf_enrichment_comp F G G

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
mon_lunitor (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
· EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G) =
presheaf_enrichment_id G
#⊗ identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
· presheaf_enrichment_comp F G G
· EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
mon_lunitor (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
· EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G) =
presheaf_enrichment_id G
#⊗ identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
· EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
    (presheaf_enrichment_hom G G
     ⊗ presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
    (presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F G G)
    (presheaf_enrichment_comp_laws F G G)
· EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
mon_lunitor (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
· EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G) =
presheaf_enrichment_id G
#⊗ identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
· (EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     (presheaf_enrichment_hom G G
      ⊗ presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     (presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F G G)
     (presheaf_enrichment_comp_laws F G G)
   · EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
presheaf_enrichment_id G
#⊗ identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
· (EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     (presheaf_enrichment_hom G G
      ⊗ presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     (presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F G G)
     (presheaf_enrichment_comp_laws F G G)
   · EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)) =
mon_lunitor (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
· EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
presheaf_enrichment_id G
#⊗ identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
· (EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     (presheaf_enrichment_hom G G
      ⊗ presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     (presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F G G)
     (presheaf_enrichment_comp_laws F G G)
   · EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)) =
?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
?b =
mon_lunitor (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
· EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
presheaf_enrichment_id G
#⊗ identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
· (EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     (presheaf_enrichment_hom G G
      ⊗ presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     (presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F G G)
     (presheaf_enrichment_comp_laws F G G)
   · EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)) =
?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
  (presheaf_enrichment_hom G G
   ⊗ presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
  (presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F G G)
  (presheaf_enrichment_comp_laws F G G)
· EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G) = ?t2

        apply EqualizerCommutes.
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
presheaf_enrichment_id G
#⊗ identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
· presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F G G =
mon_lunitor (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
· EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
∏ i : C,
presheaf_enrichment_id G
#⊗ identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
· presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F G G
· ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) i =
mon_lunitor (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
· EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
· ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) i

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
x: C
presheaf_enrichment_id G
#⊗ identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
· presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F G G
· ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x =
mon_lunitor (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
· EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
· ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
x: C
presheaf_enrichment_id G
#⊗ identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
· ProductArrow C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x))
    (λ x : C,
     (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G G)
      · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x0 : C, G x0 ⊸ G x0)) x)
     #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
         · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x0 : C, F x0 ⊸ G x0))
             x) · internal_comp (F x) (G x) (G x))
· ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x =
mon_lunitor (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
· EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
· ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
x: C
presheaf_enrichment_id G
#⊗ identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
· (ProductArrow C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x))
     (λ x : C,
      (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G G)
       · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x0 : C, G x0 ⊸ G x0)) x)
      #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
          · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x0 : C, F x0 ⊸ G x0))
              x) · internal_comp (F x) (G x) (G x))
   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x) =
mon_lunitor (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
· (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
x: C
presheaf_enrichment_id G
#⊗ identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
· (ProductArrow C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x))
     (λ x : C,
      (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G G)
       · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x0 : C, G x0 ⊸ G x0)) x)
      #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
          · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x0 : C, F x0 ⊸ G x0))
              x) · internal_comp (F x) (G x) (G x))
   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x) = 
?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
x: C
?b =
mon_lunitor (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
· (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
x: C
presheaf_enrichment_id G
#⊗ identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
· (ProductArrow C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x))
     (λ x : C,
      (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G G)
       · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x0 : C, G x0 ⊸ G x0)) x)
      #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
          · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x0 : C, F x0 ⊸ G x0))
              x) · internal_comp (F x) (G x) (G x))
   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x) = 
?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
x: C
ProductArrow C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x))
  (λ x : C,
   (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G G)
    · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x0 : C, G x0 ⊸ G x0)) x)
   #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
       · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x0 : C, F x0 ⊸ G x0)) x)
   · internal_comp (F x) (G x) (G x))
· ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x = ?t2

        exact (ProductPrCommutes C V _ _ _ _ _).
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
x: C
presheaf_enrichment_id G
#⊗ identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
· ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G G)
    · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ G x)) x)
   #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
       · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)
   · internal_comp (F x) (G x) (G x)) =
mon_lunitor (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
· (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)

EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V

x: C
presheaf_enrichment_id G
#⊗ identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
· (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G G)
   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ G x)) x)
  #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
      · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)
· internal_comp (F x) (G x) (G x) =
mon_lunitor (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
· EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
· ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x

#⊗ (identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)

       · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x))

    · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)
· internal_comp (F x) (G x) (G x) = ?b

C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
x: C

  (presheaf_enrichment_id_data G)
  (presheaf_enrichment_id_laws G)
· (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G G)
   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ G x)) x) =

V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
x: C
EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom G G) I_{ V}
  (presheaf_enrichment_id_data G)
  (presheaf_enrichment_id_laws G)
· EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G G)

V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V

· ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ G x)) x = ?y'

V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
x: C
internal_id (G x)
#⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
    · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)
· internal_comp (F x) (G x) (G x) =
mon_lunitor (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
· EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
· ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
x: C
∏ (a : V) (h : V ⟦ a, F x ⟧),
(internal_id (G x)
 #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)
 · internal_comp (F x) (G x) (G x)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (F x) (G x) =
(mon_lunitor (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
 · EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (F x) (G x)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
x: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
(internal_id (G x)
 #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)
 · internal_comp (F x) (G x) (G x)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (F x) (G x) =
(mon_lunitor (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
 · EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (F x) (G x)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
x: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
(internal_id (G x)
 #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x))
#⊗ h
· internal_comp (F x) (G x) (G x) #⊗ identity (F x)
· internal_eval (F x) (G x) =
mon_lunitor (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G) #⊗ h
· EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
  #⊗ identity (F x)
· ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x
  #⊗ identity (F x) · internal_eval (F x) (G x)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
x: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
(internal_id (G x)
 #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x))
#⊗ h
· (internal_comp (F x) (G x) (G x) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · internal_eval (F x) (G x)) =
mon_lunitor (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G) #⊗ h
· (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
   #⊗ identity (F x)
   · (ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x
      #⊗ identity (F x) · internal_eval (F x) (G x)))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
x: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
(internal_id (G x)
 #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x))
#⊗ h
· (internal_lam
     (mon_lassociator (G x ⊸ G x) (F x ⊸ G x) (F x)
      · identity (G x ⊸ G x)
        #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (G x)
      · internal_eval (G x) (G x)) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · internal_eval (F x) (G x)) =
mon_lunitor (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G) #⊗ h
· (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
   #⊗ identity (F x)
   · (ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x
      #⊗ identity (F x) · internal_eval (F x) (G x)))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
x: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
(internal_id (G x)
 #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x))
#⊗ h
· (mon_lassociator (G x ⊸ G x) (F x ⊸ G x) (F x)
   · identity (G x ⊸ G x) #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (G x)
   · internal_eval (G x) (G x)) =
mon_lunitor (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G) #⊗ h
· (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
   #⊗ identity (F x)
   · (ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x
      #⊗ identity (F x) · internal_eval (F x) (G x)))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
x: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
(internal_id (G x)
 #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x))
#⊗ h · mon_lassociator (G x ⊸ G x) (F x ⊸ G x) (F x)
· identity (G x ⊸ G x) #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (G x)
· internal_eval (G x) (G x) =
mon_lunitor (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G) #⊗ h
· EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
  #⊗ identity (F x)
· ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x
  #⊗ identity (F x) · internal_eval (F x) (G x)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
x: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
mon_lassociator I_{ V} (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G) a
· internal_id (G x)
  #⊗ ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
       · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)
      #⊗ h)
· identity (G x ⊸ G x) #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (G x)
· internal_eval (G x) (G x) =
mon_lunitor (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G) #⊗ h
· EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
  #⊗ identity (F x)
· ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x
  #⊗ identity (F x) · internal_eval (F x) (G x)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
x: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
mon_lassociator I_{ V} (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G) a
· (internal_id (G x)
   #⊗ ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
        · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)
       #⊗ h)
   · (identity (G x ⊸ G x)
      #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (G x)
      · internal_eval (G x) (G x))) =
mon_lunitor (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G) #⊗ h
· (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
   #⊗ identity (F x)
   · (ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x
      #⊗ identity (F x) · internal_eval (F x) (G x)))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
x: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
mon_lassociator I_{ V} (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G) a
· (internal_id (G x)
   #⊗ ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
        · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)
       #⊗ h)
   · (identity (G x ⊸ G x)
      #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (G x)
      · internal_eval (G x) (G x))) = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
x: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
?b =
mon_lunitor (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G) #⊗ h
· (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
   #⊗ identity (F x)
   · (ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x
      #⊗ identity (F x) · internal_eval (F x) (G x)))

· (internal_id (G x)
   #⊗ ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
        · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)
       #⊗ h)
   · (identity (G x ⊸ G x)
      #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (G x)
      · internal_eval (G x) (G x))) = ?b

internal_id (G x)
#⊗ ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x) #⊗ h)
· (identity (G x ⊸ G x) #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (G x)
   · internal_eval (G x) (G x)) = ?t2

PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V

a: V

· identity (G x ⊸ G x) #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (G x)

PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]

a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
(internal_id (G x) · identity (G x ⊸ G x))
#⊗ ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x) #⊗ h
    · internal_eval (F x) (G x))
· internal_eval (G x) (G x) = ?t2

     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x) #⊗ h
    · internal_eval (F x) (G x))
· internal_eval (G x) (G x) = ?t2

PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
x: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
identity I_{ V}
#⊗ ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x) #⊗ h
    · internal_eval (F x) (G x))
· internal_id (G x) #⊗ identity (G x)
· internal_eval (G x) (G x) = ?t2
