EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
x: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
identity I_{ V}
#⊗ ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x) #⊗ h
    · internal_eval (F x) (G x))
· (internal_id (G x) #⊗ identity (G x)
   · internal_eval (G x) (G x)) = ?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
x: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
identity I_{ V}
#⊗ ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x) #⊗ h
    · internal_eval (F x) (G x))
· (internal_lam (mon_lunitor (G x)) #⊗ identity (G x)
   · internal_eval (G x) (G x)) = ?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
x: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
identity I_{ V}
#⊗ ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x) #⊗ h
    · internal_eval (F x) (G x)) · mon_lunitor (G x) =
?t2

        apply idpath.
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
x: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
mon_lassociator I_{ V} (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G) a
· (identity I_{ V}
   #⊗ ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
        · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)
       #⊗ h · internal_eval (F x) (G x))
   · mon_lunitor (G x)) =
mon_lunitor (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G) #⊗ h
· (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
   #⊗ identity (F x)
   · (ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x
      #⊗ identity (F x) · internal_eval (F x) (G x)))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
x: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
mon_lassociator I_{ V} (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G) a
· (mon_lunitor (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G ⊗ a)
   · ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
       · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)
      #⊗ h · internal_eval (F x) (G x))) =
mon_lunitor (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G) #⊗ h
· (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
   #⊗ identity (F x)
   · (ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x
      #⊗ identity (F x) · internal_eval (F x) (G x)))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
x: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
mon_lassociator I_{ V} (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G) a
· mon_lunitor (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G ⊗ a)
· (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (F x) (G x) =
mon_lunitor (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G) #⊗ h
· EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
  #⊗ identity (F x)
· ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x
  #⊗ identity (F x) · internal_eval (F x) (G x)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
x: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
mon_lassociator I_{ V} (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G) a
· mon_lunitor (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G ⊗ a)
· (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x) #⊗ h =
mon_lunitor (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G) #⊗ h
· EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
  #⊗ identity (F x)
· ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x
  #⊗ identity (F x)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
x: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
mon_lunitor (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
#⊗ identity a
· (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x) #⊗ h =
mon_lunitor (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G) #⊗ h
· EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
  #⊗ identity (F x)
· ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x
  #⊗ identity (F x)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
x: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
(mon_lunitor (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
 · (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
    · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x))
#⊗ (identity a · h) =
(mon_lunitor (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
 · EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)
#⊗ (h · identity (F x) · identity (F x))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
x: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
(mon_lunitor (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
 · (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
    · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)) #⊗ h =
(mon_lunitor (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
 · EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x) #⊗ h

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
x: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
(mon_lunitor (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
 · (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
    · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)) #⊗ h =
(mon_lunitor (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
 · (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
    · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)) #⊗ h

      apply idpath.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
∏ x y : [C, V],
mon_runitor (presheaf_enrichment_data ⦃ x, y ⦄) =
identity (presheaf_enrichment_data ⦃ x, y ⦄)
#⊗ enriched_id presheaf_enrichment_data x
· enriched_comp presheaf_enrichment_data x x y
 
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
mon_runitor (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G) =
identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
#⊗ presheaf_enrichment_id F
· presheaf_enrichment_comp F F G

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
mon_runitor (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
· EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G) =
identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
#⊗ presheaf_enrichment_id F
· presheaf_enrichment_comp F F G
· EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
mon_runitor (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
· EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G) =
identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
#⊗ presheaf_enrichment_id F
· EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
    (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G
     ⊗ presheaf_enrichment_hom F F)
    (presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F F G)
    (presheaf_enrichment_comp_laws F F G)
· EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
mon_runitor (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
· EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G) =
identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
#⊗ presheaf_enrichment_id F
· (EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G
      ⊗ presheaf_enrichment_hom F F)
     (presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F F G)
     (presheaf_enrichment_comp_laws F F G)
   · EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
#⊗ presheaf_enrichment_id F
· (EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G
      ⊗ presheaf_enrichment_hom F F)
     (presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F F G)
     (presheaf_enrichment_comp_laws F F G)
   · EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)) =
mon_runitor (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
· EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
#⊗ presheaf_enrichment_id F
· (EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G
      ⊗ presheaf_enrichment_hom F F)
     (presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F F G)
     (presheaf_enrichment_comp_laws F F G)
   · EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)) =
?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
?b =
mon_runitor (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
· EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
#⊗ presheaf_enrichment_id F
· (EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
     (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G
      ⊗ presheaf_enrichment_hom F F)
     (presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F F G)
     (presheaf_enrichment_comp_laws F F G)
   · EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)) =
?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
  (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G
   ⊗ presheaf_enrichment_hom F F)
  (presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F F G)
  (presheaf_enrichment_comp_laws F F G)
· EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G) = ?t2

        apply EqualizerCommutes.
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
#⊗ presheaf_enrichment_id F
· presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F F G =
mon_runitor (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
· EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
∏ i : C,
identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
#⊗ presheaf_enrichment_id F
· presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F F G
· ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) i =
mon_runitor (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
· EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
· ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) i

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
x: C
identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
#⊗ presheaf_enrichment_id F
· presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F F G
· ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x =
mon_runitor (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
· EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
· ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
x: C
identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
#⊗ presheaf_enrichment_id F
· ProductArrow C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x))
    (λ x : C,
     (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
      · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x0 : C, F x0 ⊸ G x0)) x)
     #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F F)
         · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x0 : C, F x0 ⊸ F x0))
             x) · internal_comp (F x) (F x) (G x))
· ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x =
mon_runitor (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
· EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
· ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
x: C
identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
#⊗ presheaf_enrichment_id F
· (ProductArrow C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x))
     (λ x : C,
      (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
       · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x0 : C, F x0 ⊸ G x0)) x)
      #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F F)
          · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x0 : C, F x0 ⊸ F x0))
              x) · internal_comp (F x) (F x) (G x))
   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x) =
mon_runitor (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
· (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
x: C
identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
#⊗ presheaf_enrichment_id F
· (ProductArrow C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x))
     (λ x : C,
      (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
       · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x0 : C, F x0 ⊸ G x0)) x)
      #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F F)
          · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x0 : C, F x0 ⊸ F x0))
              x) · internal_comp (F x) (F x) (G x))
   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x) = 
?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
x: C
?b =
mon_runitor (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
· (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
x: C
identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
#⊗ presheaf_enrichment_id F
· (ProductArrow C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x))
     (λ x : C,
      (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
       · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x0 : C, F x0 ⊸ G x0)) x)
      #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F F)
          · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x0 : C, F x0 ⊸ F x0))
              x) · internal_comp (F x) (F x) (G x))
   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x) = 
?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
x: C
ProductArrow C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x))
  (λ x : C,
   (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
    · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x0 : C, F x0 ⊸ G x0)) x)
   #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F F)
       · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x0 : C, F x0 ⊸ F x0)) x)
   · internal_comp (F x) (F x) (G x))
· ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x = ?t2

        exact (ProductPrCommutes C V _ _ _ _ _).
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
x: C
identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
#⊗ presheaf_enrichment_id F
· ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
    · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)
   #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F F)
       · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ F x)) x)
   · internal_comp (F x) (F x) (G x)) =
mon_runitor (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
· (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)

C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
x: C
identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
#⊗ presheaf_enrichment_id F
· (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)
  #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F F)
      · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ F x)) x)
· internal_comp (F x) (F x) (G x) =
mon_runitor (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
· EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
· ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x

       · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ F x)) x))

  (presheaf_enrichment_id_data F)
  (presheaf_enrichment_id_laws F)

   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ F x)) x) =

EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V

x: C

  (presheaf_enrichment_id_data F)
  (presheaf_enrichment_id_laws F)

V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
x: C
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)
#⊗ internal_id (F x) · internal_comp (F x) (F x) (G x) =
mon_runitor (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
· EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
· ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
x: C
∏ (a : V) (h : V ⟦ a, F x ⟧),
((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
  · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)
 #⊗ internal_id (F x)
 · internal_comp (F x) (F x) (G x)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (F x) (G x) =
(mon_runitor (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
 · EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (F x) (G x)

  · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)
 #⊗ internal_id (F x)
 · internal_comp (F x) (F x) (G x)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (F x) (G x) =
(mon_runitor (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
 · EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)

a: V

?b =

V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
x: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
  · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)
 #⊗ internal_id (F x)
 · internal_comp (F x) (F x) (G x)) #⊗ h = ?y'

        apply tensor_comp_r_id_r.
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
x: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
  · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)
 #⊗ internal_id (F x)) #⊗ h
· internal_comp (F x) (F x) (G x) #⊗ identity (F x)
· internal_eval (F x) (G x) =
(mon_runitor (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
 · EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (F x) (G x)

EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
x: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
  · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)
 #⊗ internal_id (F x)) #⊗ h
· (internal_comp (F x) (F x) (G x) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · internal_eval (F x) (G x)) =
(mon_runitor (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
 · (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
    · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)) #⊗ h

V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
x: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
  · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)
 #⊗ internal_id (F x)) #⊗ h
· (internal_lam
     (mon_lassociator (F x ⊸ G x) (F x ⊸ F x) (F x)
      · identity (F x ⊸ G x)
        #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (F x)
      · internal_eval (F x) (G x)) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · internal_eval (F x) (G x)) =
(mon_runitor (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
 · (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
    · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (F x) (G x)

(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)
#⊗ (internal_id (F x) #⊗ h)
· identity (F x ⊸ G x) #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (F x)
· internal_eval (F x) (G x) = ?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
x: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x
 · identity (F x ⊸ G x))
#⊗ (internal_id (F x) #⊗ h · internal_eval (F x) (F x))
· internal_eval (F x) (G x) = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
x: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
mon_lassociator (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G) I_{ V} a
· ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
    · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)
   #⊗ (identity I_{ V} #⊗ h · mon_lunitor (F x))
   · internal_eval (F x) (G x)) =
(mon_runitor (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
 · (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
    · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (F x) (G x)

x: C

h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
mon_lassociator (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G) I_{ V} a
· ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
    · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)
   #⊗ (mon_lunitor a · h) · internal_eval (F x) (G x)) =
(mon_runitor (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
 · (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
    · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (F x) (G x)

  #⊗ (mon_lunitor a · h) · internal_eval (F x) (G x) =

        apply tensor_comp_r_id_l.
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
x: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
mon_runitor (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
#⊗ identity a
· (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x) #⊗ h =
mon_lassociator (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G) I_{ V} a
· (identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
   #⊗ mon_lunitor a
   · (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
      · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)
     #⊗ h)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat

EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V

F, G: [C, V]
x: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
mon_runitor (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
#⊗ identity a
· (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x) #⊗ h =
mon_lassociator (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G) I_{ V} a
· identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
  #⊗ mon_lunitor a

   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x) #⊗ h

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
x: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, F x ⟧
mon_runitor (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
#⊗ identity a =
mon_lassociator (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G) I_{ V} a
· identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
  #⊗ mon_lunitor a

      apply mon_triangle.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
∏ w x y z : [C, V],
enriched_comp presheaf_enrichment_data x y z
#⊗ identity (presheaf_enrichment_data ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· enriched_comp presheaf_enrichment_data w x z =
mon_lassociator (presheaf_enrichment_data ⦃ y, z ⦄)
  (presheaf_enrichment_data ⦃ x, y ⦄)
  (presheaf_enrichment_data ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· identity (presheaf_enrichment_data ⦃ y, z ⦄)
  #⊗ enriched_comp presheaf_enrichment_data w x y
· enriched_comp presheaf_enrichment_data w y z
 
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: [C, V]
presheaf_enrichment_comp F₂ F₃ F₄
#⊗ identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₂)
· presheaf_enrichment_comp F₁ F₂ F₄ =
mon_lassociator (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₃ F₄)
  (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₃)
  (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₂)
· identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₃ F₄)
  #⊗ presheaf_enrichment_comp F₁ F₂ F₃
· presheaf_enrichment_comp F₁ F₃ F₄

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: [C, V]
presheaf_enrichment_comp F₂ F₃ F₄
#⊗ identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₂)
· presheaf_enrichment_comp F₁ F₂ F₄
· EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₄) =
mon_lassociator (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₃ F₄)
  (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₃)
  (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₂)
· identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₃ F₄)
  #⊗ presheaf_enrichment_comp F₁ F₂ F₃
· presheaf_enrichment_comp F₁ F₃ F₄
· EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₄)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: [C, V]
EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₄)
  (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₃ F₄
   ⊗ presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₃)
  (presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F₂ F₃ F₄)
  (presheaf_enrichment_comp_laws F₂ F₃ F₄)
#⊗ identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₂)
· EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₄)
    (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₄
     ⊗ presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₂)
    (presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F₁ F₂ F₄)
    (presheaf_enrichment_comp_laws F₁ F₂ F₄)
· EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₄) =
mon_lassociator (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₃ F₄)
  (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₃)
  (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₂)
· identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₃ F₄)
  #⊗ EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₃)
       (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₃
        ⊗ presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₂)
       (presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F₁ F₂ F₃)
       (presheaf_enrichment_comp_laws F₁ F₂ F₃)
· EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₄)
    (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₃ F₄
     ⊗ presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₃)
    (presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F₁ F₃ F₄)
    (presheaf_enrichment_comp_laws F₁ F₃ F₄)
· EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₄)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: [C, V]
EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₄)
  (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₃ F₄
   ⊗ presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₃)
  (presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F₂ F₃ F₄)
  (presheaf_enrichment_comp_laws F₂ F₃ F₄)
#⊗ identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₂)
· (EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₄)
     (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₄
      ⊗ presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₂)
     (presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F₁ F₂ F₄)
     (presheaf_enrichment_comp_laws F₁ F₂ F₄)
   · EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₄)) =
mon_lassociator (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₃ F₄)
  (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₃)
  (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₂)
· (identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₃ F₄)
   #⊗ EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₃)
        (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₃
         ⊗ presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₂)
        (presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F₁ F₂ F₃)
        (presheaf_enrichment_comp_laws F₁ F₂ F₃)
   · (EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₄)
        (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₃ F₄
         ⊗ presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₃)
        (presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F₁ F₃ F₄)
        (presheaf_enrichment_comp_laws F₁ F₃ F₄)
      · EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₄)))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: [C, V]
EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₄)
  (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₃ F₄
   ⊗ presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₃)
  (presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F₂ F₃ F₄)
  (presheaf_enrichment_comp_laws F₂ F₃ F₄)
#⊗ identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₂)
· (EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₄)
     (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₄
      ⊗ presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₂)
     (presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F₁ F₂ F₄)
     (presheaf_enrichment_comp_laws F₁ F₂ F₄)
   · EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₄)) =
?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: [C, V]
?b =
mon_lassociator (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₃ F₄)
  (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₃)
  (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₂)
· (identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₃ F₄)
   #⊗ EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₃)
        (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₃
         ⊗ presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₂)
        (presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F₁ F₂ F₃)
        (presheaf_enrichment_comp_laws F₁ F₂ F₃)
   · (EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₄)
        (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₃ F₄
         ⊗ presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₃)
        (presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F₁ F₃ F₄)
        (presheaf_enrichment_comp_laws F₁ F₃ F₄)
      · EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₄)))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: [C, V]
EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₄)
  (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₃ F₄
   ⊗ presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₃)
  (presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F₂ F₃ F₄)
  (presheaf_enrichment_comp_laws F₂ F₃ F₄)
#⊗ identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₂)
· (EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₄)
     (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₄
      ⊗ presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₂)
     (presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F₁ F₂ F₄)
     (presheaf_enrichment_comp_laws F₁ F₂ F₄)
   · EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₄)) =
?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: [C, V]
EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₄)
  (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₄
   ⊗ presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₂)
  (presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F₁ F₂ F₄)
  (presheaf_enrichment_comp_laws F₁ F₂ F₄)
· EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₄) = 
?t2

        apply EqualizerCommutes.
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: [C, V]
EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₄)
  (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₃ F₄
   ⊗ presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₃)
  (presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F₂ F₃ F₄)
  (presheaf_enrichment_comp_laws F₂ F₃ F₄)
#⊗ identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₂)
· presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F₁ F₂ F₄ =
mon_lassociator (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₃ F₄)
  (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₃)
  (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₂)
· (identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₃ F₄)
   #⊗ EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₃)
        (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₃
         ⊗ presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₂)
        (presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F₁ F₂ F₃)
        (presheaf_enrichment_comp_laws F₁ F₂ F₃)
   · (EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₄)
        (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₃ F₄
         ⊗ presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₃)
        (presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F₁ F₃ F₄)
        (presheaf_enrichment_comp_laws F₁ F₃ F₄)
      · EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₄)))

V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: [C, V]
mon_lassociator (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₃ F₄)
  (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₃)
  (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₂)
· (identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₃ F₄)
   #⊗ EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₃)
        (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₃
         ⊗ presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₂)
        (presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F₁ F₂ F₃)
        (presheaf_enrichment_comp_laws F₁ F₂ F₃)
   · presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F₁ F₃ F₄) =

  (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₃ F₄
   ⊗ presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₃)
  (presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F₂ F₃ F₄)

C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: [C, V]
EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₄)
  (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₃ F₄
   ⊗ presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₃)
  (presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F₂ F₃ F₄)
  (presheaf_enrichment_comp_laws F₂ F₃ F₄)
#⊗ identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₂)
· presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F₁ F₂ F₄ =

  (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₃)
  (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₂)
· (identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₃ F₄)
   #⊗ EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₃)
        (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₃
         ⊗ presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₂)
        (presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F₁ F₂ F₃)

V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: [C, V]
∏ i : C,
EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₄)
  (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₃ F₄
   ⊗ presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₃)
  (presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F₂ F₃ F₄)
  (presheaf_enrichment_comp_laws F₂ F₃ F₄)
#⊗ identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₂)
· presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F₁ F₂ F₄
· ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₁ x ⊸ F₄ x)) i =
mon_lassociator (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₃ F₄)
  (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₃)
  (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₂)
· (identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₃ F₄)
   #⊗ EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₃)
        (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₃
         ⊗ presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₂)
        (presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F₁ F₂ F₃)
        (presheaf_enrichment_comp_laws F₁ F₂ F₃)
   · presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F₁ F₃ F₄)
· ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₁ x ⊸ F₄ x)) i

EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: [C, V]
x: C
EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₄)
  (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₃ F₄
   ⊗ presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₃)
  (presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F₂ F₃ F₄)
  (presheaf_enrichment_comp_laws F₂ F₃ F₄)
#⊗ identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₂)
· presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F₁ F₂ F₄
· ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₁ x ⊸ F₄ x)) x =
mon_lassociator (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₃ F₄)
  (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₃)
  (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₂)
· (identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₃ F₄)
   #⊗ EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₃)
        (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₃
         ⊗ presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₂)
        (presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F₁ F₂ F₃)
        (presheaf_enrichment_comp_laws F₁ F₂ F₃)
   · presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F₁ F₃ F₄)
· ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₁ x ⊸ F₄ x)) x

EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V

EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₄)
  (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₃ F₄
   ⊗ presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₃)
  (presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F₂ F₃ F₄)

· (presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F₁ F₂ F₄

  (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₃)

        (presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F₁ F₂ F₃)

   · (presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F₁ F₃ F₄
      · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₁ x ⊸ F₄ x)) x))

V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: [C, V]
x: C
presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F₁ F₂ F₄
· ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₁ x ⊸ F₄ x)) x = ?t2

        exact (ProductPrCommutes C V _ _ _ _ _).
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: [C, V]
x: C
EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₄)
  (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₃ F₄
   ⊗ presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₃)
  (presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F₂ F₃ F₄)
  (presheaf_enrichment_comp_laws F₂ F₃ F₄)
#⊗ identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₂)
· ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₄)
    · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₂ x ⊸ F₄ x)) x)
   #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₂)
       · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₁ x ⊸ F₂ x)) x)
   · internal_comp (F₁ x) (F₂ x) (F₄ x)) =
mon_lassociator (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₃ F₄)
  (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₃)
  (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₂)
· (identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₃ F₄)
   #⊗ EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₃)
        (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₃
         ⊗ presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₂)
        (presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F₁ F₂ F₃)
        (presheaf_enrichment_comp_laws F₁ F₂ F₃)
   · (presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F₁ F₃ F₄
      · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₁ x ⊸ F₄ x)) x))

   · internal_comp (F₁ x) (F₂ x) (F₄ x))

F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: [C, V]
x: C
mon_lassociator (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₃ F₄)
  (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₃)
  (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₂)
· (identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₃ F₄)
   #⊗ EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₃)
        (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₃
         ⊗ presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₂)
        (presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F₁ F₂ F₃)
        (presheaf_enrichment_comp_laws F₁ F₂ F₃)
   · (presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F₁ F₃ F₄
      · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₁ x ⊸ F₄ x)) x)) =
?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: [C, V]
x: C
presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F₁ F₃ F₄
· ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₁ x ⊸ F₄ x)) x = ?t2

        exact (ProductPrCommutes C V _ _ _ _ _).
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: [C, V]
x: C
mon_lassociator (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₃ F₄)
  (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₃)
  (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₂)
· (identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₃ F₄)
   #⊗ EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₃)
        (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₃
         ⊗ presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₂)
        (presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F₁ F₂ F₃)
        (presheaf_enrichment_comp_laws F₁ F₂ F₃)
   · ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₃ F₄)
       · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₃ x ⊸ F₄ x)) x)
      #⊗ (EqualizerArrow
            (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₃)
          · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₁ x ⊸ F₃ x))
              x) · internal_comp (F₁ x) (F₃ x) (F₄ x))) =
EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₄)
  (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₃ F₄
   ⊗ presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₃)
  (presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F₂ F₃ F₄)
  (presheaf_enrichment_comp_laws F₂ F₃ F₄)
#⊗ identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₂)
· ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₄)
    · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₂ x ⊸ F₄ x)) x)
   #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₂)
       · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₁ x ⊸ F₂ x)) x)
   · internal_comp (F₁ x) (F₂ x) (F₄ x))

EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V

F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: [C, V]
x: C
mon_lassociator (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₃ F₄)
  (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₃)
  (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₂)
· identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₃ F₄)
  #⊗ EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₃)
       (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₃
        ⊗ presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₂)
       (presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F₁ F₂ F₃)
       (presheaf_enrichment_comp_laws F₁ F₂ F₃)
· (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₃ F₄)
   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₃ x ⊸ F₄ x)) x)
  #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₃)
      · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₁ x ⊸ F₃ x)) x)
· internal_comp (F₁ x) (F₃ x) (F₄ x) = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: [C, V]
x: C
?b =
(EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₄)
   (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₃ F₄
    ⊗ presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₃)
   (presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F₂ F₃ F₄)
   (presheaf_enrichment_comp_laws F₂ F₃ F₄)
 · (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₄)
    · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₂ x ⊸ F₄ x)) x))
#⊗ (identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₂)
    · (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₂)
       · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₁ x ⊸ F₂ x)) x))
· internal_comp (F₁ x) (F₂ x) (F₄ x)

#⊗ (identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₂)
    · (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₂)
       · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₁ x ⊸ F₂ x)) x))
· internal_comp (F₁ x) (F₂ x) (F₄ x) =
mon_lassociator (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₃ F₄)
  (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₃)
  (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₂)
· (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₃ F₄)
   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₃ x ⊸ F₄ x)) x)
  #⊗ ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₃)
       · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₂ x ⊸ F₃ x)) x)
      #⊗ (EqualizerArrow
            (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₂)
          · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₁ x ⊸ F₂ x))
              x) · internal_comp (F₁ x) (F₂ x) (F₃ x))
· internal_comp (F₁ x) (F₃ x) (F₄ x)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: [C, V]
x: C
(EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₄)
   (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₃ F₄
    ⊗ presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₃)
   (presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F₂ F₃ F₄)
   (presheaf_enrichment_comp_laws F₂ F₃ F₄)
 · (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₄)
    · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₂ x ⊸ F₄ x)) x))
#⊗ (identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₂)
    · (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₂)
       · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₁ x ⊸ F₂ x)) x))
· internal_comp (F₁ x) (F₂ x) (F₄ x) = ?b

PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: [C, V]
x: C
?b =
mon_lassociator (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₃ F₄)
  (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₃)
  (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₂)
· (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₃ F₄)
   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₃ x ⊸ F₄ x)) x)
  #⊗ ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₃)
       · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₂ x ⊸ F₃ x)) x)

              x) · internal_comp (F₁ x) (F₂ x) (F₃ x))
· internal_comp (F₁ x) (F₃ x) (F₄ x)

V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: [C, V]
x: C
EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₄)
  (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₃ F₄
   ⊗ presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₃)
  (presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F₂ F₃ F₄)
  (presheaf_enrichment_comp_laws F₂ F₃ F₄)
· (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₄)
   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₂ x ⊸ F₄ x)) x) =
?y'

  (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₃ F₄
   ⊗ presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₃)
  (presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F₂ F₃ F₄)
  (presheaf_enrichment_comp_laws F₂ F₃ F₄)
· EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₄)
· ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₂ x ⊸ F₄ x)) x = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat

EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: [C, V]
x: C
?b = ?y'

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: [C, V]
x: C
EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₄)
  (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₃ F₄
   ⊗ presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₃)
  (presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F₂ F₃ F₄)
  (presheaf_enrichment_comp_laws F₂ F₃ F₄)
· EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₄)
· ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₂ x ⊸ F₄ x)) x = ?b

          
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: [C, V]
x: C
EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₄)
  (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₃ F₄
   ⊗ presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₃)
  (presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F₂ F₃ F₄)
  (presheaf_enrichment_comp_laws F₂ F₃ F₄)
· EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₄) =
?y'0

          apply EqualizerCommutes.
        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: [C, V]
x: C
presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F₂ F₃ F₄
· ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₂ x ⊸ F₄ x)) x = ?y'

        exact (ProductPrCommutes C V _ _ _ _ _).
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V

x: C
((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₃ F₄)
  · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₃ x ⊸ F₄ x)) x)
 #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₃)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₂ x ⊸ F₃ x)) x)
 · internal_comp (F₂ x) (F₃ x) (F₄ x))
#⊗ (identity (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₂)
    · (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₂)
       · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₁ x ⊸ F₂ x)) x))
· internal_comp (F₁ x) (F₂ x) (F₄ x) =
mon_lassociator (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₃ F₄)
  (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₃)
  (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₂)
· (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₃ F₄)
   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₃ x ⊸ F₄ x)) x)
  #⊗ ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₃)
       · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₂ x ⊸ F₃ x)) x)
      #⊗ (EqualizerArrow
            (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₂)
          · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₁ x ⊸ F₂ x))
              x) · internal_comp (F₁ x) (F₂ x) (F₃ x))
· internal_comp (F₁ x) (F₃ x) (F₄ x)

  (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₃)
  (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₂)
· (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₃ F₄)
   #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₃)
       #⊗ EqualizerArrow
            (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₂)
       · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₂ x ⊸ F₃ x)) x
         #⊗ ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₁ x ⊸ F₂ x))

V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: [C, V]
x: C
mon_lassociator (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₃ F₄)
  (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₃)
  (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₂)
· (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₃ F₄)
   #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₃)
       #⊗ EqualizerArrow
            (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₂))
   · identity (PV (λ x : C, F₃ x ⊸ F₄ x))
     #⊗ (ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₂ x ⊸ F₃ x)) x
         #⊗ ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₁ x ⊸ F₂ x))
              x)
   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₃ x ⊸ F₄ x)) x
     #⊗ internal_comp (F₁ x) (F₂ x) (F₃ x))
· internal_comp (F₁ x) (F₃ x) (F₄ x) = ?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: [C, V]
x: C
mon_lassociator (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₃ F₄)
  (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₃)
  (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₂)
· EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₃ F₄)
  #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₃)
      #⊗ EqualizerArrow
           (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₂))
· identity (PV (λ x : C, F₃ x ⊸ F₄ x))
  #⊗ (ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₂ x ⊸ F₃ x)) x
      #⊗ ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₁ x ⊸ F₂ x)) x)
· ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₃ x ⊸ F₄ x)) x
  #⊗ internal_comp (F₁ x) (F₂ x) (F₃ x)
· internal_comp (F₁ x) (F₃ x) (F₄ x) = ?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: [C, V]
x: C
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₃ F₄)
 #⊗ EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₃))
#⊗ EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₂)
· mon_lassociator (PV (λ x : C, F₃ x ⊸ F₄ x))
    (PV (λ x : C, F₂ x ⊸ F₃ x))
    (PV (λ x : C, F₁ x ⊸ F₂ x))
· identity (PV (λ x : C, F₃ x ⊸ F₄ x))
  #⊗ (ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₂ x ⊸ F₃ x)) x
      #⊗ ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₁ x ⊸ F₂ x)) x)
· ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₃ x ⊸ F₄ x)) x
  #⊗ internal_comp (F₁ x) (F₂ x) (F₃ x)
· internal_comp (F₁ x) (F₃ x) (F₄ x) = ?b

        apply idpath.
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: [C, V]
x: C
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₃ F₄)
 #⊗ EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₃))
#⊗ EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₂)
· mon_lassociator (PV (λ x : C, F₃ x ⊸ F₄ x))
    (PV (λ x : C, F₂ x ⊸ F₃ x))
    (PV (λ x : C, F₁ x ⊸ F₂ x))
· identity (PV (λ x : C, F₃ x ⊸ F₄ x))
  #⊗ (ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₂ x ⊸ F₃ x)) x
      #⊗ ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₁ x ⊸ F₂ x)) x)
· ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₃ x ⊸ F₄ x)) x
  #⊗ internal_comp (F₁ x) (F₂ x) (F₃ x)
· internal_comp (F₁ x) (F₃ x) (F₄ x) =
((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₃ F₄)
  · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₃ x ⊸ F₄ x)) x)
 #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₃)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₂ x ⊸ F₃ x)) x)
 · internal_comp (F₂ x) (F₃ x) (F₄ x))
#⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₂)
    · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₁ x ⊸ F₂ x)) x)
· internal_comp (F₁ x) (F₂ x) (F₄ x)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: [C, V]
x: C
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₃ F₄)
 #⊗ EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₃))
#⊗ EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₂)
· (mon_lassociator (PV (λ x : C, F₃ x ⊸ F₄ x))
     (PV (λ x : C, F₂ x ⊸ F₃ x))
     (PV (λ x : C, F₁ x ⊸ F₂ x))
   · (identity (PV (λ x : C, F₃ x ⊸ F₄ x))
      #⊗ (ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₂ x ⊸ F₃ x)) x
          #⊗ ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₁ x ⊸ F₂ x))
               x)
      · (ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₃ x ⊸ F₄ x)) x
         #⊗ internal_comp (F₁ x) (F₂ x) (F₃ x)
         · internal_comp (F₁ x) (F₃ x) (F₄ x)))) =
((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₃ F₄)
  · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₃ x ⊸ F₄ x)) x)
 #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₃)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₂ x ⊸ F₃ x)) x)
 · internal_comp (F₂ x) (F₃ x) (F₄ x))
#⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₂)
    · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₁ x ⊸ F₂ x)) x)
· internal_comp (F₁ x) (F₂ x) (F₄ x)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: [C, V]
x: C
((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₃ F₄)
  · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₃ x ⊸ F₄ x)) x)
 #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₃)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₂ x ⊸ F₃ x)) x)
 · internal_comp (F₂ x) (F₃ x) (F₄ x))
#⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₂)
    · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₁ x ⊸ F₂ x)) x)
· internal_comp (F₁ x) (F₂ x) (F₄ x) =
(EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₃ F₄)
 #⊗ EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₃))
#⊗ EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₂)
· (mon_lassociator (PV (λ x : C, F₃ x ⊸ F₄ x))
     (PV (λ x : C, F₂ x ⊸ F₃ x))
     (PV (λ x : C, F₁ x ⊸ F₂ x))
   · (identity (PV (λ x : C, F₃ x ⊸ F₄ x))
      #⊗ (ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₂ x ⊸ F₃ x)) x
          #⊗ ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₁ x ⊸ F₂ x))
               x)
      · (ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₃ x ⊸ F₄ x)) x
         #⊗ internal_comp (F₁ x) (F₂ x) (F₃ x)
         · internal_comp (F₁ x) (F₃ x) (F₄ x))))

  · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₃ x ⊸ F₄ x)) x)
 #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₃)
     · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₂ x ⊸ F₃ x)) x)
 · internal_comp (F₂ x) (F₃ x) (F₄ x))
#⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₂)
    · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₁ x ⊸ F₂ x)) x)
· internal_comp (F₁ x) (F₂ x) (F₄ x) = ?b

 #⊗ EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₃))
#⊗ EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₂)

     (PV (λ x : C, F₂ x ⊸ F₃ x))

         #⊗ internal_comp (F₁ x) (F₂ x) (F₃ x)

   #⊗ ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₂ x ⊸ F₃ x)) x)
  #⊗ identity (PV (λ x : C, F₁ x ⊸ F₂ x))

 #⊗ EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₃))
#⊗ EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₂)
· ((ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₃ x ⊸ F₄ x)) x
    #⊗ ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₂ x ⊸ F₃ x)) x)
   #⊗ identity (PV (λ x : C, F₁ x ⊸ F₂ x))

      #⊗ ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₁ x ⊸ F₂ x)) x

 #⊗ EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₂ F₃))
#⊗ EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F₁ F₂)

    #⊗ ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₂ x ⊸ F₃ x)) x)

· (mon_lassociator (PV (λ x : C, F₃ x ⊸ F₄ x))
     (PV (λ x : C, F₂ x ⊸ F₃ x))
     (PV (λ x : C, F₁ x ⊸ F₂ x))
   · (identity (PV (λ x : C, F₃ x ⊸ F₄ x))
      #⊗ (ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₂ x ⊸ F₃ x)) x
          #⊗ ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₁ x ⊸ F₂ x))
               x)
      · (ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₃ x ⊸ F₄ x)) x

V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: [C, V]
x: C
(ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₃ x ⊸ F₄ x)) x
 #⊗ ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₂ x ⊸ F₃ x)) x)
#⊗ identity (PV (λ x : C, F₁ x ⊸ F₂ x))
· (internal_comp (F₂ x) (F₃ x) (F₄ x)
   #⊗ ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₁ x ⊸ F₂ x)) x
   · internal_comp (F₁ x) (F₂ x) (F₄ x)) =
mon_lassociator (PV (λ x : C, F₃ x ⊸ F₄ x))
  (PV (λ x : C, F₂ x ⊸ F₃ x))
  (PV (λ x : C, F₁ x ⊸ F₂ x))
· (identity (PV (λ x : C, F₃ x ⊸ F₄ x))
   #⊗ (ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₂ x ⊸ F₃ x)) x
       #⊗ ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₁ x ⊸ F₂ x)) x)
   · (ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₃ x ⊸ F₄ x)) x
      #⊗ internal_comp (F₁ x) (F₂ x) (F₃ x)
      · internal_comp (F₁ x) (F₃ x) (F₄ x)))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: [C, V]
x: C
(ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₃ x ⊸ F₄ x)) x
 #⊗ ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₂ x ⊸ F₃ x)) x)
#⊗ identity (PV (λ x : C, F₁ x ⊸ F₂ x))
· internal_comp (F₂ x) (F₃ x) (F₄ x)
  #⊗ ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₁ x ⊸ F₂ x)) x
· internal_comp (F₁ x) (F₂ x) (F₄ x) =
mon_lassociator (PV (λ x : C, F₃ x ⊸ F₄ x))
  (PV (λ x : C, F₂ x ⊸ F₃ x))
  (PV (λ x : C, F₁ x ⊸ F₂ x))
· identity (PV (λ x : C, F₃ x ⊸ F₄ x))
  #⊗ (ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₂ x ⊸ F₃ x)) x
      #⊗ ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₁ x ⊸ F₂ x)) x)
· ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₃ x ⊸ F₄ x)) x
  #⊗ internal_comp (F₁ x) (F₂ x) (F₃ x)
· internal_comp (F₁ x) (F₃ x) (F₄ x)

 #⊗ ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₂ x ⊸ F₃ x)) x)
#⊗ identity (PV (λ x : C, F₁ x ⊸ F₂ x))
· internal_comp (F₂ x) (F₃ x) (F₄ x)
  #⊗ ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₁ x ⊸ F₂ x)) x
· internal_comp (F₁ x) (F₂ x) (F₄ x) = ?b

C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: [C, V]
x: C
(ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₃ x ⊸ F₄ x)) x
 #⊗ ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₂ x ⊸ F₃ x)) x)
#⊗ ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₁ x ⊸ F₂ x)) x = ?y'

        apply idpath.
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: [C, V]
x: C
(ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₃ x ⊸ F₄ x)) x
 #⊗ ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₂ x ⊸ F₃ x)) x)
#⊗ ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₁ x ⊸ F₂ x)) x
· internal_comp (F₂ x) (F₃ x) (F₄ x)
  #⊗ identity (F₁ x ⊸ F₂ x)
· internal_comp (F₁ x) (F₂ x) (F₄ x) =
mon_lassociator (PV (λ x : C, F₃ x ⊸ F₄ x))
  (PV (λ x : C, F₂ x ⊸ F₃ x))
  (PV (λ x : C, F₁ x ⊸ F₂ x))
· identity (PV (λ x : C, F₃ x ⊸ F₄ x))
  #⊗ (ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₂ x ⊸ F₃ x)) x
      #⊗ ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₁ x ⊸ F₂ x)) x)
· ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₃ x ⊸ F₄ x)) x
  #⊗ internal_comp (F₁ x) (F₂ x) (F₃ x)
· internal_comp (F₁ x) (F₃ x) (F₄ x)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: [C, V]
x: C
mon_lassociator (PV (λ x : C, F₃ x ⊸ F₄ x))
  (PV (λ x : C, F₂ x ⊸ F₃ x))
  (PV (λ x : C, F₁ x ⊸ F₂ x))
· identity (PV (λ x : C, F₃ x ⊸ F₄ x))
  #⊗ (ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₂ x ⊸ F₃ x)) x
      #⊗ ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₁ x ⊸ F₂ x)) x)
· ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₃ x ⊸ F₄ x)) x
  #⊗ internal_comp (F₁ x) (F₂ x) (F₃ x)
· internal_comp (F₁ x) (F₃ x) (F₄ x) =
(ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₃ x ⊸ F₄ x)) x
 #⊗ ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₂ x ⊸ F₃ x)) x)
#⊗ ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₁ x ⊸ F₂ x)) x
· internal_comp (F₂ x) (F₃ x) (F₄ x)
  #⊗ identity (F₁ x ⊸ F₂ x)
· internal_comp (F₁ x) (F₂ x) (F₄ x)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat

EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V

x: C
mon_lassociator (PV (λ x : C, F₃ x ⊸ F₄ x))
  (PV (λ x : C, F₂ x ⊸ F₃ x))
  (PV (λ x : C, F₁ x ⊸ F₂ x))
· identity (PV (λ x : C, F₃ x ⊸ F₄ x))
  #⊗ (ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₂ x ⊸ F₃ x)) x
      #⊗ ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₁ x ⊸ F₂ x)) x)
· ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₃ x ⊸ F₄ x)) x
  #⊗ internal_comp (F₁ x) (F₂ x) (F₃ x)
· internal_comp (F₁ x) (F₃ x) (F₄ x) = ?b

· internal_comp (F₂ x) (F₃ x) (F₄ x)
  #⊗ identity (F₁ x ⊸ F₂ x)

  #⊗ (ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₂ x ⊸ F₃ x)) x

V: sym_mon_closed_cat

EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: [C, V]
x: C
ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₃ x ⊸ F₄ x)) x
#⊗ identity ((F₂ x ⊸ F₃ x) ⊗ (F₁ x ⊸ F₂ x))
· identity (F₃ x ⊸ F₄ x)
  #⊗ internal_comp (F₁ x) (F₂ x) (F₃ x) = ?t2

          apply idpath.

   · identity (F₃ x ⊸ F₄ x)

  (PV (λ x : C, F₂ x ⊸ F₃ x))
  (PV (λ x : C, F₁ x ⊸ F₂ x))
· (identity (PV (λ x : C, F₃ x ⊸ F₄ x))
   #⊗ (ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₂ x ⊸ F₃ x)) x

· (identity (PV (λ x : C, F₃ x ⊸ F₄ x))

V: sym_mon_closed_cat

EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: [C, V]
x: C
(ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₃ x ⊸ F₄ x)) x
 #⊗ ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₂ x ⊸ F₃ x)) x)
#⊗ ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₁ x ⊸ F₂ x)) x
· mon_lassociator (F₃ x ⊸ F₄ x) (F₂ x ⊸ F₃ x)
    (F₁ x ⊸ F₂ x) = ?y'

        apply idpath.
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: [C, V]
x: C
(ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₃ x ⊸ F₄ x)) x
 #⊗ ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₂ x ⊸ F₃ x)) x)
#⊗ ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₁ x ⊸ F₂ x)) x
· mon_lassociator (F₃ x ⊸ F₄ x) (F₂ x ⊸ F₃ x)
    (F₁ x ⊸ F₂ x)
· identity (F₃ x ⊸ F₄ x)
  #⊗ internal_comp (F₁ x) (F₂ x) (F₃ x)
· internal_comp (F₁ x) (F₃ x) (F₄ x) =
(ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₃ x ⊸ F₄ x)) x
 #⊗ ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₂ x ⊸ F₃ x)) x)
#⊗ ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₁ x ⊸ F₂ x)) x
· internal_comp (F₂ x) (F₃ x) (F₄ x)
  #⊗ identity (F₁ x ⊸ F₂ x)
· internal_comp (F₁ x) (F₂ x) (F₄ x)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: [C, V]
x: C
(ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₃ x ⊸ F₄ x)) x
 #⊗ ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₂ x ⊸ F₃ x)) x)
#⊗ ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₁ x ⊸ F₂ x)) x
· (mon_lassociator (F₃ x ⊸ F₄ x) (F₂ x ⊸ F₃ x)
     (F₁ x ⊸ F₂ x)
   · (identity (F₃ x ⊸ F₄ x)
      #⊗ internal_comp (F₁ x) (F₂ x) (F₃ x)
      · internal_comp (F₁ x) (F₃ x) (F₄ x))) =
(ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₃ x ⊸ F₄ x)) x
 #⊗ ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₂ x ⊸ F₃ x)) x)
#⊗ ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F₁ x ⊸ F₂ x)) x
· (internal_comp (F₂ x) (F₃ x) (F₄ x)
   #⊗ identity (F₁ x ⊸ F₂ x)
   · internal_comp (F₁ x) (F₂ x) (F₄ x))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: [C, V]
x: C
mon_lassociator (F₃ x ⊸ F₄ x) (F₂ x ⊸ F₃ x)
  (F₁ x ⊸ F₂ x)
· (identity (F₃ x ⊸ F₄ x)
   #⊗ internal_comp (F₁ x) (F₂ x) (F₃ x)
   · internal_comp (F₁ x) (F₃ x) (F₄ x)) =
internal_comp (F₂ x) (F₃ x) (F₄ x)
#⊗ identity (F₁ x ⊸ F₂ x)
· internal_comp (F₁ x) (F₂ x) (F₄ x)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: [C, V]
x: C
mon_lassociator (F₃ x ⊸ F₄ x) (F₂ x ⊸ F₃ x)
  (F₁ x ⊸ F₂ x)
· (identity (F₃ x ⊸ F₄ x)
   #⊗ internal_comp (F₁ x) (F₂ x) (F₃ x)
   · internal_comp (F₁ x) (F₃ x) (F₄ x)) =
mon_lassociator (F₃ x ⊸ F₄ x) (F₂ x ⊸ F₃ x)
  (F₁ x ⊸ F₂ x)
· identity (F₃ x ⊸ F₄ x)
  #⊗ internal_comp (F₁ x) (F₂ x) (F₃ x)
· internal_comp (F₁ x) (F₃ x) (F₄ x)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: [C, V]
x: C
mon_lassociator (F₃ x ⊸ F₄ x) (F₂ x ⊸ F₃ x)
  (F₁ x ⊸ F₂ x)
· identity (F₃ x ⊸ F₄ x)
  #⊗ internal_comp (F₁ x) (F₂ x) (F₃ x)
· internal_comp (F₁ x) (F₃ x) (F₄ x) =
mon_lassociator (F₃ x ⊸ F₄ x) (F₂ x ⊸ F₃ x)
  (F₁ x ⊸ F₂ x)
· identity (F₃ x ⊸ F₄ x)
  #⊗ internal_comp (F₁ x) (F₂ x) (F₃ x)
· internal_comp (F₁ x) (F₃ x) (F₄ x)

      apply idpath.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
∏ (x y : [C, V]) (f : [C, V] ⟦ x, y ⟧),
enriched_to_arr presheaf_enrichment_data
  (enriched_from_arr presheaf_enrichment_data f) = f
 
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
presheaf_enrichment_to_arr
  (presheaf_enrichment_from_arr τ) = τ

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
∏ x : C,
presheaf_enrichment_to_arr
  (presheaf_enrichment_from_arr τ) x = τ x

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
x: C
presheaf_enrichment_to_arr_data
  (presheaf_enrichment_from_arr τ) x = τ x

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
x: C
internal_to_arr
  (EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G) I_{ V}
     (presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_data τ)
     (presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_laws τ)
   · EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x) = 
τ x

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
x: C
internal_to_arr
  (EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G) I_{ V}
     (presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_data τ)
     (presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_laws τ)
   · EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x) = 
?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
x: C
?b = τ x

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
x: C
internal_to_arr
  (EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G) I_{ V}
     (presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_data τ)
     (presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_laws τ)
   · EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x) = 
?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
x: C
EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G) I_{ V}
  (presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_data τ)
  (presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_laws τ)
· EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
· ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x = ?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
x: C
EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G) I_{ V}
  (presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_data τ)
  (presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_laws τ)
· EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G) = ?y'

        apply EqualizerCommutes.
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
x: C
internal_to_arr
  (presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_data τ
   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x) = 
τ x

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
x: C
internal_to_arr
  (ProductArrow C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x))
     (λ x : C, internal_from_arr (τ x))
   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x) = 
τ x

EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
x: C
internal_to_arr
  (ProductArrow C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x))
     (λ x : C, internal_from_arr (τ x))
   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x) = 
?b

C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
x: C
?b = τ x

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
x: C
internal_to_arr
  (ProductArrow C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x))
     (λ x : C, internal_from_arr (τ x))
   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x) = 
?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
x: C
ProductArrow C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x))
  (λ x : C, internal_from_arr (τ x))
· ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x = ?t2

        exact (ProductPrCommutes C V _ _ _ _ _).
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
x: C
internal_to_arr (internal_from_arr (τ x)) = τ x

      apply internal_to_from_arr.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
∏ (x y : [C, V])
(f : V ⟦ I_{ V}, presheaf_enrichment_data ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧),
enriched_from_arr presheaf_enrichment_data
  (enriched_to_arr presheaf_enrichment_data f) = f
 
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
τ: V ⟦ I_{ V}, presheaf_enrichment_data ⦃ F, G ⦄ ⟧
presheaf_enrichment_from_arr
  (presheaf_enrichment_to_arr τ) = τ

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
τ: V ⟦ I_{ V}, presheaf_enrichment_data ⦃ F, G ⦄ ⟧
EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G) I_{ V}
  (presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_data
     (make_nat_trans F G
        (presheaf_enrichment_to_arr_data τ)
        (presheaf_enrichment_to_arr_laws τ)))
  (presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_laws
     (make_nat_trans F G
        (presheaf_enrichment_to_arr_data τ)
        (presheaf_enrichment_to_arr_laws τ))) = τ

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
τ: V ⟦ I_{ V}, presheaf_enrichment_data ⦃ F, G ⦄ ⟧
EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G) I_{ V}
  (presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_data
     (make_nat_trans F G
        (presheaf_enrichment_to_arr_data τ)
        (presheaf_enrichment_to_arr_laws τ)))
  (presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_laws
     (make_nat_trans F G
        (presheaf_enrichment_to_arr_data τ)
        (presheaf_enrichment_to_arr_laws τ)))
· EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G) =
τ · EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
τ: V ⟦ I_{ V}, presheaf_enrichment_data ⦃ F, G ⦄ ⟧
presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_data
  (make_nat_trans F G
     (presheaf_enrichment_to_arr_data τ)
     (presheaf_enrichment_to_arr_laws τ)) =
τ · EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
τ: V ⟦ I_{ V}, presheaf_enrichment_data ⦃ F, G ⦄ ⟧
ProductArrow C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x))
  (λ x : C,
   internal_from_arr
     (make_nat_trans F G
        (presheaf_enrichment_to_arr_data τ)
        (presheaf_enrichment_to_arr_laws τ) x)) =
τ · EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
τ: V ⟦ I_{ V}, presheaf_enrichment_data ⦃ F, G ⦄ ⟧
∏ i : C,
ProductArrow C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x))
  (λ x : C,
   internal_from_arr
     (make_nat_trans F G
        (presheaf_enrichment_to_arr_data τ)
        (presheaf_enrichment_to_arr_laws τ) x))
· ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) i =
τ · EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
· ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) i

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
τ: V ⟦ I_{ V}, presheaf_enrichment_data ⦃ F, G ⦄ ⟧
x: C
ProductArrow C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x))
  (λ x : C,
   internal_from_arr
     (make_nat_trans F G
        (presheaf_enrichment_to_arr_data τ)
        (presheaf_enrichment_to_arr_laws τ) x))
· ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x =
τ · EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
· ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
τ: V ⟦ I_{ V}, presheaf_enrichment_data ⦃ F, G ⦄ ⟧
x: C
ProductArrow C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x))
  (λ x : C,
   internal_from_arr
     (make_nat_trans F G
        (presheaf_enrichment_to_arr_data τ)
        (presheaf_enrichment_to_arr_laws τ) x))
· ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
τ: V ⟦ I_{ V}, presheaf_enrichment_data ⦃ F, G ⦄ ⟧
x: C
?b =
τ · EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
· ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
τ: V ⟦ I_{ V}, presheaf_enrichment_data ⦃ F, G ⦄ ⟧
x: C
ProductArrow C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x))
  (λ x : C,
   internal_from_arr
     (make_nat_trans F G
        (presheaf_enrichment_to_arr_data τ)
        (presheaf_enrichment_to_arr_laws τ) x))
· ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x = ?b

        exact (ProductPrCommutes C V _ _ _ _ _).
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
τ: V ⟦ I_{ V}, presheaf_enrichment_data ⦃ F, G ⦄ ⟧
x: C
internal_from_arr
  (make_nat_trans F G
     (presheaf_enrichment_to_arr_data τ)
     (presheaf_enrichment_to_arr_laws τ) x) =
τ · EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
· ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
τ: V ⟦ I_{ V}, presheaf_enrichment_data ⦃ F, G ⦄ ⟧
x: C
internal_from_arr
  (presheaf_enrichment_to_arr_data τ x) =
τ · EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
· ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G: [C, V]
τ: V ⟦ I_{ V}, presheaf_enrichment_data ⦃ F, G ⦄ ⟧
x: C
internal_from_arr
  (internal_to_arr
     (τ · EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
      · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)) =
τ · EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
· ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x

      apply internal_from_to_arr.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
∏ x : [C, V],
enriched_to_arr presheaf_enrichment_data
  (enriched_id presheaf_enrichment_data x) =
identity x
 
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F: [C, V]
enriched_to_arr presheaf_enrichment_data
  (enriched_id presheaf_enrichment_data F) =
identity F

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F: [C, V]
∏ x : C,
enriched_to_arr presheaf_enrichment_data
  (enriched_id presheaf_enrichment_data F) x =
identity F x

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F: [C, V]
x: C
presheaf_enrichment_to_arr_data
  (presheaf_enrichment_id F) x = identity (pr1 F x)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F: [C, V]

internal_to_arr
  (EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom F F) I_{ V}
     (presheaf_enrichment_id_data F)
     (presheaf_enrichment_id_laws F)
   · EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F F)
   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ F x)) x) =
identity (pr1 F x)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat

EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V

  (EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom F F) I_{ V}
     (presheaf_enrichment_id_data F)
     (presheaf_enrichment_id_laws F)
   · EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F F)
   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ F x)) x) = 
?b

C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F: [C, V]
x: C
?b = identity (pr1 F x)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F: [C, V]
x: C
internal_to_arr
  (EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom F F) I_{ V}
     (presheaf_enrichment_id_data F)
     (presheaf_enrichment_id_laws F)
   · EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F F)
   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ F x)) x) = 
?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F: [C, V]
x: C
EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom F F) I_{ V}
  (presheaf_enrichment_id_data F)
  (presheaf_enrichment_id_laws F)
· EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F F)
· ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ F x)) x = ?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F: [C, V]
x: C
EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom F F) I_{ V}
  (presheaf_enrichment_id_data F)
  (presheaf_enrichment_id_laws F)
· EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F F) = ?y'

        apply EqualizerCommutes.
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F: [C, V]
x: C
internal_to_arr
  (presheaf_enrichment_id_data F
   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ F x)) x) =
identity (pr1 F x)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat

EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V

internal_to_arr
  (presheaf_enrichment_id_data F
   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ F x)) x) =
identity (pr1 F x)
