EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F: [C, V]
x: C
internal_to_arr
  (presheaf_enrichment_id_data F
   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ F x)) x) = 
?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F: [C, V]
x: C
?b = identity (pr1 F x)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F: [C, V]
x: C
internal_to_arr
  (presheaf_enrichment_id_data F
   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ F x)) x) = 
?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F: [C, V]
x: C
presheaf_enrichment_id_data F
· ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ F x)) x = ?t2

        exact (ProductPrCommutes C V _ _ _ _ _).
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F: [C, V]
x: C
internal_to_arr (internal_id (F x)) =
identity (pr1 F x)

      apply internal_to_arr_id.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
∏ (x y z : [C, V]) (f : [C, V] ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : [C, V] ⟦ y, z ⟧),
f · g =
enriched_to_arr presheaf_enrichment_data
  (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
   · enriched_from_arr presheaf_enrichment_data g
     #⊗ enriched_from_arr presheaf_enrichment_data f
   · enriched_comp presheaf_enrichment_data x y z)
 
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: [C, V] ⟦ G, H ⟧
τ · θ =
enriched_to_arr presheaf_enrichment_data
  (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
   · enriched_from_arr presheaf_enrichment_data θ
     #⊗ enriched_from_arr presheaf_enrichment_data τ
   · enriched_comp presheaf_enrichment_data F G H)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: [C, V] ⟦ G, H ⟧
∏ x : C,
(τ · θ) x =
enriched_to_arr presheaf_enrichment_data
  (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
   · enriched_from_arr presheaf_enrichment_data θ
     #⊗ enriched_from_arr presheaf_enrichment_data τ
   · enriched_comp presheaf_enrichment_data F G H) x

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: [C, V] ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C
τ x · θ x =
presheaf_enrichment_to_arr_data
  (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
   · presheaf_enrichment_from_arr θ
     #⊗ presheaf_enrichment_from_arr τ
   · presheaf_enrichment_comp F G H) x

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: [C, V] ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C
τ x · θ x =
internal_to_arr
  (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
   · EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H) I_{ V}
       (presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_data θ)
       (presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_laws θ)
     #⊗ EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
          I_{ V} (presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_data τ)
          (presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_laws τ)
   · presheaf_enrichment_comp F G H
   · EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F H)
   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ H x)) x)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: [C, V] ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C
τ x · θ x =
internal_to_arr
  (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
   · (EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H) I_{ V}
        (presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_data θ)
        (presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_laws θ)
      #⊗ EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
           I_{ V}
           (presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_data τ)
           (presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_laws τ)
      · (presheaf_enrichment_comp F G H
         · (EqualizerArrow
              (presheaf_enrichment_hom F H)
            · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ H x))
                x))))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: [C, V] ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C
internal_to_arr
  (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
   · (EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H) I_{ V}
        (presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_data θ)
        (presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_laws θ)
      #⊗ EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
           I_{ V}
           (presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_data τ)
           (presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_laws τ)
      · (presheaf_enrichment_comp F G H
         · (EqualizerArrow
              (presheaf_enrichment_hom F H)
            · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ H x))
                x)))) = τ x · θ x

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: [C, V] ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C
internal_to_arr
  (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
   · (EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H) I_{ V}
        (presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_data θ)
        (presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_laws θ)
      #⊗ EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
           I_{ V}
           (presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_data τ)
           (presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_laws τ)
      · (presheaf_enrichment_comp F G H
         · (EqualizerArrow
              (presheaf_enrichment_hom F H)
            · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ H x))
                x)))) = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: [C, V] ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C
?b = τ x · θ x

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: [C, V] ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C
internal_to_arr
  (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
   · (EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H) I_{ V}
        (presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_data θ)
        (presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_laws θ)
      #⊗ EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
           I_{ V}
           (presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_data τ)
           (presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_laws τ)
      · (presheaf_enrichment_comp F G H
         · (EqualizerArrow
              (presheaf_enrichment_hom F H)
            · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ H x))
                x)))) = ?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: [C, V] ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C
presheaf_enrichment_comp F G H
· (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F H)
   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ H x)) x) = 
?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: [C, V] ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C
presheaf_enrichment_comp F G H
· EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F H)
· ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ H x)) x = ?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: [C, V] ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C
presheaf_enrichment_comp F G H
· EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F H)
· ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ H x)) x = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: [C, V] ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C
?b = ?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: [C, V] ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C
presheaf_enrichment_comp F G H
· EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F H)
· ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ H x)) x = ?b

          
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: [C, V] ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C
presheaf_enrichment_comp F G H
· EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F H) = ?y'

          apply EqualizerCommutes.
        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: [C, V] ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C
presheaf_enrichment_comp_data F G H
· ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ H x)) x = ?t2

        exact (ProductPrCommutes C V _ _ _ _ _).
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: [C, V] ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C
internal_to_arr
  (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
   · (EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H) I_{ V}
        (presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_data θ)
        (presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_laws θ)
      #⊗ EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
           I_{ V}
           (presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_data τ)
           (presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_laws τ)
      · ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
          · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) x)
         #⊗ (EqualizerArrow
               (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
             · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x))
                 x) · internal_comp (F x) (G x) (H x)))) =
τ x · θ x

EqV: Equalizers V

internal_to_arr
  (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
   · (EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H) I_{ V}
        (presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_data θ)
        (presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_laws θ)
      #⊗ EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
           I_{ V}
           (presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_data τ)
           (presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_laws τ)
      · ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
          · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) x)
         #⊗ (EqualizerArrow
               (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
             · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x))
                 x) · internal_comp (F x) (G x) (H x)))) =
?b

PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: [C, V] ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C
internal_to_arr
  (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
   · (EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H) I_{ V}
        (presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_data θ)
        (presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_laws θ)
      #⊗ EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
           I_{ V}

           (presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_laws τ)
      · ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
          · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) x)
         #⊗ (EqualizerArrow
               (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
             · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x))
                 x) · internal_comp (F x) (G x) (H x)))) =

V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: [C, V] ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C
EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H) I_{ V}
  (presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_data θ)
  (presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_laws θ)
#⊗ EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G) I_{ V}
     (presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_data τ)
     (presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_laws τ)
· ((EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
    · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) x)
   #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
       · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)
   · internal_comp (F x) (G x) (H x)) = ?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: [C, V] ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C
EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H) I_{ V}
  (presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_data θ)
  (presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_laws θ)
#⊗ EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G) I_{ V}
     (presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_data τ)
     (presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_laws τ)
· (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) x)
  #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
      · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)
· internal_comp (F x) (G x) (H x) = ?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: [C, V] ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C
EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H) I_{ V}
  (presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_data θ)
  (presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_laws θ)
#⊗ EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G) I_{ V}
     (presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_data τ)
     (presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_laws τ)
· (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
   · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) x)
  #⊗ (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
      · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x) =
?y'

F, G, H: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: [C, V] ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C
(EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H) I_{ V}
   (presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_data θ)
   (presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_laws θ)
 · (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
    · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) x))
#⊗ (EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G) I_{ V}
      (presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_data τ)
      (presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_laws τ)
    · (EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
       · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x)) =

τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: [C, V] ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C
(EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H) I_{ V}
   (presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_data θ)
   (presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_laws θ)
 · EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom G H)
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) x)
#⊗ (EqualizerIn (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G) I_{ V}
      (presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_data τ)
      (presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_laws τ)
    · EqualizerArrow (presheaf_enrichment_hom F G)
    · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x) = 
?y'

C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: [C, V] ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C
(presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_data θ
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) x)
#⊗ (presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_data τ
    · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x) = 
?y'

EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V

F, G, H: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: [C, V] ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C
(presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_data θ
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) x)
#⊗ (presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_data τ
    · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x) = 
?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: [C, V] ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C
?b = ?y'

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: [C, V] ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C
(presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_data θ
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) x)
#⊗ (presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_data τ
    · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x) = 
?b

          
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: [C, V] ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C
presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_data τ
· ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, F x ⊸ G x)) x = ?t2

          exact (ProductPrCommutes C V _ _ _ _ _).
        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: [C, V] ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C
(presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_data θ
 · ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) x)
#⊗ internal_from_arr (τ x) = ?y'

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: [C, V] ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C
presheaf_enrichment_from_arr_data θ
· ProductPr C V (PV (λ x : C, G x ⊸ H x)) x = ?y'

        exact (ProductPrCommutes C V _ _ _ _ _).
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: [C, V] ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C
internal_to_arr
  (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
   · (internal_from_arr (θ x)
      #⊗ internal_from_arr (τ x)
      · internal_comp (F x) (G x) (H x))) = τ x · θ x

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: [C, V] ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C
mon_linvunitor (F x)
· (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
   · (internal_from_arr (θ x)
      #⊗ internal_from_arr (τ x)
      · internal_comp (F x) (G x) (H x)))
  #⊗ identity (F x) · internal_eval (F x) (H x) =
τ x · θ x

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: [C, V] ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C
mon_linvunitor (F x)
· (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
   · internal_from_arr (θ x)
     #⊗ internal_from_arr (τ x)
   · internal_comp (F x) (G x) (H x))
  #⊗ identity (F x) · internal_eval (F x) (H x) =
τ x · θ x

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: [C, V] ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C
mon_linvunitor (F x)
· ((mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
    · internal_from_arr (θ x)
      #⊗ internal_from_arr (τ x)) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · internal_comp (F x) (G x) (H x) #⊗ identity (F x))
· internal_eval (F x) (H x) = τ x · θ x

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: [C, V] ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C
mon_linvunitor (F x)
· ((mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
    · internal_from_arr (θ x)
      #⊗ internal_from_arr (τ x)) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · (internal_comp (F x) (G x) (H x)
      #⊗ identity (F x) · internal_eval (F x) (H x))) =
τ x · θ x

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: [C, V] ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C
mon_linvunitor (F x)
· ((mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
    · internal_from_arr (θ x)
      #⊗ internal_from_arr (τ x)) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · (internal_lam
        (mon_lassociator (G x ⊸ H x) (F x ⊸ G x) (F x)
         · identity (G x ⊸ H x)
           #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (G x)
         · internal_eval (G x) (H x))
      #⊗ identity (F x) · internal_eval (F x) (H x))) =
τ x · θ x

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: [C, V] ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C
mon_linvunitor (F x)
· ((mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
    · internal_from_arr (θ x)
      #⊗ internal_from_arr (τ x)) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · (mon_lassociator (G x ⊸ H x) (F x ⊸ G x) (F x)
      · identity (G x ⊸ H x)
        #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (G x)
      · internal_eval (G x) (H x))) = τ x · θ x

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: [C, V] ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C
mon_linvunitor (F x)
· ((mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
    · internal_from_arr (θ x)
      #⊗ internal_from_arr (τ x)) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · (mon_lassociator (G x ⊸ H x) (F x ⊸ G x) (F x)
      · identity (G x ⊸ H x)
        #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (G x)
      · internal_eval (G x) (H x))) = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: [C, V] ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C
?b = τ x · θ x

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: [C, V] ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C
mon_linvunitor (F x)
· ((mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
    · internal_from_arr (θ x)
      #⊗ internal_from_arr (τ x)) #⊗ identity (F x)
   · (mon_lassociator (G x ⊸ H x) (F x ⊸ G x) (F x)
      · identity (G x ⊸ H x)
        #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (G x)
      · internal_eval (G x) (H x))) = ?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: [C, V] ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C
(mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
 · internal_from_arr (θ x) #⊗ internal_from_arr (τ x))
#⊗ identity (F x)
· (mon_lassociator (G x ⊸ H x) (F x ⊸ G x) (F x)
   · identity (G x ⊸ H x) #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (G x)
   · internal_eval (G x) (H x)) = ?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: [C, V] ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C
mon_linvunitor I_{ V} #⊗ identity (F x)
· (internal_from_arr (θ x) #⊗ internal_from_arr (τ x))
  #⊗ identity (F x)
· (mon_lassociator (G x ⊸ H x) (F x ⊸ G x) (F x)
   · identity (G x ⊸ H x) #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (G x)
   · internal_eval (G x) (H x)) = ?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: [C, V] ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C
mon_linvunitor I_{ V} #⊗ identity (F x)
· ((internal_from_arr (θ x) #⊗ internal_from_arr (τ x))
   #⊗ identity (F x)
   · (mon_lassociator (G x ⊸ H x) (F x ⊸ G x) (F x)
      · (identity (G x ⊸ H x)
         #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (G x)
         · internal_eval (G x) (H x)))) = ?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: [C, V] ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C
(internal_from_arr (θ x) #⊗ internal_from_arr (τ x))
#⊗ identity (F x)
· (mon_lassociator (G x ⊸ H x) (F x ⊸ G x) (F x)
   · (identity (G x ⊸ H x)
      #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (G x)
      · internal_eval (G x) (H x))) = ?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: [C, V] ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C
(internal_from_arr (θ x) #⊗ internal_from_arr (τ x))
#⊗ identity (F x)
· mon_lassociator (G x ⊸ H x) (F x ⊸ G x) (F x)
· identity (G x ⊸ H x) #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (G x)
· internal_eval (G x) (H x) = ?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: [C, V] ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C
mon_lassociator I_{ V} I_{ V} (F x)
· internal_from_arr (θ x)
  #⊗ (internal_from_arr (τ x) #⊗ identity (F x))
· identity (G x ⊸ H x) #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (G x)
· internal_eval (G x) (H x) = ?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: [C, V] ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C
mon_lassociator I_{ V} I_{ V} (F x)
· (internal_from_arr (θ x)
   #⊗ (internal_from_arr (τ x) #⊗ identity (F x))
   · (identity (G x ⊸ H x)
      #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (G x)
      · internal_eval (G x) (H x))) = ?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: [C, V] ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C
internal_from_arr (θ x)
#⊗ (internal_from_arr (τ x) #⊗ identity (F x))
· (identity (G x ⊸ H x) #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (G x)
   · internal_eval (G x) (H x)) = ?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: [C, V] ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C
internal_from_arr (θ x)
#⊗ (internal_from_arr (τ x) #⊗ identity (F x))
· identity (G x ⊸ H x) #⊗ internal_eval (F x) (G x)
· internal_eval (G x) (H x) = ?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: [C, V] ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C
(internal_from_arr (θ x) · identity (G x ⊸ H x))
#⊗ (internal_from_arr (τ x) #⊗ identity (F x)
    · internal_eval (F x) (G x))
· internal_eval (G x) (H x) = ?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: [C, V] ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C
internal_from_arr (θ x)
#⊗ (internal_from_arr (τ x) #⊗ identity (F x)
    · internal_eval (F x) (G x))
· internal_eval (G x) (H x) = ?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: [C, V] ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C
internal_lam (mon_lunitor (G x) · θ x)
#⊗ (internal_lam (mon_lunitor (F x) · τ x)
    #⊗ identity (F x) · internal_eval (F x) (G x))
· internal_eval (G x) (H x) = ?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: [C, V] ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C
internal_lam (mon_lunitor (G x) · θ x)
#⊗ (mon_lunitor (F x) · τ x)
· internal_eval (G x) (H x) = ?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: [C, V] ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C
identity I_{ V} #⊗ (mon_lunitor (F x) · τ x)
· internal_lam (mon_lunitor (G x) · θ x)
  #⊗ identity (G x) · internal_eval (G x) (H x) = 
?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: [C, V] ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C
identity I_{ V} #⊗ (mon_lunitor (F x) · τ x)
· (internal_lam (mon_lunitor (G x) · θ x)
   #⊗ identity (G x) · internal_eval (G x) (H x)) =
?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: [C, V] ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C
identity I_{ V} #⊗ (mon_lunitor (F x) · τ x)
· (mon_lunitor (G x) · θ x) = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: [C, V] ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C
mon_linvunitor (F x)
· (mon_linvunitor I_{ V} #⊗ identity (F x)
   · (mon_lassociator I_{ V} I_{ V} (F x)
      · (identity I_{ V} #⊗ (mon_lunitor (F x) · τ x)
         · (mon_lunitor (G x) · θ x)))) = τ x · θ x

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: [C, V] ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C
mon_linvunitor (F x)
· mon_linvunitor I_{ V} #⊗ identity (F x)
· mon_lassociator I_{ V} I_{ V} (F x)
· identity I_{ V} #⊗ (mon_lunitor (F x) · τ x)
· mon_lunitor (G x) · θ x = τ x · θ x

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: [C, V] ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C
mon_linvunitor (F x)
· mon_linvunitor I_{ V} #⊗ identity (F x)
· mon_lassociator I_{ V} I_{ V} (F x)
· identity I_{ V} #⊗ (mon_lunitor (F x) · τ x)
· mon_lunitor (G x) = τ x

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: [C, V] ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C
mon_linvunitor (F x)
· (mon_linvunitor I_{ V} #⊗ identity (F x)
   · (mon_lassociator I_{ V} I_{ V} (F x)
      · (identity I_{ V} #⊗ (mon_lunitor (F x) · τ x)
         · mon_lunitor (G x)))) = τ x

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: [C, V] ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C
mon_linvunitor (F x)
· (mon_linvunitor I_{ V} #⊗ identity (F x)
   · (mon_lassociator I_{ V} I_{ V} (F x)
      · (mon_lunitor (I_{ V} ⊗ F x)
         · (mon_lunitor (F x) · τ x)))) = τ x

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: [C, V] ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C
mon_linvunitor (F x)
· mon_linvunitor I_{ V} #⊗ identity (F x)
· mon_lassociator I_{ V} I_{ V} (F x)
· mon_lunitor (I_{ V} ⊗ F x) · mon_lunitor (F x) · 
τ x = τ x

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: [C, V] ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C
mon_linvunitor (F x)
· mon_linvunitor I_{ V} #⊗ identity (F x)
· mon_lassociator I_{ V} I_{ V} (F x)
· mon_lunitor (I_{ V} ⊗ F x) · mon_lunitor (F x) · 
τ x = identity (F x) · τ x

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: [C, V] ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C
mon_linvunitor (F x)
· mon_linvunitor I_{ V} #⊗ identity (F x)
· mon_lassociator I_{ V} I_{ V} (F x)
· mon_lunitor (I_{ V} ⊗ F x) · mon_lunitor (F x) =
identity (F x)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: [C, V] ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C
mon_linvunitor (F x)
· mon_linvunitor I_{ V} #⊗ identity (F x)
· mon_lassociator I_{ V} I_{ V} (F x)
· mon_lunitor (I_{ V} ⊗ F x) · mon_lunitor (F x) =
mon_linvunitor (F x) · mon_lunitor (F x)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: [C, V] ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C
mon_linvunitor (F x)
· mon_linvunitor I_{ V} #⊗ identity (F x)
· mon_lassociator I_{ V} I_{ V} (F x)
· mon_lunitor (I_{ V} ⊗ F x) = mon_linvunitor (F x)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: [C, V] ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C
mon_linvunitor (F x)
· mon_linvunitor I_{ V} #⊗ identity (F x)
· mon_lassociator I_{ V} I_{ V} (F x)
· mon_lunitor (I_{ V} ⊗ F x) =
mon_linvunitor (F x) · identity (I_{ V} ⊗ F x)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: [C, V] ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C
mon_linvunitor (F x)
· (mon_linvunitor I_{ V} #⊗ identity (F x)
   · (mon_lassociator I_{ V} I_{ V} (F x)
      · mon_lunitor (I_{ V} ⊗ F x))) =
mon_linvunitor (F x) · identity (I_{ V} ⊗ F x)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: [C, V] ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C
mon_linvunitor I_{ V} #⊗ identity (F x)
· (mon_lassociator I_{ V} I_{ V} (F x)
   · mon_lunitor (I_{ V} ⊗ F x)) =
identity (I_{ V} ⊗ F x)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: [C, V] ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C
mon_linvunitor I_{ V} #⊗ identity (F x)
· mon_lunitor I_{ V} #⊗ identity (F x) =
identity (I_{ V} ⊗ F x)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: [C, V] ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C
(mon_linvunitor I_{ V} · mon_lunitor I_{ V})
#⊗ identity (F x) = identity (I_{ V} ⊗ F x)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
F, G, H: [C, V]
τ: [C, V] ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: [C, V] ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C
identity I_{ V} #⊗ identity (F x) =
identity (I_{ V} ⊗ F x)

      apply tensor_id_id.
  Qed.

  (** * 6. Enrichment for the presheaf category *)
  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
enrichment [C, V] V

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
enrichment [C, V] V

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
enrichment_data [C, V] V
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
(λ E : enrichment_data [C, V] V, enrichment_laws E)
  ?pr1

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
enrichment_data [C, V] V
 exact presheaf_enrichment_data.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (∑ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧) V
(λ E : enrichment_data [C, V] V, enrichment_laws E)
  presheaf_enrichment_data
 exact presheaf_enrichment_laws.
  Defined.
End PresheafEnrichment.
